body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54271?t=6&akid=10945%2E878179%2EhygXI1) I want to give you the latest.

Extreme MAGA Republicans have barreled the People’s House into chaos, crisis and confusion.

Who knows how long it will take for them to get their act together.

On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are united and ready to get to work.

[**And as of 8pm, my team tells me we’re now within striking distance of having our best grassroots fundraising day in history. If just 2 more donors from your city step up, today will go down as a record fundraising day for Democrats. Can I count on you to step up by splitting a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54271?t=7&akid=10945%2E878179%2EhygXI1)

I’m humbled by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me today.

Now, we have a chance to make a powerful statement.

I need your help to prove that Democrats are united and ready to deliver For The People.

If just 2 more donors from your city split a gift between me and the Voter Protection Project before midnight, we can build a foundation for victory to reclaim the House.

Will you rush $10 in these final 4 hours? It would mean so much to me. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
We had to stand on the side of democracy and against extremism.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70968701/430849619/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTkzYmM0OS0xNDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juDjML5O5QY4sgkypqLfJ7AByDpFEhIBSW-NwsoXNM8=)
---
| Yesterday, Kevin McCarthy was voted out of his position as Speaker of the House. It was a difficult decision but the right one. I did not vote for Kevin McCarthy for Speaker because he had a reputation as a dishonest dealer and had already shown disdain and distrust for the People’s House. I voted him out because from day one as Speaker, he showed why he could not be trusted - going back on his word and refusing to bring the parties together for effective fulfillment of our duties. We needed reassurance that the House would be able to function and deliver for our constituents - Kevin McCarthy was unable to make those promises. _**We had to stand on the side of democracy and against extremism. **_ Americans deserve a Speaker who can govern, protect democracy, and defend our freedom from extremism and tyrannical rule. Kevin McCarthy failed on all fronts, and many Republicans are furious that Democrats held him accountable. Now, the NRCC is continuing to peddle excuses and use Democrats as scapegoats to cover up the failures of their own party's leadership. They’re targeting members of the Problem Solvers Caucus - a group of members who promised to look past partisan fighting - as an act of retaliation.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70968702/430849620/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTkzYmM0OS0xNDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juDjML5O5QY4sgkypqLfJ7AByDpFEhIBSW-NwsoXNM8=)
I believe that as representatives of our districts, we owe it to the American people to deliver for them. The reason I voted to remove McCarthy wasn’t an act of partisanship, it was a choice to protect our democracy and prevent the rise of extremism. I would have voted for any Speaker candidate - Republican or Democrat - willing to lead with integrity and uphold our Congressional institution. _**NRCC attacks on me and my fellow Problem Solvers Caucus members for voting to protect this country from extremism cut to the heart of what is wrong with today’s Republican party. **_ [_**If you support my vote to protect our democracy and squash the rise of extremism, I hope you will contribute today so I can continue my work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70968703/430849621/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTkzYmM0OS0xNDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juDjML5O5QY4sgkypqLfJ7AByDpFEhIBSW-NwsoXNM8=)

name: WFP Election Alert
subject: Summer Lee draws a primary challenger
disclaimer_text: paid for by Big Banks, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Tech
body:
The same billionaire-backed super PACs who sank more than $4,000,000 into attack ads to defeat Summer in 2022 are expected to try to take her down again in 2024, starting by recruiting primary opponents and then massively funding them. | | | It’s official, Peter,
**Rep. Summer Lee — the WFP champion who overcame millions of dollars in right-wing PAC money in 2022 to become the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania — is facing a primary challenge in 2024.** Her first opponent, already funded by Republicans, formally launched her campaign this week and is expected to raise millions from the same dark billionaire donors who funded the racist attacks against Summer last time. **[We’re proud to endorse Summer, one of the most progressive members of Congress to ever serve Pennsylvania, as she runs for re-election. Can you split a donation of $10 or more between Summer Lee's campaign and WFP to show her we have her back — and that we won’t let special interests buy this seat? Your support today will help fuel the organizing we’ll need to take on big money in 2024 and win.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUhceMeUeyjDkLGBARxFWVl9KjnDqYqh1u8qDhBZf_fbOb3tXKIKc1zIReZu5WIuN6Ha3dNOsDRx8_Fn6YQSH8o1QR5oItgRlXyKDfGNGXm97CYdzMbgrrTqo07ks7OVqDuWiMZ2pAuXt2KkuTdxQjcgm_hUHJdQnsbIQY63CG8KtcxSh86owrBUTa31PXqYbuDew7SH7Fwi2WLrkd-s0QuRcir5P2dlP-2kFtBB_9ORY_x7VW0vKao7wGCdIlpdul3J5EFNILcfsR4ZF2IYQync96SryusDKHRM_czxY1eUGGtYMRtoiDUhmRI-IEwgy90GQz-2F6ojlfteZWvqNKZErxgXdSqbLo0CNmB_Wjr0fWr2Ph2ayI3iE6r4RdNOgme_eUGc_L66LMa8LYyq6RjQ/406/4vL_b2XVRUi_PRDt2nj9cA/h0/lZRkfSl-s5h4nEEE1bEOYmX_1IQPF5X_wKlOtDmCcDA)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUhceMeUeyjDkLGBARxFWVl9KjnDqYqh1u8qDhBZf_fbOb3tXKIKc1zIReZu5WIuN6cB-2czdFmZsdAu1VBRSncGjpYSyPu6pL01Ssnh_8wiElkUxxROcGLxNHMEIjv85whVt9IM7o9ScoJKxVTX0LnAHyfjLuRqmDVMdfmHyFChNP3cg2628viYI4tCfkieDQ0eTaH2WHuW-HLyIurKk21q2fZ4dFpiCjNjZomVYZowleF264b1uZ7V52RruqBijOJC2ARO_Z6C0homXYgwu8gw3fWhfkSyIvNzOFLDz4eZhI6_AgLTBC1Sr6pIuJfK5Mi90p4sbc541XB30YuDHcHe9R7nU-Q34_aiH4x6ZwxYChextiUiVDsfq3X99gsZm-j4aq4DYfT68PaLJtep9OOA/406/4vL_b2XVRUi_PRDt2nj9cA/h1/Mlj-c18Bc-DoewbnH_EamonoaeCZWhVFgKc6Z1I-d6Q)** Like many of our WFP champions, Summer has led with a commitment to fighting for people over corporations and communities over special interests. That’s exactly what has made her such a priority target for the dark money playbook of the 2024 election cycle. The same billionaire-backed super PACs who sank more than $4,000,000 into attack ads to defeat Summer in 2022 are expected to try to take her down again in 2024, starting by recruiting primary opponents and then massively funding them. **That’s why we’ve got to start preparing for this race now, so that Summer can have a fair shot against the dark money corporate PACs already lining up against her — and so that we keep on winning victories for working people.** We know that progressives can get outspent and still win, Peter. Summer proved it last year when she overcame millions in opposition funding from the lobbying group AIPAC, and became the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania. But it wasn’t easy to do then, and it definitely won’t be easy to do again. The most vulnerable House seats are held by first-term members like Summer, whose adversaries aren't just partisan Republicans and the billionaire donors who finance their campaigns — but also corporate Democrats who are bought and paid for by Big Banks, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Tech. **Between now and next year, these forces are only going to redouble their efforts to try and beat us, which means we have to do the same.** [**Can you split a donation of $10 or more between Summer Lee's campaign and WFP to help build the organizing power needed to re-elect WFP champions like Summer in clean_body: The same billionaire-backed super PACs who sank more than $4,000,000 into attack ads to defeat Summer in 2022 are expected to try to take her down again in 2024, starting by recruiting primary opponents and then massively funding them. | | | It’s official, Peter, Rep. Summer Lee — the WFP champion who overcame millions of dollars in right-wing PAC money in 2022 to become the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania — is facing a primary challenge in 2024. Her first opponent, already funded by Republicans, formally launched her campaign this week and is expected to raise millions from the same dark billionaire donors who funded the racist attacks against Summer last time. Like many of our WFP champions, Summer has led with a commitment to fighting for people over corporations and communities over special interests. That’s exactly what has made her such a priority target for the dark money playbook of the 2024 election cycle. The same billionaire-backed super PACs who sank more than $4,000,000 into attack ads to defeat Summer in 2022 are expected to try to take her down again in 2024, starting by recruiting primary opponents and then massively funding them. That’s why we’ve got to start preparing for this race now, so that Summer can have a fair shot against the dark money corporate PACs already lining up against her — and so that we keep on winning victories for working people. We know that progressives can get outspent and still win, Peter. Summer proved it last year when she overcame millions in opposition funding from the lobbying group AIPAC, and became the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania. But it wasn’t easy to do then, and it definitely won’t be easy to do again. The most vulnerable House seats are held by first-term members like Summer, whose adversaries aren't just partisan Republicans and the billionaire donors who finance their campaigns — but also corporate Democrats who are bought and paid for by Big Banks, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Tech. Between now and next year, these forces are only going to redouble their efforts to try and beat us, which means we have to do the same. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: LucasKunce.com
subject: One more critical endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you help us keep up this historic MO-mentum, Peter?
#
Lucas’ MO-mentum is getting stronger every day, Peter.
Since he launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley back in January, he’s earned endorsements from dozens of community leaders and elected officials across Missouri, statewide and local labor unions representing tens of thousands of workers like the Missouri AFL-CIO, and major national organizations like the League of Conservation Voters and Social Security Works PAC.
**But now, Lucas needs one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you join the organizations, community leaders, and everyday people standing behind Lucas Kunce by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231004_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=3912%2E614464%2Ex-3nco)**
**[ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231004_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=3912%2E614464%2Ex-3nco)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley in 2024 — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join the national organizations, local leaders, and everyday people supporting Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231004_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=3912%2E614464%2Ex-3nco)**
**[ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231004_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=3912%2E614464%2Ex-3nco)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231004-3912-footer&t=5&refcode2=3912_614464_x-3nco&akid=3912%2E614464%2Ex-3nco)**

# Democrats Diversity Issue
---
|
---
| | |
---
| [**Diversity numbers among delegates trigger alarm at DNC meeting**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=411ac07f99&e=0be619cbaa) Friends, You and I know that the idea of institutional racism is a fallacy purported by the radical Left. Democrats want to make all of us believe – and more importantly, they want Black Americans to believe – that conservatives are holding minority men and women back from prosperity, and they are the only true saviors. But we know that’s not true. They are the true racists. They are the ones trying to hold minorities back to keep control of that voting bloc. [**So please contribute $10, $15, or even $20 or more today, so I can continue to campaign, and spread the message that the Democrats are BAD for minority voters.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c3aed495ff&e=0be619cbaa) If I have to leave this race because we can’t afford to run anymore, the Democrats will continue to hold the line that minority families should be Democrat voting families. That couldn’t be further from the truth. The truth is, the same policies Democrats have ruined California with, are the same policies national Democrats are forcing on communities nationwide. And it must stop! We can’t let the Democrats continue to lie about the American experience. They are the true hypocrites, and they are holding millions of families back from prosperity. [**Please contribute today so I can help fight the Democrats nationwide and bring prosperity back to ALL families.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7c9376366b&e=0be619cbaa) Thanks,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like South Carolina, New Hampshire, and Maine – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. subject: "Speaker" of the House Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The current, shambolic state of the Republican Party is not just embarrassing for them, it is flat-out dangerous for our democracy and damaging to our country’s reputation on the global stage. YOU deserve better. | | |
---
After removing their own Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy, a bunch of extremist Republicans are throwing their name in the ring. **Republican power players like Marjorie Taylor Greene are even floating a Trump speakership. Seriously!** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZcykCn89Q4lXVj9TmpGcXXwdYOC3Ps-DRY5Ch7QnYByYcGcN_t8qunO78U7brfCxSrXCvdevdR58vt8J0yYFQ0mtDw-UnJ8FgiemQQiJYVSoydDTRkJMN9AOCG0NDqYhg323zXNJ2nSLUSCsuTWkDSHDRc-LsuGWqk6sYIAiCUf9JK3T6OTPXbqyXCV9HhYyOZ8oX3SYZyJQmBtljheU_dCmU1Y6dXew4ShS80urcD4_hpQ-2GWTNtU2GG972ua2ze7SldQm8nGGEh-MKNg5dl-InI3g95c9nMJBpDUQXxtE948bTilWOUVQ9XRD4izpw92ukNMhbwFSo0fcK651x_gcxIiA13yHZPoVYRXHMP2Q/406/dOVir9jyS3u9I4zmn6KfxQ/h0/92KpYKwVbNDKdOMVGHS-09BEjNt5sAi2pQw3LYF_odw) And Trump is saying he’s open to it. I mean, okay! **Here’s the thing: Donald Trump doesn’t actually need to be speaker to...be speaker. We know that whoever comes next, whether it’s Donald Trump or one of his disciples, is going to be pushing whatever Trump tells them to.** [**If you put Republicans in charge, chaos ensues. We need to elect Democrats -- from Joe and Kamala down the ticket -- who are capable of serving the American people and finishing the job. Will you pitch in $25 now if you agree?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZcykCn89Q4lXVj9TmpGcXXwdYOC3Ps-DRY5Ch7QnYByYcGcN_t8qunO78U7brfCxSrXCvdevdR58vt8J0yYFQ0mtDw-UnJ8FgiemQQiJYVSoG33pGDk-9A5RwqO3ZnkiKi_870BVIShDcGVhN_s2o-yxAWbBRBg-T1oMZx4VbAehnSEEfiEusgRqEcvhIqcrpn3nPKvgJk5C5AAr1rvZsrAOm18GAT2BK4IPCCdzmc7LbXAQx9fGtSI4NImvHvWnunEKNf92uUrwOoistw_e_2jXTpDeYXawz2nv3pCoG9fn3RJ7I-gWfMEF7yqZrGD0XY23lAjmmIfafyf2WEp8nIfgJReeYmy2A846NOS4gnIE/406/dOVir9jyS3u9I4zmn6KfxQ/h1/B5PlZiofU-8cDwOkcgqfZyO6-bRrD_NjhZKr-tQ1RnE) | | | [YES](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE2z9I3KlofRvG7PtPUh-EgHUQJtm1rczcJ0DnR518bl4GjAsWqysJLA8TELjpOBQdAJ5cFNQhqwIS0-WVNO2lve22HYOUXwuu1cxmnjA2muK6Y0Vl8wYC79Hcn9mL5GfzwtiesIB9Or9sC60NiYX48X-gl6OFeuUInCH4yfDwBbLAet-7VggMI6uKzaKooklb5U6BWzo0rSTc6pgdVr6pFTHBsvs9x6PGaLhWe1QmA0T6VthsmJp0gaiozyglC0GLngWDFsCaRogDIX8UR3ui_X3-hAaM_rrEk_rsEe3Kl3RnBXxgmkx0nGUhmpkTjDuQLpOjc_B4kc-ahHlJp3g_aeZdOdifhBPMzM6pJiw2s5hTTARxksqlqzed7V60wsFGVxykq6Jgg4se3XKdBVssjKj1F7DqXKum-wZFIX7Fa7TIyyuLF9Ug13zzUehOLdxvWgcAN0l-tMml04Okxz7J-O_KrSPLDXZvmIGcvFj8MJdugf0k8HdD1IUWHEoW5ZR1KqLCe7NCN1sWTWzGm-BPY1/406/dOVir9jyS3u9I4zmn6KfxQ/h2/GDmgo-lvoETf8xwB_cXNVCwvWevyQ2mfBtrn2_tByPg)

Listen, Republicans could be doing their jobs right now. They could be working to lower prescription drug costs for the American people (which the President did literally yesterday!) or building an economy that works for everyone.
But instead they’re busy fighting with themselves. All to advance an agenda that would help their friends get richer, would raise costs for working families, and would take core freedoms away from people around the country.
**The current, shambolic state of the Republican Party is not just embarrassing for them, it is flat-out dangerous for our democracy and damaging to our country’s reputation on the global stage. YOU deserve better.**
[**If you’re on the side of electing leaders who are more interested in fighting for YOU than fighting with each other -- chip in $25 today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZcykCn89Q4lXVj9TmpGcXXwdYOC3Ps-DRY5Ch7QnYByYcGcN_t8qunO78U7brfCxSrXCvdevdR58vt8J0yYFQ0mtDw-UnJ8FgiemQQiJYVSqSDGbOHYA4PAz9X-hk2xcPWQFQFuc9qWU87Xbk-amIHbrwCYflSxZhQT8eUKhn1DOhW5Gj8LqYMICk5X5UOX-yHlCwObu3heRCuZF2jcVBGolKeq3vZo4KszFj-uMYsUkoOouSQImGjUxz2k9RobOzhUNv4ACZwxpiqNY58mNsM4odhy97TWbpVk927W7xe9ElxyrAq3ABChdidTwDV8Y-E5IOXXfkzoa0jsm_bxApGloSDKWgaOFSNMDWyQrd8JI/406/dOVir9jyS3u9I4zmn6KfxQ/h3/3Rb9etEh6xk7z1agZH-tGBXAh2_u8II6FLGU_-hhCZE)
Thanks for being on this team, Peter.

clean_body: The current, shambolic state of the Republican Party is not just embarrassing for them, it is flat-out dangerous for our democracy and damaging to our country’s reputation on the global stage. YOU deserve better. | | | After removing their own Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy, a bunch of extremist Republicans are throwing their name in the ring. Republican power players like Marjorie Taylor Greene are even floating a Trump speakership. Seriously! And Trump is saying he’s open to it. I mean, okay! Here’s the thing: Donald Trump doesn’t actually need to be speaker to...be speaker. We know that whoever comes next, whether it’s Donald Trump or one of his disciples, is going to be pushing whatever Trump tells them to. | | | Listen, Republicans could be doing their jobs right now. They could be working to lower prescription drug costs for the American people (which the President did literally yesterday!) or building an economy that works for everyone. But instead they’re busy fighting with themselves. All to advance an agenda that would help their friends get richer, would raise costs for working families, and would take core freedoms away from people around the country. The current, shambolic state of the Republican Party is not just embarrassing for them, it is flat-out dangerous for our democracy and damaging to our country’s reputation on the global stage. YOU deserve better. Thanks for being on this team, Peter. Rob Rob Flaherty Deputy Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20LM=20Bolick?=
subject: Join Us on October 18th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Bolick
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bolickforarizona/oct18thkickoff2023?e=a7ab36849c)
---
| |
---
|
As you may have heard, I was recruited back to the Arizona Legislature to fill the remainder of my State Senator’s two-year term that expires in early January 2025. Having won this swing district twice before redistricting, I was viewed as the [appointee](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=60def67b1c&e=a7ab36849c) who could best defend this seat in 2024, which will determine which party controls the Senate.

As you may know, we are facing a dual threat, fighting both Biden’s inflationary policies and our own governor’s out-of-touch liberal agenda that threaten to displace Arizona’s families in favor of a nanny state. The Democrats are fielding a well-funded incumbent legislator to win this Senate seat and have committed as much as two million dollars. She has publicly stated she supports capping your income, implementing rent control, allowing babies to be aborted up to the moment of birth, and she repeats the same climate alarmism talking points you hear coming out of the mouths of the national Democrats who want you to give up your car in favor of an EV.

The State Senate has a bare-minimum majority. The State Senate currently has 16 Republicans—only enough members to pass or kill legislation. Together, we can grow our GOP majority and keep Arizona free, but I need your help today. Please go to our [website](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ec81000bd6&e=a7ab36849c) to make a [donation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=604a0fee78&e=a7ab36849c), sign up to [volunteer](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f95e850582&e=a7ab36849c), [sign our online nomination petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6410560342&e=a7ab36849c), offer to host a meet and greet, or request a yard sign.

When we moved to Arizona in the Summer 2001 to establish roots and a foundation for our yet to be born children, we never thought we would experience a shift away from Goldwater country to one with out-of-state liberal billionaires trying to buy an election. Please join me in protecting the future of Arizona. As you know, everything we have built upon the last 20 years in this state is on the line from universal school choice to our low flat tax policy. If this Democratic governor gets her way, the Republicans will be in the minority next legislative session.

On Wednesday, October 18th, please join us at 5:30 pm as we kick-off our campaign for the State Senate. Please RSVP to info@BolickforArizona.com for the exact location.

See you there!
---
|
---
| | I will never let you down, and I promise with your support our campaign will be a success! Please join me in investing in the future of Arizona.

See you on October 18th.

Sincerely,
Shawnna

body:
Trump is a master at weaponizing the MAGA base
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20263%2E4449941%2EW3R3BU)
---
**BREAKING: Trump expected to renew attacks against _MSNBC_ as coverage of his fraud trial in New York begins** Trump is a master at weaponizing the MAGA base, anything he says spreads like WILDFIRE amongst Republicans. _NO!!!_

So we’re re-opening our urgent _MSNBC_ poll to see how Democrats feel about their performance ahead of Trump’s next round of attacks. **You failed to respond last week, so we handpicked you to participate:**
**[_[RESPOND] How would you grade _MSNBC_?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20231004_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=20263%2E4449941%2EW3R3BU)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20231004_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=20263%2E4449941%2EW3R3BU) | [A: ABSOLUTELY TERRIFIC! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20231004_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=20263%2E4449941%2EW3R3BU)

****__500 POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM__ TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE FOR REFERENCE IN OUR 2024 ELECTION STRATEGY. ****
* * *
_Listen, Donald Trump and his MAGA army want voters to lose faith in every last democratic institution!_

...and media watchdogs like _MSNBC_ are just their latest target!

We need to know that their plan to overtake this country is NOT impacting the minds of our most loyal Democratic supporters!

**So PLEASE: Click[ _HERE_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20231004_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=14&akid=20263%2E4449941%2EW3R3BU) or use the buttons below to submit your poll response quickly! ⇩⇩**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: What happens over the next 3 months will be crucial.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9ab469708f&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter,

We’re coming off of a successful Q3 fundraising deadline last week, but this final quarter of 2023 is going to be equally as important... and I’ll tell you why.

For starters, in just a little over a month, we will officially be at the **one-year mark** before the 2024 Election. By that time, we will absolutely need to be in a strong position with a full team of staff, volunteers, and campaign resources ready to go if we’re going to win this close election.
---
| [HELP LAY THE GROUNDWORK FOR VICTORY!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=69bac2e8b1&e=8a657725d1 "HELP LAY THE GROUNDWORK FOR VICTORY!")
---
| But Peter, as a second and equally important reason for why we will need to have a strong quarter, I’d like you to check out this headline below from last week.

**It shows us something we probably all have felt at some point over the last two years – the consequences of out-of-touch Democrat policies rearing their ugly head.**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=44d2827893&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Make no mistake – we can thank extreme, far-left politicians for this ongoing pain at the pump. Their inflationary spending and Green New Deal agenda is hurting folks who are just trying to get to work or pick up their kids from school.

_But next year’s election is our chance to finally change that, Peter. _

**It’s our chance to FLIP a California House district that’s currently being run by an extreme socialist who pushes the very out-of-touch policies that just spiked our gas prices to $7/gallon.**

That’s why – in our final quarter before this monumentally important election year – our campaign needs to be firing on all cylinders. _Failing to do so just might mean more pain at the pump for families across California and America._

So Peter, if the tough times created by Democrat politicians have put a donation out of reach today, I completely understand. Thank you for being with me in the fight regardless.

[But if you DO have the means to spare just $7 today – _the price of a gallon of gas in some parts of California_ – it would go a long way towards a strong Q4 and a major victory over the Democrats who are hurting us at the pump.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=70c32168a4&e=8a657725d1)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, We’re coming off of a successful Q3 fundraising deadline last week, but this final quarter of 2023 is going to be equally as important... and I’ll tell you why. For starters, in just a little over a month, we will officially be at the one-year mark before the 2024 Election. By that time, we will absolutely need to be in a strong position with a full team of staff, volunteers, and campaign resources ready to go if we’re going to win this close election. | "HELP LAY THE GROUNDWORK FOR VICTORY!" | But Peter, as a second and equally important reason for why we will need to have a strong quarter, I’d like you to check out this headline below from last week. It shows us something we probably all have felt at some point over the last two years – the consequences of out-of-touch Democrat policies rearing their ugly head. | | Make no mistake – we can thank extreme, far-left politicians for this ongoing pain at the pump. Their inflationary spending and Green New Deal agenda is hurting folks who are just trying to get to work or pick up their kids from school. But next year’s election is our chance to finally change that, Peter. It’s our chance to FLIP a California House district that’s currently being run by an extreme socialist who pushes the very out-of-touch policies that just spiked our gas prices to $7/gallon. That’s why – in our final quarter before this monumentally important election year – our campaign needs to be firing on all cylinders. Failing to do so just might mean more pain at the pump for families across California and America. So Peter, if the tough times created by Democrat politicians have put a donation out of reach today, I completely understand. Thank you for being with me in the fight regardless. | "HELP LAY THE GROUNDWORK FOR VICTORY!" | "DONATE $7" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | Thanks for your help, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Team Padora
subject: We’ve had enough of the games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Let’s be honest, folks – if we’re celebrating the government narrowly avoiding a shutdown, then our standards have really gone to hell. The most basic job of government is to continue operating so that it can do its job, which is to govern and protect the American people. And the fact that Republicans in Washington use that power as a political football to try and score points is frankly disgusting.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=cd7653febb874ef8a7eed3d5e40feece&_e=3cMDYQZvVjKk1yhoKtdVidCWiTRe6tgu4TboydejuDKub-reQJkE8VqQow4U1-xTsot2PmCpz10_Trbzhn2Hv-RZdcO2j1YEc2gbWuNuHbXgIcGndbUAgvaGsjpSwqEROC5ufSrW4Rpxz4beHaKDJvpu9OAHbv4qMGW6rqd4snnZG_QO9dq8rjprnHdIwaHGdoE3651ikol5ElcsIGcbA1vuo5NablC4KI4GFFMQtQFtChm2yDMWKcX1nG5tNjHc8LgNZvEdNJE70ZD0U81HSFK95X12MA6TmmXiUozir_2STD6emytIZkABhaFxlZ5JWMX6OGXXZWVSgfvxJynNU6g6MrGyEweB7Zbhu-axpVTCyDbi3tSAxahwJKSU0PhUhWLjBBrmKVroqqp0kvnh_A%3D%3D) Let’s be honest, folks – if we’re celebrating the government narrowly avoiding a shutdown, then our standards have really gone to hell. The most basic job of government is to continue operating so that it can do its job, which is to govern and protect the American people. **And the fact that Republicans in Washington use that power as a political football to try and score points is frankly disgusting.** People like Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert are so extreme that they have no business in Congress at all. But at the same time, people like Kevin McCarthy and Ken Buck have been so afraid to stand against the extremists in their party that they’ve ceded too much power to the crazies to go backward. And as a reward, Ken Buck helped kick McCarthy out of the Speakership. We’re sick and tired of politicians playing with our livelihoods to score political points, and we want to know if you are too. Let us know below if you believe that Congress should fully fund the government and end these ridiculous games of chicken. **Should the government be fully funded for the next year?** [YES](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=cd7653febb874ef8a7eed3d5e40feece&_e=3cMDYQZvVjKk1yhoKtdVidCWiTRe6tgu4TboydejuDKub-reQJkE8VqQow4U1-xT12eCUGHq8S95z7SSFT8fF0BhU-Dh8Av2QMT7D4T2M-3WrtAPe5faqEL_mB6xW8NsuHZivGb1okz6ykTtbX7WqWCE49p_M5qDtBL4-Vkx2OnJ4lJute9UBhryLv_0dPxopELw3mgqjWdqot9ny9bMtYLgWm9RZAYLjk87R2JCg3tj-vPgq38uqrPXENiw-09WPyIF6wa3sF_BnOUPpblZhFpSJ4fMYTpf3CG0UdgMGHxn_tZ0mG76RtwCN9y_5uQ-Rio6NyLTAk9BXQKsE5RfT7p_9oeDJaHMxKWatL07w1_A-EfxBPa6XYm0k2vpsJqdL-tzHv3YPzSFnET3ht_1HmUZWowBKu46q0kVWkBt-dA%3D) [NO](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=cd7653febb874ef8a7eed3d5e40feece&_e=3cMDYQZvVjKk1yhoKtdVidCWiTRe6tgu4TboydejuDKub-reQJkE8VqQow4U1-xT12eCUGHq8S95z7SSFT8fF0BhU-Dh8Av2QMT7D4T2M-3WrtAPe5faqEL_mB6xW8NsuHZivGb1okz6ykTtbX7WqWCE49p_M5qDtBL4-Vkx2OnJ4lJute9UBhryLv_0dPxopELw3mgqjWdqot9ny9bMtYLgWm9RZAYLjk87R2JCg3tj-vPgq38uqrPXENiw-09Whtv_penSk5NpSao5efQ3Io1QfO2AtES6TGptwj4sMjrYlAQ4d8vzFUqD3-8jg5FC0LtqCOkMLiKZR8gJaeUX5onzxxKeaux-e6kr5_F0-S4io-4PYXFboywIcCctMo4hTxzHSDwNv60sCl5Ni6QHnjkMfVfuMcqUGhyeBhFS1ws%3D) [NOT SURE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=cd7653febb874ef8a7eed3d5e40feece&_e=3cMDYQZvVjKk1yhoKtdVidCWiTRe6tgu4TboydejuDKub-reQJkE8VqQow4U1-xT12eCUGHq8S95z7SSFT8fF0BhU-Dh8Av2QMT7D4T2M-3WrtAPe5faqEL_mB6xW8NsuHZivGb1okz6ykTtbX7WqWCE49p_M5qDtBL4-Vkx2OnJ4lJute9UBhryLv_0dPxopELw3mgqjWdqot9ny9bMtYLgWm9RZAYLjk87R2JCg3tj-vPgq38uqrPXENiw-09WuZFyOcOZdAOQtwmZT14IINKi47f57mEhTUpL6vT7GLlqA322NpfGgxYwIhkkfQugsZbbAdy362W2UOThGUd3TgCh3UktLv2hkjarpbkhhnmgGJaFjN7aPd3Nlf_eLsWSgmi5u3nioqpMhr-zBUXzm3HLf3GX0UmrwwZ8b1jm6lU%3D) Thanks for letting us know. body:
The numbers don’t lie. To be in the best possible position to take back the Senate, we cannot afford to miss our monthly goals... | We **_FAILED_** , Peter.

We were SO CLOSE to hitting our needed goal to stay on track and retake the Senate but unfortunately, **we came _up_ short by $82,303.**

This might seem like a big number – but if everyone reading this email right now chipped in just a couple of bucks, we’d hit our goal.

# [McCarthy's disgraceful exit should also shame House progressives](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137647093&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjQ3MDkzLCJpYXQiOjE2OTY0NzcxODEsImV4cCI6MTY5OTA2OTE4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GxlvWSSqEKrUOTMeYtPWg2lRwtmMzQd1i6lWP_3PT9w)
### The first removal of a Speaker of the House in 100 years demonstrates how even a small minority of policymakers can force changes in leadership. Why have only Republicans learned that lesson?
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/ecda6d14-4f85-4f74-abc9-2d79b5fb0921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 5| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecda6d14-4f85-4f74-abc9-2d79b5fb0921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137647093&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjQ3MDkzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5NjQ3NzE4MSwiZXhwIjoxNjk5MDY5MTgxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kBycaFLM2XQl4wAd7tjYMxs3h-qx579mUWVV6bG4KlM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

The removal of Rep. Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) from the office of Speaker of the House would be laughable were it not so [painfully predictable](https://substack.com/redirect/ae08c7d1-aeb4-4b49-9537-b40c1db2d916?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
McCarthy came to be Speaker by dancing on the head of a[ hyperpartisan pin](https://substack.com/redirect/ae2d5dc3-a6fb-4ea5-a2b2-935a4b003cb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It was inevitable that he would, eventually, fall off. Still, the theater of the process proved poignant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/264c2e2b-3854-4ca7-8682-b050b343e26e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Gaetz hopes to follow the footsteps of Gringrich**
The impetuous--and unapologetically ambitious--Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) had already[ openly politically threatened](https://substack.com/redirect/1fd92473-ec3f-43d4-853c-c6e3997af453?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) McCarthy well before he chose to constructively work with Democrats to craft a last minute compromise to avert a government shutdown. Gaetz then made good on his promise, as half a dozen other hard-right Republicans joined Democrats in voting to vacate McCarthy as Speaker.
Republicans are more or less replaying their experience from the 1990s, when young firebrands (then Newt Gingrich from Georgia, now Matt Gaetz from neighboring Florida) came to Congress and pushed out a generation of older leaders who they saw as insufficiently committed to their principles and too willing to compromise with Democrats in the name of a moderate consensus.
Over 20,000 people read this newsletter. Fewer than 100 support it. If you're able to afford a subscription, please join me to help expand my continuing work! If not, you can subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..86AMa5y17uivhDuZZt0Io8V8MtrTlgOgQp7edjHOm6o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=137647093)
The rise and fall of[ Newt Gingrich](https://substack.com/redirect/d4cb8c72-5674-4db9-a954-b430a91dd300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a case study in ambition and hubris. He is widely remembered for escalating the degree of partisan rancor pervading American politics, which has continued to only grow since his time wielding the Speaker's gavel in the 90s.
Gaetz appears to be following a similar playbook. With his colleagues discussing[ removing](https://substack.com/redirect/8ac2d363-7e98-4820-99a6-3355e8cde671?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him from the Grand Old Party, however, his arc may very well take its own trajectory.
Among the most fascinating revelations in this unfolding saga has been the roles played by Democrats. Despite wielding only minority power in the House, several of them have played roles worth observing.
Beyond failing to demonstrate the political influence of voices marginalized within the Democratic Party, this week's events should especially shame Democrats for so thoroughly [abandoning](https://substack.com/redirect/539be07e-880a-4ada-8894-13ff03a14ed1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the antiwar voice that carried Obama to the White House in 2008. Somehow, it is [Republicans opposing](https://substack.com/redirect/eea7a411-cef8-4b31-aa53-3ed5bd3eedeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) yet another $25 billion for weapons to send to Ukraine, while Democrats are dutifully stumping for whatever the national security industrial Wall Street complex wants.
### **Progressives may wonder: what might we have done?**
Progressive voices in Congress should feel some shame and embarrassment in the face of McCarthy's removal.
On the one hand, it has thrown the House into some disarray and the ultimate outcome remains unclear. But, if nothing else, Gaetz and his colleagues have demonstrated influence, removed a key antagonist from a critical leadership position, and shifted the public debate to center around their political demands and legislative vision.
There is no reason that progressives could not have pursued a similar strategy when Democrats held the majority. In fact, a [great](https://substack.com/redirect/1c1343dc-45fe-462c-858a-004334b07158?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) many [voices](https://substack.com/redirect/eff014c8-9292-4415-a87b-d34e894bab8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the country implored them to be more assertive, and withhold votes from Pelosi when she needed their support in order to be re-elected as Speaker in 2021. At the very least, the reasoning went, progressives could have bargained to offer their support in exchange for Pelosi's promise for hearings and a vote on a proposed universal healthcare program.
Instead they backed her with no conditions. She became the Speaker, and continued to ignore their policy goals while offering photo opportunities, instead.
Their failure to press the Democratic leadership was certainly convenient, and arguably constructive. But allowing the gears of business as usual in Washington to grind on unimpeded also proved politically destructive to their own movement, as their prevarication suggested to many supporters that [their convictions were unreliable](https://substack.com/redirect/24716573-f09b-4c5e-9b32-0714f6eab2ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But beyond the controversy surrounding the proposal to force a vote over universal healthcare in Congress, how many other issues could progressives have influenced had they been as willing to press Pelosi, as Gaetz and other Republicans have proven willing to press--and ultimately remove--McCarthy?
Migrant children detained at the border while fleeing human rights abuses (often tracing their roots to CIA and Pentagon crimes) will never know. Neither will kids denied medical procedures because they can't pay for them, or grandparents forced into homelessness by medical debt, or the healthcare workers who [went on strike today](https://substack.com/redirect/9fc00684-1c16-4fa9-8f49-4b1f5a98db49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the country.
Decisions by progressives to defer to the supposedly "moderate" (and in fact quite conservative) positions of their party leaders have had catastrophic consequences for those victims of federal policy, as well as their own political bases of support.
And they can't say they weren't warned.
At the risk of [sounding](https://substack.com/redirect/87aa4304-2e6a-4cea-b76e-52224ccacc75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) like a [broken](https://substack.com/redirect/1e7ee7a0-7de8-4c3b-ba95-da48732606d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [record](https://substack.com/redirect/d54236a4-adef-44df-b06c-4a6a0a642d4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s iconic [Letter from a Birmingham Jail](https://substack.com/redirect/ec64864a-8479-4b84-8ec5-b6170dc6f84b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is crucially instructive on this very point. Taking the path of least resistance to accommodate moderate compromise is often a step on the moral road to hell.
Rather than stand between the disadvantaged and the privileged, the figure described as "the white moderate" stands on top of the disadvantaged and plays a crucial role enabling and legitimizing economic violence punching down that has, as a result, grown pervasive, routine, and ubiquitous. Progressives in Congress might want to finally learn a few things from Dr. King's lessons, rather than watch right wing fanatics like Gaetz eat their lunch.
Beyond failing to demonstrate the political influence of voices marginalized within the Democratic Party, this week's events should especially shame Democrats for so thoroughly [abandoning](https://substack.com/redirect/539be07e-880a-4ada-8894-13ff03a14ed1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the antiwar voice that carried Obama to the White House in 2008. Somehow, it is [Republicans opposing](https://substack.com/redirect/eea7a411-cef8-4b31-aa53-3ed5bd3eedeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) yet another $25 billion for weapons to send to Ukraine, while Democrats are dutifully stumping for whatever the national security industrial Wall Street complex wants.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137647093&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NjQ3MDkzLCJpYXQiOjE2OTY0NzcxODEsImV4cCI6MTY5OTA2OTE4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GxlvWSSqEKrUOTMeYtPWg2lRwtmMzQd1i6lWP_3PT9w)
This week's events also exposed another role behind the scenes played by a powerful Democrat: Nancy Pelosi...

body:

My far-Left opponent has recently announced her campaign against me, and the Democrat Machine is already rallying behind her.

_**This is not good news. **_

My campaign has already been under fire from Democrat Super PACs and now...the floodgates have really opened.

The Left is bent on FLIPPING my seat BLUE in 2024, and they have made it crystal clear that they will stop at NOTHING to defeat me...they've already even pledged MILLIONS to do it.

**BRING. IT. ON.** I'm a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who flipped a Democrat-held seat Red in 2022 and helped restore the Republican House Majority, so I have the courage to fight back!

---

If everyone reading this gave just a few dollars, then we would be well on our way to DEFENDING both my seat and the House Majority. It is critical that we build the resources we need to have a fighting chance.

Thank you in advance for your support,

name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People's House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they're falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big October goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We've only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl73oaja0c8fn78tkmjdb6trn3be80eolm42342g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob0cdh2bs "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. ")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I'm afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I 'm pleading for your help right here and now:**

---
I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you're probably tired of hearing from us, but we don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I'm personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpciq5ck9st4c2nl8omjp7sqbln1tj2fq3pbonn8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob0cdh2bs "So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
I have written a book, Why America Matters. Intended for young readers

|
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3gvmtvl3hlsrr0u5em87au9fij60aktrstucoe0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob4chh2bs) | |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z07kve6lq50b0mq75v4ivpg6dcsuvhmb5609o138_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob4chh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7o4o12amldvaih2eu172pdv4p0r8r97c0j8e0g0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob4chh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp347fmieom9gb32uveo2iie0fhu4j26pd1sktpo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5ie6ob4chh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Jen Kiggans [VA-02]
subject: The floodgates have opened…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Walking into the lion’s den...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqbbn1eckp9ggc8bne2v73vhqv81ta1v9kejllh8_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs)
---

Did you see this, Friend?

My far-Left opponent has recently announced her campaign against me, and the Democrat Machine is already rallying behind her.

_**This is not good news. **_

My campaign has already been under fire from Democrat Super PACs and now...the floodgates have really opened.

The Left is bent on FLIPPING my seat BLUE in 2024, and they have made it crystal clear that they will stop at NOTHING to defeat me...they've already even pledged MILLIONS to do it.

**BRING. IT. ON.** I'm a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who flipped a Democrat-held seat Red in 2022 and helped restore the Republican House Majority, so I have the courage to fight back!

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqurqeal6p0pst7ncv1aremit5d1g8f7rts72v20_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

**Now, I officially have a far-Left opponent who has previously been backed by Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and now even MORE far-Leftists ....**
This fight won't be easy, I know that. For one, I'm not a career politician, and I don't play their games. For two, asking for your help has never come easy to me. But I will only have a chance against my radical opponent and her dark money donors if I have your support.

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zktv0lrhtsekuoqlu4a6sgv0ld9hsck823mee1j8_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

**The House Majority could very well come down to my race. That means that even just a small donation of ANY amount helps us win or lose. **
_**[I'm personally asking you today, Friend, if you would please consider chipping in just a few bucks.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9kovnegtvd1c5vkn18vfepj2379ijeu2jblgb48_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs "I’m personally asking you today, Friend, if you would please consider chipping in just a few bucks.")**_

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsumfutuv4btpdgq18rvfgrndlpg9bt9abd9p8e8_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

If everyone reading this gave just a few dollars, then we would be well on our way to DEFENDING both my seat and the House Majority. It is critical that we build the resources we need to have a fighting chance.

Thank you in advance for your support,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgnd0c49d9h3tgntag0uklksbasr7hpkrdkhgbdo_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs)

subject: I just accepted an important mission
body:

| |
---
| | | Hello all,

**This is Newt Gingrich.** I just accepted an important mission asked of me by the Majority Whip.

He is looking for some guidance as we enter the early stages of the impeachment inquiry and the final quarter of the year. Both are critical to the future of our country.

So allow me to be blunt:

I'm kindly asking you for 5 minutes of your time to fill out his Official Majority Leadership Audit:

---

Once submitted, your responses will be logged, formatted, and transmitted directly to the Majority Whip's office.

_Again, it 's only a few questions. I've been assured it won't take you very long._

**[Here's your access link once more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8hvbo5gs1eutmle2e9mhgu6p7rpn06u70orjg4g_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg60o36c9h2bs "Here’s your access link once more.")**

- Newt

Our immediate priority should be the 12 appropriations bills that will cut government spending, followed by actually keeping our promise to SECURE THE BORDER!

We can do this with a true conservative Speaker that we can trust to unify our party and stick to the deal that I helped negotiate on the rules package back in January.

name: Jen Kiggans [VA-02]
subject: The floodgates have opened…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Walking into the lion’s den...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1oju13li0gkq5vl91m4keumke2q23k9evgf2ui0_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs)
---

Did you see this, Friend?

My far-Left opponent has recently announced her campaign against me, and the Democrat Machine is already rallying behind her.

_**This is not good news. **_

My campaign has already been under fire from Democrat Super PACs and now...the floodgates have really opened.

The Left is bent on FLIPPING my seat BLUE in 2024, and they have made it crystal clear that they will stop at NOTHING to defeat me...they've already even pledged MILLIONS to do it.

**BRING. IT. ON.** I'm a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who flipped a Democrat-held seat Red in 2022 and helped restore the Republican House Majority, so I have the courage to fight back!

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9qdj64ocv15km1ktvqhrikin66hif3p2t365f0_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

**Now, I officially have a far-Left opponent who has previously been backed by Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and now even MORE far-Leftists ....**
This fight won't be easy, I know that. For one, I'm not a career politician, and I don't play their games. For two, asking for your help has never come easy to me. But I will only have a chance against my radical opponent and her dark money donors if I have your support.

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1ffjlkm53arscl28av9fgd35e6alh6qbhck8rg_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

**The House Majority could very well come down to my race. That means that even just a small donation of ANY amount helps us win or lose. **
_**[I'm personally asking you today, Friend, if you would please consider chipping in just a few bucks.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zha8a5ulq6h77873j0fd4i6q8roadrn1otup09k0_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs "I’m personally asking you today, Friend, if you would please consider chipping in just a few bucks.")**_

---
| | [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm3se15g5fi0d695b4tr9smbng2f0skm6ginqak8_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs "STAND WITH JEN")
---

If everyone reading this gave just a few dollars, then we would be well on our way to DEFENDING both my seat and the House Majority. It is critical that we build the resources we need to have a fighting chance.

Thank you in advance for your support,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2880bno990q6nvv5ctcrm75rspnnqcrtim7dapg_rp22sh2s8i66p73clg6eoj1c5h2bs)
---
Jen Kiggans (VA-02)

name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You’re busy. I’m busy. So I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People’s House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they’re falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big October goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they’d have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679802%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kTQep7M6DK%2bOHHjStAhR9A&sysid=1 "So with all due respect,
I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially
out. We’ve only got days left before the big deadline, so anything you can spare
would be a HUGE help. ")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I’m hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I’m afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I’m pleading for your help right here and now:**
---
| | | [Send In Ten Bucks Now ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679803%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r9ch%2ftAymeYZ2UdiorZwEw&sysid=1 "Send In Ten Bucks Now ")

---
| | | [Send In Fifty Bucks Now ](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/kennedy-all-due-respect-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20231002_WG-AUN.102418_t1395498-1756&ex_tid=20231002_WG-AUN.102418_t1395498-1756&utm_content=tv-au-20231005&xunv=tv-au-20231005 "Send In Fifty Bucks Now ")
---
| | | [Send In More Now ](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/kennedy-all-due-respect-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20231002_WG-AUN.102418_t1395498-1756&ex_tid=20231002_WG-AUN.102418_t1395498-1756&utm_content=tv-au-20231005&xunv=tv-au-20231005 "Send In More Now ")
---
I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you’re probably tired of hearing from us, but we don’t have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679815%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9yzqCnVrML4cOYmb%2fzhP%2fQ&sysid=1 "So in the short time we
have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our
Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: No More Big Spenders in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Don't Need 'Em, Don't Want 'Em
| | | |
---
# We Don't Need Another Big Spender in Congress
---
Dina Titus is a career "tax and spend" politician. Since Titus first entered Congress 15 years ago, Federal debt has grown by $23,000,000,000,000 (that's trillions). That is an average of more than $4 billion every day. That's right, while Titus has been in office, the Federal government has printed, borrowed, and spent $4 billion more each day than what they take in. Average daily borrowing has increased by 3,557% compared to the 232 years before Titus took office.
This is nuts! These numbers are too large to comprehend. We can't keep doing this! The result of big-spending politicians is inflation!
Inflation ravages our household budgets and drains our savings. Gas is once again over $5.00 a gallon. Food prices are up over 17% since Biden started the latest spending spree. Dina Titus brags that she is "ridin' with Biden." That ride is taking our family finances to the brink of bankruptcy.
I'm not suggesting that Titus is solely responsible for this debt. Both Democrats and Republicans have gotten us into this mess. As Oliver Anthony sings: "These rich men north of Richmond Lord knows they all just wanna have total control Wanna know what you think, wanna know what you do And they don't think you know, but I know that you do 'Cause your dollar ain't sh*t and it's taxed to no end 'Cause of rich men north of Richmond." Will the same people who created the problem solve the problem? Of course not. WE NEED A CHANGE! We can no longer afford to send "big spenders" to DC.
So, how can we spot a big spender?
Fortunately, big spenders self-identify. You can spot them because they brag about how much money they spend on their campaigns. People who spend big to get to Washington will surely spend big once they get there.
Don't let them get there!
My campaign is spending a fraction of what my competitors spend. However, we've already raised enough to win the primary. Like the last election when we won the Primary, we won't spend money on expensive TV ads or printed mailers. We will conduct a grass-roots campaign by meeting voters where they live. Our message will be carried throughout the district by an army of volunteers.
I'm not a big spender. I spent 20 years as a financial planner helping individuals and families live within a budget. I will take those same principles to Washington.
We need to get rid of Titus, but let's ensure we don't replace her with another big spender.

---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Specifically, what would you do to reduce inflation? -H.S. A. Politicians will make wild promises to fix everything. The truth is, I will be one of 435 members of the House of Representatives. I can't promise what the other 434 members will do, but here is what I will fight for: First, we must control federal spending and work towards a balanced budget. in 1994 when Republicans took control of the House for the first time in 40 years, we had a balanced budget! We can do it again! Second, we must reduce the regulatory burdens on American businesses. Ronald Reagan was able to accomplish this, and it led to a booming economy that lifted all Americans. Burdensome regulations inflate the cost of everything we buy. Third, we must unleash our country's energy industry. Home-grown energy is cheaper and more reliable. Fourth, we must reduce the size of government so that more resources are available to average Nevadans.
Q. Who are you supporting in the Presidential primary? -T.M. A. I've not yet decided. Regardless of who is president, I will be loyal to the Constitution and the people of Nevada's First Congressional District--not to any one person or party.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

subject: Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.

body:
My first vote as a member of Congress was to reject the certification of the 2020 election.

| | _**Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.**_ This President Trump’s top ally, Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I’m sure you get a lot of texts from fake “conservatives” who claim to be Trump supporters.
I’m sure you get a ton of texts that question your loyalty to our country if you don’t donate.
This might be the 20th email you’ve gotten in the last 24 hours, but I can that this isn’t one of those messages.
_**My first vote in Congress was to reject the certification of the RIGGED 2020 election, and I was the FIRST member of Congress to proudly endorse President Trump for 2024.**_
The DC Swamp that hates your guts hates mine even more.
Democrats have raised $37 million to wipe out every Trump Republican.
[**So today I’m humbly asking for you to chip in just $10 before the day ends.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24634%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k0d1JqDg0cTchoWFWL7XrQ&sysid=1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm under attack
body:
They don't want you to be a part of the fight

| | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f04dedeaf6e430f85845b578635d1bc&_e=07Xqlsf1P0nw8QmBr8wZXH4GKjbcuhfevA4DHOvPs030fTMuL_gSI4iTwQeCjJgFgu9r3dBr5D9UA48hAipB5527GqcX3QxD0dQSDXw_7tLTrocPtRtQ62vwNScRn_XCkmeoqPOeZ0Rp1ShrapNtXFckYWX8-e_t6Hf2-DO2pNTYdSIui0UM8S3dT2ON1ErPH6hVsjNZTWhwVtoHaKXd5oWb4G_RYStYD9CZ9_e5PfgXYjPvGUWNvBTnPiRkNaINT-y8_Zhudfd6Fhil2awXXb5l2JTjBtFt5qeG8bYFN5NT9FizITe4DNYbMa1uRlJA)
---
Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We 're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I 'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f04dedeaf6e430f85845b578635d1bc&_e=07Xqlsf1P0nw8QmBr8wZXH4GKjbcuhfevA4DHOvPs030fTMuL_gSI4iTwQeCjJgFgu9r3dBr5D9UA48hAipB5527GqcX3QxD0dQSDXw_7tLTrocPtRtQ62vwNScRn_XCkmeoqPOeZ0Rp1ShrapNtXL3BH-rgwOlOkBSS3MuAnoo0Num7HpPPGynMZZl4piE_fXVDu9SvGh7RC8te2lJ68IxAveoRsjOxNWpQjZClm8_0O0D9OSafv8fx5t_xJXG8Gq-z5QsysjNW8QAm8dBM6xyITwLBivW43X5nn_BjREem4xTV8KpoLblnyZ8wmPYd)

# THURSDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1931, Clyde Pangborn and Hugh Herndon completed the world's first non-stop trans-Pacific flight. The trip from Japan to Washington state took 41 hours and covered more than 5,500 miles. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FurDAQQNGvMZ1Xw4AxFC5eQ7evTYmMGcNExkZmtFH-PtrU6Y90dT-ey9Nz4rz_9yc5iWXxQfhFSwvaaOwWbDYXiZC6hlw7TIMBO4x9czgTt3H0lkyYaAXoxhAtrIjBbr3HODXsELBrAQxMpm_xYe2AYNBY2Np2jaR6oI2l1Mdn4SwHxfRdXlQfoZxNcofIdavun8JZ4XzzeaW34Ly_gcK50knnSpXzruUgHbneonPJt5RLS_X5vnzgyEHHxPshCuemuu364pT4HqzqYT89p9-g_Ln_EwAA__8zbV2u)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, [you can do that here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdG57N9bgZvqFtZGaNLfGkPOTUKJoi3R2Kl6y_9w_d2na6sVR-3V94k97VNvHQ9ZHJwiif0E9qSVxEUbyU7GilConOw98yOqYBDH0dh5kBciEIk5nlx43y2mhHQO4AIYwwOh5QIIWJMUJybVzEBpGhv-_De9NHvstafdsg-LG2zNf-PBi_GX776ZvxLALvn8vGtteonJRPgtrHWv7c_lfwGAAD__1fbSWw)

|
---
## Jordan, Scalise Vie to be Next Speaker
The race to be the next House speaker has [two announced candidates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQAL_GdEbrNYakcPEaurz2SmTjJXbOYIQ34e7vT7n66pFGo_m4TTeXctru_91KlpcyuZnTiyYF0kjUEzbBLkRIuiGr-mtvYOgvXROtXlwI0JEi0t577UnP5uIGoztHiNQki4BaARi4mk5hOww9gkEzQFDKLyQ6oJC4HO2jpI0jLfm7vOho57I22UbmvQr9T-AocDzPs503P7-hwPGtFjgqEDhCJ3CM5VlJ1p3cJx3SO-ZMMpLjKp-75OO57vJRjuA2WWeXUyWZNsmR5Jq-2shrbg4b9jPlnGo_iA7uq0v5t4X_PPMTAAD__4yvZM0) to replace ousted Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan and Majority Leader Steve Scalise both said they want the job. Other names being floated include [Tom Emmer and Kevin Hern,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ4HFsGzoEhjd2lTOojLuTkUB8gZ3z6T1Kn_4p_5Pu7T3VGk_fHuNrQ1pMn5Si-cpOCag5qgWWxABFQNWmkGo0Vvbl2zWhNAKhVcdwtq1sscZnNTwnunZFA4DA1ZEKCkEFoMupPQ9r0BoUH3YpFyDsg6gQvVlNvPRHtdMcQrvTC3Pm1NtGutR2HqjcHIYDzPsw3pe8ez_HYG45EiVfKFwRjSV-aRnhgv7tNecV8wF57xiM4j37x3ua4XLwe6J-Ym2-U4KUYqpmedeGyO4t-1_mvwEwAA__8Fh1-5) and several Republicans even weighed in on drafting Donald Trump for the job. Trump has said he's focused solely on his race for president.

The House recessed after voting McCarthy out of office but will return next week to hear from candidates on Tuesday and [move to a vote on Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1iXH0MyMHTxlq4dLQyX-FbERBjH7dtXztzlDOdIR5--r9t085RpvX_6B7qWyuRDoxdOAvjApZpkF11ClKg6dMJczQDWXHS3OESV0AgNwV6TCcqbNAeVtI1g5iAvHTkJUgmAAa6DFrK31kgY5GAhCjEnZBowUiu1_y60tgVT_i0vrH0ojy67pbXnxtQHkyOT43EcfcW9Yd3O_WxKzZHJcd_ewZeyb8h9rJQar_jc50zBrxtPdF8aP595W5AqX_Gn8Yw-YuUnIxfAQTM5dtXF50E502Ys03B_eMpvnPavnL8AAAD__17_ZgI). It took 15 ballots before McCarthy won the speakership vote last time.
## Billionaire Michael Jordan Joins Forbes 400
Michael Jordan became the first athlete to join the Forbes 400 list of richest people, with a [net worth estimated at $3 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyqzAQAL9GdGJOJwR2oeI1dH5tSkagwzpHIEZSTPz3GadOt8UWO_txm26OI-_3_24jW9c0uaXykyYF0kjUEzberkRIuiGr-mtvYOgvXROsRqUQLzQY0t2MdAVPfsXOOzDke2rYIqBWAAauplPYDkOPYNAM4JWaVxIdkOeacvtIvNdAa3ylJ-V2SVsTbaj1KEL_EzgKHM_zbNf0PX8V3qmUtyNwLEfKtQgcN16CoygfKXu3y819UpGBS035JXeq8ky5BpnJLYGK1HLmGDntTbb-ON9c-kF0cN8cx9-A-ueOnwAAAP__BBljQw). That's still a far cry from the top of the list, headed by the world's richest man, Bernard Arnault, owner of the LVMH fashion empire, with a net worth of $211 billion. Elon Musk is second, at $180 billion, followed by Jeff Bezos at $114 billion. Forbes reports that total net worth among billionaires is down overall, a victim of falling stocks and rising interest rates. Musk dropped to No. 2 from No. 1 due to his acquisition of Twitter. [You can see the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljHmYN6YOjiLV07Wjg-4quwiTCK1b-v0jnre9KT3vd1ukbJst-_4sahpTLFW5MnTwYudMF-Qr2ExIzcaw7GDY7Auw-r1-Aj9GR9cuzIIi1upjlFg94M6JMlLQEBewNAMJA12HnvEAjJw2LMnFhZ4EVaqd1Pkb2tnPJveXLtbmXTOaytPQ7VfyocFY7neXap1JmPl1Y4zpKzlD1K5UPhqGtYHueLHc4rC_ctSv4vtbdffwEAAP__2qtNXg), sortable by categories.

## Gallup: Most Want Brands to Avoid Politics
A new Gallup Poll shows that [nearly 60% of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFywyAQheHTSB0atBIQFRRp3DltSg2ClbU2Ag-srfj2GadO9RWvefN_n-ezo0jp8uV2tLzm2XmmJ869FErAMEMb7IoIOLRoez1pJY3-GNvNeqUWMINGhMUjTuBdb_TiR1yDnEJoyYKEoZdSyUmNPXTGaJAKlJGh75cVm1FiIM6lu2ZKvOEaX_mJpfN5b6PdmO-1GT4bODVwOo6jW_NPwqO-9wZOOwZyb901F-KXcDsW8i5VEXJiwRulm1gelRLWilWwu6G450hM3kVRs6c37JLHKvyjFEws8ImJa1tsuB8UI1VtmlFedkfx7xj_m-k3AAD__-OQbck) don't think businesses should take a public stand on current political and social issues. That opposition is up from 52% last year, indicating growing resistance to the trend. Only 37% of Americans think businesses should take a public stand on LGBTQ+ issues, 45% on racial matters, 39% on gun laws, 26% on abortion, 19% on political candidates, and 15% on religion. Gallup reports in its demographic breakdowns that younger Americans are the most in favor of business taking social stands, and Democrats favor it more than Republicans. ([See Survey Results)](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAUAL8GOxx4CmpBkcbu0qZ0AJ_eSxAc4M7k7zNJ2rS7zc6-3ZabpUBxf7UHmrqlxfpKT1yk4IpDt0Czmg0RsGvQSD1pJQY99s3deOzcCFaKUU5KTz065_yolbJeelRTQwYEdFIIJSbVS2iHQYNQoAaxSuk2ZL3AlWrK7XuiWO-4ha_0xNz6dDTB3Gs9C-teGMwM5ohXaXcbwuP88QzmdFKkFBnMf5jBrKTses1g3vDCzO2BmbyNhTvrP7h7FIpYChZ-2ZXizv0jZ4yV4xNjLa0t52eTzXpeFAIVPbBe7Iel8FtU__3zHQAA__8nzGgT)

On this date in 1931, Clyde Pangborn and Hugh Herndon completed the world's first non-stop trans-Pacific flight. The trip from Japan to Washington state took 41 hours and covered more than 5,500 miles. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . Finally, if you'd like to help The Flyover stick around, check out our sponsor today: "NativePath". | Jordan, Scalise Vie to be Next Speaker The race to be the next House speaker has to replace ousted Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan and Majority Leader Steve Scalise both said they want the job. Other names being floated include and several Republicans even weighed in on drafting Donald Trump for the job. Trump has said he's focused solely on his race for president. The House recessed after voting McCarthy out of office but will return next week to hear from candidates on Tuesday and . It took 15 ballots before McCarthy won the speakership vote last time. Billionaire Michael Jordan Joins Forbes 400 Michael Jordan became the first athlete to join the Forbes 400 list of richest people, with a . That's still a far cry from the top of the list, headed by the world's richest man, Bernard Arnault, owner of the LVMH fashion empire, with a net worth of $211 billion. Elon Musk is second, at $180 billion, followed by Jeff Bezos at $114 billion. Forbes reports that total net worth among billionaires is down overall, a victim of falling stocks and rising interest rates. Musk dropped to No. 2 from No. 1 due to his acquisition of Twitter. , sortable by categories. Gallup: Most Want Brands to Avoid Politics A new Gallup Poll shows that don't think businesses should take a public stand on current political and social issues. That opposition is up from 52% last year, indicating growing resistance to the trend. Only 37% of Americans think businesses should take a public stand on LGBTQ+ issues, 45% on racial matters, 39% on gun laws, 26% on abortion, 19% on political candidates, and 15% on religion. Gallup reports in its demographic breakdowns that younger Americans are the most in favor of business taking social stands, and Democrats favor it more than Republicans. ### Dear Friend,

The launch of the WisGOP Farm Team Training Program has been a huge success! We have already been to De Pere and River Falls, and are looking forward to traveling across WI some more! **We are bringing together experts in the field of running for office and organizing neighborhoods just for you.** We want you there! We are working hard to build a pipeline of conservative leaders who will strengthen the conservative outreach in Wisconsin, and help affect more positive change in our communities. _**We cannot do this alone, and we need you to step up and join the team! **_
So, whether you're a potential candidate, elected official, member of a local county party, or just an interested conservative looking to do more in their county, _**please consider joining us this week and beyond!**_ [RSVP](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlyjduy-didthutlhu-y/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlyjduy-didthutlhu-j/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlyjduy-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlyjduy-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlyjduy-didthutlhu-d/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. body:
You won’t believe what Democrats are pushing now
My first vote as a member of Congress was to reject the certification of the 2020 election.

| | _**Steve Bannon: There 's very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.**_ This President Trump's top ally, Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I'm sure you get a lot of texts from fake "conservatives" who claim to be Trump supporters.
I'm sure you get a ton of texts that question your loyalty to our country if you don't donate.

_**My first vote in Congress was to reject the certification of the RIGGED 2020 election, and I was the FIRST member of Congress to proudly endorse President Trump for 2024.**_
The DC Swamp that hates your guts hates mine even more.
