name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Monarch butterflies need your help if they’re going to survive migration this fall
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **The presence of monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds dropped 22% in just one year. Donate $27 now to protect them and the planet before it’s too late!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032874?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032875?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032876?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Right now, monarchs are preparing to make their epic migration to their wintering grounds in Mexico. But I have devastating news to share:
**In just the last year, the presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds DROPPED 22%.** And we could see further declines this winter. The weedkiller glyphosate -- found in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup -- is harming monarch butterflies and contributing to their decline. But it’s still the most widely used pesticide in the world. We need to get glyphosate out of our environment before monarchs are gone forever. [**Stand up to Bayer-Monsanto before monarchs are wiped out forever! Donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,200 goal for monarchs and the planet.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032877?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Monarch butterflies are in serious trouble. Greedy Big Pesticide corporations like Bayer-Monsanto continue to profit from butterfly-harming pesticides. Glyphosate is decimating milkweed. And milkweed is the only food source for young monarch caterpillars. **With milkweed plants disappearing, we’re seeing devastating declines in monarch populations.**
This is serious, Friend. So serious that the International Union for Conservation of Nature has **declared monarch butterflies ENDANGERED!** Why, then, is Bayer-Monsanto still producing Roundup? The answer is simple: Big Pesticide corporations care more about lining their pockets than saving monarchs and our planet. We can fight back. But not without your help. Will you stand with us today?
**Don't let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet and help us reach our $4,200 goal.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032874?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032875?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032876?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Monarchs' migration patterns are uniquely impressive. They travel around 3,000 miles every year, providing invaluable pollination along the way.
But the use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup has dramatically increased in recent decades, putting monarchs at risk. From 1987 to 2016, usage increased by over 2,600%! Why does this matter? Well, Roundup is killing off the only food monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. Without milkweed, it is **nearly impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive.** But Bayer-Monsanto continues to mercilessly put its profits from Roundup over pollinators, people, and the planet.
And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- one-third with levels deadly to monarchs. Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed. **Their first meal may be their last.**
The dangers don't end there, Friend. Glyphosate is a probable carcinogen. It is also associated with **reproductive harm** in humans, along with**disruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease.** Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to high rates of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma linked to the Roundup they've used on their farms and lawns. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late.
**Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect monarchs, people, and our planet. Donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,200 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032874?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032875?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032876?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. **Monarch populations are in freefall. The time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save.**
At Friends of the Earth, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet.
With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 8 people in your area today that helps us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides with your membership gift of $27 or more?
**Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2032873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | The presence of monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds dropped 22% in just one year. Donate $27 now to protect them and the planet before it’s too late! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == Right now, monarchs are preparing to make their epic migration to their wintering grounds in Mexico. But I have devastating news to share: In just the last year, the presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds DROPPED 22%. And we could see further declines this winter. The weedkiller glyphosate -- found in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup -- is harming monarch butterflies and contributing to their decline. But it’s still the most widely used pesticide in the world. We need to get glyphosate out of our environment before monarchs are gone forever. == Monarch butterflies are in serious trouble. Greedy Big Pesticide corporations like Bayer-Monsanto continue to profit from butterfly-harming pesticides. Glyphosate is decimating milkweed. And milkweed is the only food source for young monarch caterpillars. With milkweed plants disappearing, we’re seeing devastating declines in monarch populations. This is serious, Friend. So serious that the International Union for Conservation of Nature has declared monarch butterflies ENDANGERED! Why, then, is Bayer-Monsanto still producing Roundup? The answer is simple: Big Pesticide corporations care more about lining their pockets than saving monarchs and our planet. We can fight back. But not without your help. Will you stand with us today? Don't let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet and help us reach our $4,200 goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Monarchs' migration patterns are uniquely impressive. They travel around 3,000 miles every year, providing invaluable pollination along the way. But the use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup has dramatically increased in recent decades, putting monarchs at risk. From 1987 to 2016, usage increased by over 2,600%! Why does this matter? Well, Roundup is killing off the only food monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. Without milkweed, it is nearly impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive. But Bayer-Monsanto continues to mercilessly put its profits from Roundup over pollinators, people, and the planet. And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- one-third with levels deadly to monarchs. Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed. Their first meal may be their last. The dangers don't end there, Friend. Glyphosate is a probable carcinogen. It is also associated with reproductive harm in humans, along withdisruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to high rates of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma linked to the Roundup they've used on their farms and lawns. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late. Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect monarchs, people, and our planet. Donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,200 goal! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Monarch populations are in freefall. The time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save. At Friends of the Earth, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet. With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 8 people in your area today that helps us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides with your membership gift of $27 or more? Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

**BRING. IT. ON.** I'm a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who flipped a Democrat-held seat Red in 2022 and helped restore the Republican House Majority, so I have the courage to fight back!

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Election Day in Memphis is TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
October 5, 2023
Dear Friend,
Election Day is TODAY in Memphis! Let's bring the blue wave to the 901.
Tennessee Voter Project has endorsed a slate of candidates who are committed to addressing the root causes of crime, investing in public transit, and strengthening our infrastructure. This election is historic--a coalition of labor, advocates, and progressive elected leaders have united behind Van Turner for Mayor and a slate of candidates who will advance policies that benefit the most vulnerable in our community, not just special interests.
We hope you'll get out and vote for our endorsed candidates (below and on our website [https://www.tennesseevoterproject.com/901endorsements] ). Polls open at 7 AM and close at 7 PM. You can find your voting location here [https://electionsshelbytn.gov/polling-location-and-complete-district-information] .
https://www.tennesseevoterproject.com/901endorsements [https://www.tennesseevoterproject.com/901endorsements]
SUPPORT TENNESSEE VOTER PROJECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Your voice matters, and your vote is your opportunity to make a difference in Memphis. In this crucial election, your vote can help to elect leaders that will focus on poverty, public safety, and opportunity for all Memphians.
We'll see you (and a few friends, we hope) at the polls!
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

It is dedicated to growing the number of registered voters and supporting Democratic candidates. The time is now to register more voters and prepare for the next election. If you would like to support TVP, checks, made payable to TN Voter Project, can be mailed to us at POB 40551, Memphis, TN 38174 or please go on-line today at www.tennesseevoterproject.com. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm under attack
body:
They don't want you to be a part of the fight

| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq7i6ssn63akkqah5mt9ng4t5qep8t6u9o2dr24g_rp22sh2s8i66p73clh68oj6chh2bs)
---
Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zldj31k38buldso9712nk88g44m1lca3aipbaru0_rp22sh2s8i66p73clh68oj6chh2bs)

The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: _**FOR THEM!**_ I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: _**FOR YOU!**_ I’ve got more enemies than ever, just because I won’t bend the knee. **Stand with me.** **[RUSH an emergency donation. ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq6qpcep6n3pg45fqnncvf6osrftjrkdfn6hp878_rp22sh2s8i66p73clh68oj6chh2bs)** Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand Trump be put in jail for endangering trial witnesses and workers
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Put Trump in jail for endangering trial witnesses and workers. Stop giving him special treatment](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4690c64-b34b-4a45-8f5a-c25438b8f150/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb7bcb94-23a9-4012-9ca5-e258027b6eeb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | If Trump were anyone else, he'd be in jail already. On a near daily basis, he's been spewing dangerous lies about trial witnesses and workers, lies meant to whip his supporters into a frenzy, and put their safety and even lives at risk. [**It's time to put a comprehensive gag order on Trump, and put him in jail the next time he violates it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T894594f1-5530-4fb4-8dd9-f86acf2d8fa9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump knows exactly what he is doing, when he attacks the judges, prosecutors, witnesses, and anyone else who might help make him pay for his crimes. He is ensuring they feel the wrath of his followers, and trying to scare them into backing off. That's not how this works. Trump has been charged with crimes, and there are restraints on what he can say and do. He's got every right to talk about the trials, but he does not have the right to make a fair trial impossible through threats, lies, and intimidation. **Any normal person would already be in jail for contempt of court or some similar offense. It's time to stop giving Trump special treatment.** [**Add your name: it's time to put Trump in jail**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82fcf6e2-30c1-4e59-bd83-88b7375b9c38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4334815-5da1-47ba-b87d-15566fe39bce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T721f2260-b808-4c30-a4b4-eac2221bd89c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm under attack
body:

| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zanmf3jffrh0fu6dfv4aip77chfrs59ppadcprl8_rp22sh2s8i66p73clh68or6cjh2bs)
---
Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z505agree5orp2221najih2ul25u2o6ngv7k7vpg_rp22sh2s8i66p73clh68or6cjh2bs)

body:

Prayer Meeting, Trump Doral Oct 12 at 6:00pm Eastern with General Flynn, Roger Stone and Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
Dear Christians, Friends and Patriots, We hope this message finds you well. We have some exciting news to share! On October 12th, we are gathering at the Trump Doral for a special prayer call that you won't want to miss. Join us for this momentous event featuring renowned figures like Jackson Lahmeyer, Roger Stone, General Flynn, and Flyover Conservatives. Together, we will unite in prayer, seeking a successful legal outcome for President Trump amidst the challenges he faces. Despite these hurdles, we have thrilling news to report: President Trump is surging in the polls and is expected to make a triumphant return in 2024. Our collective efforts can play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our great nation. We encourage you to stand with us in prayer and take action to safeguard America's future. Let's come together in faith, unity, and determination. Your presence and prayers matter. To register for this event and be part of this powerful moment, please click on the link [here](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=vvxkmef0091wzskwyn&linkid=1&link=d3f3254bebfe4957a0c31e3ab1149bf7). Can't make it in person? No worries! You can still be part of the action by tuning in to the live broadcast on Rumble. Just visit[ www.rumble.com/flyoverconservatives](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=vvxkmef0091wzskwyn&linkid=2&link=d36a5e9e81c342299cbcf24c78de5fb8) to watch it all unfold. Thank you for your unwavering support, and we look forward to praying alongside you as we work together to ensure a brighter future for America. God bless you, and God bless the United States of America! Sincerely, Jackson Lahmeyer Pastors For Trump

body:

Fellow American,

Coming into this race as an outsider, I knew that I would be met with opposition and viewed as a threat. It's become clear to me, now more than ever, just how much they view our movement as a threat to the system. _This_ is what we are fighting against.

> _**First**_ , the Establishment spread hit pieces and lies about me and what I stand for. A Super PAC even went as far as to suggest their puppet take a “sledgehammer” to me during the debate.
>
> _**Then**_ , their puppets took their shots at me at the first and second debates. They can't stand that I am in this race **_and_** outperforming them.
>
> _**Now**_ , in the spirit of free speech and open debate, I was going to have a healthy sparring with candidate Chris Christie. However, I was threatened to be banned from future official debates if I went forward in simply having a discussion with him.

| [** FIGHT AGAINST THE CULTURE OF FEAR **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=20ffff739fce4fc8849674b1d5f82e24&_e=Px0B983dR4Uh6pXosja3EwnvrfQuRnZza2FaXnSekErmQpdunhHD6ZqxN6uQt9H_DDg6d3wZ8g9R75QE8T8jqF03DZrygFmlpeTaRqmgnRAec9aSoRHsInE2TMPCxHKORCN1FfOqI0eTfcJx3qyRbnNys1xif2LLudd2wAiGC3jFCc-iox06q-njTECphzQ489TTujbpqCqRsmxVYfWW41bVb1D5j0AS71pGyQDFhNW1BBFe9HBbs13yoIU6fkbULOYuQ9Zutdx3jDVAZWCM7ayNmjq-e-oDLH5MB3vIowXY_JPVLVoC9p7Ljq-ToYPooct76W0oIpgrLDSImNq-Ifl9r8_2BxKjj0klihBV4gASM4mYpFH8Qzk0i_5aKa_xQHhDio1n-f-NvDUXg4enGd6DFTsDZJavvHsj1O424AU%3D)
---

The mega donor plan was to have just one pet candidate take on Trump and now they're losing their minds since that plot failed.

Instead of allowing open dialogue and the airing of ideas to give primary voters a real choice, the Establishment would rather cut backroom deals and offer up phony debates, including candidates with no viable path and questions that no voter would ever ask. The Establishment was hellbent on taking down Trump. Now they're hellbent on propping up their favored puppets.

**_Here's a novel idea_ : stop trying to beat Trump and start standing on your own two feet with a better platform for a more prosperous America. **

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=20ffff739fce4fc8849674b1d5f82e24&_e=Px0B983dR4Uh6pXosja3EwnvrfQuRnZza2FaXnSekErmQpdunhHD6ZqxN6uQt9H_DDg6d3wZ8g9R75QE8T8jqF03DZrygFmlpeTaRqmgnRAec9aSoRHsInE2TMPCxHKORCN1FfOqI0eTfcJx3qyRbnNys1xif2LLudd2wAiGC3jFCc-iox06q-njTECphzQ489TTujbpqCqRsmxVYfWW41bVb1D5j0AS71pGyQDFhNW1BBFe9HBbs13yoIU6fkbU_xWhUGR-j6ymRvXdJ775dflxz9GpMShHPPlB6n3OHOtAxIsjJK-ZW7SJpQQXLpVqo3lxAGwdRKgv3Ep_nvugEzZoL8vnRpINmKKQ1f2nHxn8qcyv09QI6Va7pjyQZ6oxUPv4GwsqFMDX9xaF65F-CPIQoHdnNmaENyw4vkGXmk8%3D)

---

The Establishment operates under a culture of fear. That you won't know any better between what they tell you and what you actively see, an illusion of choice. We won't let them get away with it. **[Fellow American, our revolution will march on and show them we won't be a sponsor of their intimidation- stand with me today.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=20ffff739fce4fc8849674b1d5f82e24&_e=Px0B983dR4Uh6pXosja3EwnvrfQuRnZza2FaXnSekErmQpdunhHD6ZqxN6uQt9H_DDg6d3wZ8g9R75QE8T8jqF03DZrygFmlpeTaRqmgnRAec9aSoRHsInE2TMPCxHKORCN1FfOqI0eTfcJx3qyRbnNys1xif2LLudd2wAiGC3jFCc-iox06q-njTECphzQ489TTujbpqCqRsmxVYfWW41bVb1D5j0AS71pGyQDFhNW1BBFe9HBbs13yoIU6fkbU4c0FGJUSIC2YF5PIRxL6juzi5um9xAoU1fsAfNQeGsyCL5fCC3ZCmvksizH7djvSObRgKl6zKCt5F9EwvPgCNxFZaedEDG6U7aQHigsnO_L3YW80iI7_YykkUNDGGE5Bm2_-M0qIA-QGMfOOxIelOT0C56Vb16gW4vSCypbrMGc%3D)**

Thank you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

As the Radical Democrats are forcing me to stand trial as a completely innocent man, I’ve had to listen to New York’s Democrat Attorney General try and **DEVALUE** my beautiful home of Mar-a-Lago by **_99%_**.
---
_This is nothing more than the continuation of the greatest witch hunt our country has ever seen! _

---
But while the Democrats attempt to strip me of my rights and my properties of their value, I’d like YOU to come see my home for yourself at my next Mar-a-Lago reception to commemorate being nearly **1 YEAR OUT** from the most important election in the history of our country – _**_and I’ll let YOU be the judge of Mar-a-Lago’s value!_**___

---
One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown out to attend this special reception at the end of the month – and to really make it special, we’ll even take a picture together and you’ll get a MAGA hat signed by me.

---
Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on me...

---
_...All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount to WIN BACK the White House and SAVE our country in 2024 to be automatically entered to win._

name: Shift WA
subject: Exposing Inslee's Gas Price Hypocrisy
body:
Jay Inslee is quick to point fingers, place blame on oil companies, and claim price gouging. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62329746:WwZGYQiIN:m:1:2610672541:29830F3F9ED3014DE268C7FBD967A3B4:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

We're facing a unique challenge: skyrocketing gas prices caused solely by state regulations. To meet this challenge, Governor Jay Inslee is quick to point fingers, place blame on oil companies, and claim price gouging. He's even demanding legislation to increase his access to these companies' books because he currently has no facts to back up his off-base accusations.

Of course, that's not the real reason behind the unprecedented gas prices, and Inslee knows it. So does the mainstream media.

The truth is that the exorbitant gas prices burdening working families across our state are a direct result of Inslee's flawed cap-and-tax policies. Cap-and-tax took effect at the start of the year, sending gas prices surging over 50 cents per gallon - just as predicted in Shift last year - and putting Washington first in the nation in gas prices for weeks this summer. It's clear that the policies championed by the governor are directly impacting our wallets.

Yet, ironically, the same Democrats responsible for these failed policies are attempting to conceal the truth from the very people they claim to represent. During the last legislative session, Democrats introduced SB 5766 to prevent consumers from learning about the consequences of their actions by banning companies from disclosing the new carbon tax separately on consumer invoices.

The hypocrisy is astounding.

Our friends at Future 42 have brilliantly illustrated the reality behind Inslee's attempts to deflect responsibility for the crisis we face.

Your support is crucial in unveiling the truth and holding those in power accountable. **[Please consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 today.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62329747:WwZGYQiIN:m:1:2610672541:29830F3F9ED3014DE268C7FBD967A3B4:r)**

[**Together, we can ensure transparency, protect our wallets, and advocate for policies that actually benefit the people of our great state.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62329747:WwZGYQiIN:m:1:2610672541:29830F3F9ED3014DE268C7FBD967A3B4:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62329748:WwZGYQiIN:m:1:2610672541:29830F3F9ED3014DE268C7FBD967A3B4:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14310628&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWwZGYQiIN).
---

subject: Accountability is Coming in 2024!

Fellow Patriot, **Almost everyone comes to DC with good intentions... but far too often, they lose their way and cave to corruption.** The DC Swamp is controlled by the ruling class that ensures career politicians continue to answer to special interest, **NOT We the People.** **This is why I am a strong supporter of term limits in the US Senate.** Tim Kaine has spent decades in elected public office. He has completely lost his way and has caved numerous times to political corruption.
While many other Democrats are returning or donating money they received by indicted and corrupt Sen. Bob Menendez, Tim Kaine refuses to return or donate the the corrupt money. We need transparency now! We need accountability now! subject: Marcy Kaptur is Joe Biden’s biggest fan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Riedel For Ohio](craigriedelforcongress
body:
| | | [](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=dc3eb35b89d24a65851474b779bad6dc&_e=iJyL7U3jsRncSW3OcL0CR19lIE05SoPw9mnPZ4_29zIbdPoHQm_Mi6JW4VujiuXsK6oUafba45EtWGn7ISldnAcENiMCHmPX5oqbyZXVaxKbnFUrpSQ65E8aqA_q8RtO59dtZsL18fg4YbnoIiGBGyIqb0z2eu8-vgwbNVBgF54SnxdVfJTsJxatgSC7WGLmNnC-wi8laoVErJwFmdZTWvtQIToVNypxwc2XjZD8x9ko8cpgN2QSWYObq4gbfQyWqTQ2fbrGex-fgtfk3gBEC5oc8Pyur60Ud2mJxTfwFjqgzL2qMi57lucxh8juBZEayM3TEDc_GvIFPnpAcv2Cog2VjOBcDWiFp85XDbfY8D5eDgLUw6uX27BSwjfkpb2N)
---
My friend, Joe Biden is a bad president. He may be the worst in modern history—certainly in my lifetime. If you take a walk down to your local grocery store or main street, you’ll see why. Businesses are struggling to keep their doors open, families can’t keep up with their weekly grocery bills, and filling up your tank is like watching your wallet drain. **[Click here if you think Joe Biden is the worst president in American history.>>](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=dc3eb35b89d24a65851474b779bad6dc&_e=iJyL7U3jsRncSW3OcL0CR19lIE05SoPw9mnPZ4_29zIbdPoHQm_Mi6JW4VujiuXsK6oUafba45EtWGn7ISldnAcENiMCHmPX5oqbyZXVaxKbnFUrpSQ65E8aqA_q8RtO59dtZsL18fg4YbnoIiGBGyIqb0z2eu8-vgwbNVBgF54SnxdVfJTsJxatgSC7WGLmNnC-wi8laoVErJwFmdZTWohr61p8G863ckq4yVuRnjEH3n0m81cS_0v7RzQgVmZMbshimHH62PtTo_1JvT2Z1ochF2owB1t-qdGbdEigF9O8mORQDPWGaAuudBr5CnoklUnEcohQW2_lVGey3JyjYRyifknUq9dKVnigGevvliO5i8ruDcIrRKppA-uSnfHd)** **That’s the harsh reality for Ohioans, but not everyone is living in it. Marcy Kaptur thinks Joe Biden is a great president. She’s on record as saying:**
---
[](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=dc3eb35b89d24a65851474b779bad6dc&_e=iJyL7U3jsRncSW3OcL0CR19lIE05SoPw9mnPZ4_29zIbdPoHQm_Mi6JW4VujiuXsK6oUafba45EtWGn7ISldnAcENiMCHmPX5oqbyZXVaxKbnFUrpSQ65E8aqA_q8RtO59dtZsL18fg4YbnoIiGBGyIqb0z2eu8-vgwbNVBgF54SnxdVfJTsJxatgSC7WGLmNnC-wi8laoVErJwFmdZTWgwerdoXFfFQwnBgIf-_iqTDqJPK1UwrurHi66GWeD4ll8l3TyEBdkod5ETb2f8v7Hv_tZd3jqn_EwwIW8nEiG7Mz1H1doM7y5wZ3uZmg96BZrNIRObw-i-9D-7sDRAWSUKCyiegOuWGMB6rkpOxlDeIJ3twbb5QY5CHiZWOngHL)
---
Marcy's been part of the Washington scene for far too long (40 years!). She’s voted lockstep with Biden, making it clear that she's lost touch with the real issues facing Ohioans. **My friend, the folks of Ohio’s 9th Congressional District deserve a representative who truly gets it—someone who understands our challenges—to step in and make a difference. ** **[That’s why I’m running to unseat Marcy Kaptur. That’s the first step to shaking up the system. Will you join us in this fight?](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=dc3eb35b89d24a65851474b779bad6dc&_e=iJyL7U3jsRncSW3OcL0CR19lIE05SoPw9mnPZ4_29zIbdPoHQm_Mi6JW4VujiuXsK6oUafba45EtWGn7ISldnAcENiMCHmPX5oqbyZXVaxKbnFUrpSQ65E8aqA_q8RtO59dtZsL18fg4YbnoIiGBGyIqb0z2eu8-vgwbNVBgF54SnxdVfJTsJxatgSC7WGLmNnC-wi8laoVErJwFmdZTWjiSaOuMb33k9IbXOwakGPwpV3hAIGSwWupbqSd94lCvRTVZjvuiyimZzS2i_OPPns7ndQOlBFoCKsIXhy2Q8G1cspkkeWR2OsceTgqEDouNo0Y_OPNugzuefva1ZaaqeA4Du5BapImrE7WHR2IqHzi47E8HOm4ziFfttx-3WbA7)**
---
[**HELP CRAIG BEAT MARCY**](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=dc3eb35b89d24a65851474b779bad6dc&_e=iJyL7U3jsRncSW3OcL0CR19lIE05SoPw9mnPZ4_29zIbdPoHQm_Mi6JW4VujiuXsK6oUafba45EtWGn7ISldnAcENiMCHmPX5oqbyZXVaxKbnFUrpSQ65E8aqA_q8RtO59dtZsL18fg4YbnoIiGBGyIqb0z2eu8-vgwbNVBgF54SnxdVfJTsJxatgSC7WGLmNnC-wi8laoVErJwFmdZTWj8TVDaVPip0QLiLBV_tDp3ggSMfKX4n0UtZlKDp6Uv4kdGzE6egEmJQGoXHHfKbZQpFo7pBL8jWBzAsrsm-j-Ea-VoBujWB3xLjYZdLn4HB31pJvZSEx_7rKd40MsRUsxPw-cVExvEPC_Xne_3oaGqTPyyUIP2iJu5cpCwduqA-)

subject: Chuck Schumer's Worst Nightmare

Peter - last week I emailed you asking for help ahead of our 3rd quarter fundraising deadline and I wanted to update you on the result.

I got the final number back from my team this week, and it looks like _we came up just short of hitting the mark._

[**So today, just 48 hours out from our first weekly deadline of the fourth quarter, could you pitch in a couple of bucks to help me catch up?**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=d618f380b3d643f18b5a322a41c31e85&_e=ojOexNINo3ZZqdAQkakh4teuyFurXjR1D1Fsip0PVRWwdSGuIuTEA26K-VMzrWv6aY_ij_m2uy3XmxHySADj5e7iPqkOTS1ZdXLgI9ptBQSSbMJ4QnTypP6_k4jLs5mzh1eWobU6cU3iM9gPuFfMjkluBgzfxG3atIFQ_bX3j1iTZB2cBh0hA24DezE_NG2-0hkyEbXUZez23GgLZ3TCNpaLys4lPbTBzLseCovLzm6LKUFGe4XjufcGUpkUT6cs2e4cQc_x2pKoqXtCD5a0ODP8bVe5jhc-eJeUUiYUrRcV87GHfoKi7EC9ziexJF4ZfUQp8MiD7B6myHxiaIEdD0d329oMwI2sWlP_ZKv5x6E_U6VNpi0rHnRhZo0PpttQWZcwfzqLavq6DS_YwWYDdA%3D%3D)

Every dollar makes a difference in a race like this one, and missing our goal has huge repercussions on our success. I need to put up a strong number – please help me before it’s too late.

Thank you and God bless,
Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *

name: Jordan
subject: Let's take a look at the end of September, and then a peek to October
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Rush a donation to help All On The Line TODAY!
|
---

Friend, last month was a pretty busy month for democracy, and this month is no different. We’re so proud of our team and people like you for keeping the fight for fair maps very much alive. When you donate to All On the Line, you help us continue to play a key role in protecting our future. **So, let's take a look at what’s happened in redistricting during September and what we are looking ahead to this month.**
**In September,**
* The North Carolina Senate and House Committees on Redistricting met daily for public hearings from September 25 through 27.
* The Ohio Redistricting Commission hosted public hearings on September 25th and 26th.

**And in October,**
* Parties in _Milligan v. Allen_ , a Section 2 challenge to Alabama’s congressional map, had the opportunity to state their objections to the court-appointed special master’s remedial maps during a hearing on October 3rd. The imminent release of the court’s decision on the new remedial map could be released any day now, holding significant implications for fair representation in Alabama.

**Last but not least,**
* There are only 33 days until Election Day!

[**We have lots to look forward to. As we look ahead, we are reminded how much work there is left to achieve the fairest maps, and the fairest elections. Will you rush a donation to All On The Line Today and help us reach our $15,000 end-of-month goal?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70974664/430889029/644932722?refcode=20231005_AOTL_F_EOM3_RedLite_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzMjk1YzFjLTdmNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7TbbBP2wgVwp3_BrcLIqrmb1x_3V9c6cKNyQ4LmvtlI=)

body:

**BREAKING FROM POLITICO:**
**_Biden administration proposes to close loophole on background checks_**

Friend, America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic. There have been nearly 500 mass shootings in 2023 _alone_. Our children and communities are living in fear of gun assailants and violence every day. **But it doesn't have to be this way.**
There are simple gun safety reforms that _we know_ will curb gun violence and make our communities safer. The vast majority of Americans support basic reforms like expanded background checks.

name: Greg Stamps
subject: The Moral Case for Capitalism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-k5aVwzxct9VA)
---
| | Dear Friend,Capitalism has become an easy target in recent years—especially among young people and the media. They often argue that it creates significant inequality and doesn’t do enough to help the poor.While capitalism has imperfections, there is a very compelling case to be made that it is a much more humane system than socialism.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | You can receive an analysis of both systems today when **[you get a free copy of the Hoover Institution’s eBook, _Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism._](http://trk.readactnews.)** This eBook consists of two papers from Hoover Institution Fellows Russell Roberts and Ayaan Hirsi Ali.As an economist, Roberts takes an in-depth look at the humane side of capitalism with a humble and practical approach. And Ali shares her own personal experience growing up in socialist Somalia.

I think you’ll be fascinated by both of their perspectives and gain a deeper understanding of each of these economic systems. You can get your free copy using this secure link:
**[https://resources.hoover.org/personal-freedom-and-the-moral-case-for-capitalism/.](http://trk.readactnews.-WkcilqsjvqBcA)** And you are more than welcome to share it with your family and friends. With more people embracing socialist ideas around the country, it’s important for them to read honest insights of both capitalism and socialism.**[You can use this link to get access to your free copy of _Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism now._](http://trk.readactnews.)**
Thank you,Greg Stamps Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNzgtOTc1MzFkMmQxMzgyNGI0ZWIzODg1NDU1NTUwNzI5NzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/Gmgmo0WAWs42jCUhMNHu_w) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’m calling on you to join me by completing the 2023 Nationwide Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: In 5 days, the MAGA-right will explode for Kari Lake
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In 5 days, Kari Lake will announce she is running for the United States Senate in Arizona.
#

Peter -
In 5 days, Kari Lake will announce she is running for the United States Senate in Arizona.
When she does, she will have the support of the entire MAGA-right.
The small-dollar donors who fund Trump's campaigns will donate to her en masse.
The big donors who want to make sure Republicans take the Senate will write max out checks.
She will immediately be in a position to spend money on some of the most extreme attacks you have ever seen. You know as well as we do, the MAGA-Trump-Right has no limits.
So we have to be ready. We've talked about it before, but now it's here.
And because almost all of the donations we receive come in response to emails like this, we have to ask -- now more than ever before:
[**Can you please contribute $25, or whatever you can afford before Kari Lake officially announces she is running for the United States Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231005-1-15&t=1&akid=1310%2E734936%2ESdV2-0)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Last week’s huge gun safety victory in California
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
California has one of the lowest gun death rates in the nation
#

Friends -
Last week, California made history by becoming the first state in the nation to create a permanent fund for gun violence prevention supported by a tax on the gun industry’s record profits.
With the passage of AB 28, California now places an 11% excise tax on gun manufacturers to help pay for programs to reduce shootings. It’s estimated that AB 28 would raise $160 million every year to fund community violence intervention programs, improve safety at schools, and provide services and resources for gun violence survivors.
California has one of the lowest gun death rates in the nation, and that’s no coincidence. Year after year, our data shows that states with stronger gun laws have less gun violence. And California is a national leader in passing innovative, lifesaving solutions like AB 28.
Change like this is possible everywhere nationwide, but only if we elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot in every state.
[**Our work at GIFFORDS to elect gun safety champions this year and in 2024 is well underway. Will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford today to help fuel our efforts to elect more leaders with the courage to act?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231005-1-30&t=1&akid=6685%2E3935704%2ETjIgMu)

When they're given the resources they need to succeed, our students perform better in the classroom. It’s a positive cycle that uplifts our younger generation. Maryland teachers are absolute rockstars and I’m so proud of the work they are doing to support our students. So, this World Teachers' Day, join me in thanking them for all of the work they do for our students. clean_body: | Happy World Teachers’ Day, Peter. My mother was a public school teacher in Greenbelt – so I know firsthand how hard teachers work for their students. I’m also grateful for the positive impact teachers have had on me throughout my years in education. Teachers are critical to the success of our country. When they're given the resources they need to succeed, our students perform better in the classroom. It’s a positive cycle that uplifts our younger generation. Maryland teachers are absolute rockstars and I’m so proud of the work they are doing to support our students. So, this World Teachers' Day, join me in thanking them for all of the work they do for our students. | All my thanks, David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: please, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I need your help
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacb167f9-b0a3-4f72-8431-c3e650aca04d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

Extreme MAGA Republicans have barreled the People’s House into chaos, crisis and confusion. Who knows how long it will take for them to get their act together. On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are united and ready to get to work. [And Peter, my team tells me we’re now within striking distance of having our best grassroots fundraising day in history. If just 2 more donors from Newington step up, today will go down as a record fundraising day for Democrats. Can I count on you to step up by splitting a donation between me and Blue Amp Action? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafe69989-83aa-4c1b-88c6-43457a5b5c8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’m humbled by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me today. Now, we have a chance to make a powerful statement. I need your help to prove that Democrats are united and ready to deliver For The People. If just 2 more donors from Newington split a gift between me and Blue Amp Action before midnight, we can build a foundation for victory to reclaim the House.

[Will you rush $10 in these final hours? It would mean so much to me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7e54c39-d1b0-420f-bb39-fe23388012a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Team Teichert Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/45f97a076ad4/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6668886?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**Team Teichert Campaign Update**
Friends -
This week, I proudly announced my campaign for U.S. Senate. I entered this race with a simple vision: our country is in desperate need for leadership, not politics. I will work tirelessly throughout this campaign to spark a widespread revival of our founding principles, and I hope I can do so with your support.
Thank you for following along on this journey with me as we seek to reshape the future of Maryland and beyond.
John TeichertCandidate for U.S. Senate
|
---
# In The News....
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=bbc9359583&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| _**"We don't need politics. We don't need politicians. We need leaders again, to revive the spirit of America”**_
---
| [Watch the Full Interview](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=c11fe57c47&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=03720e9e01&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
_“We need leaders, not politicians. With decades of service to this great country, I am stepping up to answer the call to bring a new sense of leadership and responsibility to the people of Maryland and the United States Senate. We need leaders to reverse our weakness on the world stage. We also need leadership to solve a myriad of challenges we face at home, including strangling inflation, stifling taxes, and suffocating governmental overreach. We need leadership to resolve educational malpractice in our schools and crime-ridden streets in our cities. The China threat is not lessening soon, nor are the other issues described above. It is time to rise to the occasion as a nation and to secure the American Dream for subsequent generations through leadership, not politics.”_
[ Read more here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a8b8d74105&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=394960b7c0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: It’s All Thanks to You!
body:
As I’m sure you know, battling the organized Left and the corrupt Biden administration’s endless assaults on our election laws in order to keep our elections fair and honest ranks at the very top of our action agenda...

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As I'm sure you know, battling the organized Left _and_ the corrupt Biden administration's endless assaults on our election laws in order to **keep our elections fair and honest** _ranks at the very top of our action agenda_ ...
To wit: We recently settled our lawsuit on behalf of the **Illinois Conservative Union** against the state of **Illinois** , _and on our terms_.
Here's why our settlement in **Illinois** ...and [your decision today to give your support to our work](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)...are so important.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We're now granted us full access to **Illinois '** list of registered voters for the past several elections...meaning we can review the state's voter list for accuracy..._for the first time in 15 years_!

This was a particularly huge win for us and for election integrity.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

You see, in states like **Illinois** with a reputation for corrupt elections and dead people voting, "dirty," _inaccurate voter rolls are an open invitation to voter fraud_.

**_Keeping voter rolls accurate is a powerful tool for keeping our nation 's elections fair and honest_.**

All told, our "clean election" lawsuits have eliminated **_more than 4 million ineligible names from voter rolls in more than a dozen states_**... and essentially eliminating that many opportunities for voter fraud. And we owe our success to patriotic Americans who contribute to support our work... _I hope you will join them today_!

It's easy to complain about dirty voting lists, voter fraud, rigged elections, non-citizens voting in our elections, and bad liberal ideas like abolishing voter ID, reckless and dangerous all-mail voting that takes place over weeks and months...

...but at Judicial Watch, we don't complain... _we act_ , and where it counts, in the courts.

[**And time and again, a with whole army of supporters _and_ the law on our side, we win.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Right now, our election integrity team is pouring over newly released 2022 election data to determine if other states are failing to follow the law and clean their voter lists. I am confident we will soon be issuing more "warning notices," followed by more lawsuits...

...and more appropriate legal actions to counter radical, leftist efforts to weaken, or even repeal, proven honest election safeguards.

**To be ready for these challenges, now and in 2024, I would be sincerely grateful if you would join the Judicial Watch team by making a special tax-deductible contribution.**

[Your gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) will help us as we enter the all-important Fourth Quarter of the year, and prepare for 2024.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Let me be completely candid with you.

Our way of life is under assault from radical leftists, arrogant bureaucrats, a radical media and a corrupt Biden administration. Our country is in a rule of law crisis. I cannot imagine where this nation would be if not for our steadfast defense of the rule of law, _especially our election laws_.

I'm confident that with your special help today we will continue to meet our nation's urgent need for a strong, conservative, independent and effective government watchdog.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65294&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

|
---
|
---

425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024

To be ready for these challenges, now and in 2024, I would be sincerely grateful if you would join the Judicial Watch team by making a special tax-deductible contribution. will help us as we enter the all-important Fourth Quarter of the year, and prepare for 2024. Let me be completely candid with you. Our way of life is under assault from radical leftists, arrogant bureaucrats, a radical media and a corrupt Biden administration. Our country is in a rule of law crisis. I cannot imagine where this nation would be if not for our steadfast defense of the rule of law, especially our election laws. I'm confident that with your special help today we will continue to meet our nation's urgent need for a strong, conservative, independent and effective government watchdog. Thank you in advance for your help! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

* [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8434e6b5c0&e=567664f14c)

Shaun provides a firsthand account of the challenges faced by police officers in Albuquerque, offering a sobering perspective on the state of policing in the city. He discusses the soaring crime rates, the impact of the Department of Justice's oversight, and doesn't hold back when he calls the DOJ a scam. You won't want to miss Shaun's insights into the burdensome consent decree and the complexities of the Albuquerque police department.
| [STREAM EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f6f34cbfb1&e=567664f14c)
---
As we explore the issues further, we also address police recruitment challenges, the need for effective strategies, and Shaun's invaluable advice on how citizens can protect themselves in a scenario of increasing crime and dwindling police resources. Shaun's candid opinions on the future of law enforcement in Albuquerque will leave you thinking about the importance of electing a law and order mayor.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=17d2fdf04b&e=567664f14c)

Friend,

Democrats in the House and Senate are pushing for D.C. Statehood!

_**Even President Biden has voiced his support:**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70986122/430928822/-594827435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJlYjU4YWMtOGI2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4axsW6uBG1Sm9kj7SV1Q6fHFhYfG8vyT4S0BmGQbaJk=&emci=b06ea282-8663-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=4beb58ac-8b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

If we had TWO more Senators from D.C., then we would easily be able to pass gun safety legislation, like an assault weapons ban and universal background checks.

| Friend,
After our great success this first fundraising quarter, our campaign has been electrified! Your continued support of our movement is how we will defeat Bill Foster and the radical left's agenda in November. [Giving to our campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhtLTqsafbr4ppQpLq0TzS-n7tXFA9NKzyRKoV_IJ3KUP2ZRBNND8SD0gtQVlyuFqUkKtS6njjf_xxEWRqFk9WnuD9FPyXMn8CDtvHV1tLBM5ORkNJ7l_XUtiBCoROu4Qiiz54RjATjbjNWeTmrYSqJYXHid3LDqLOV3mX6lHod3mfc2X3ZRfmzG9MWTbJIct9RcMEDxqc=&c=ou6VY8uJbYgqGwgnkbdk5qilmgR3uMxpZm6RylBJ2yZe4Fn49Wjfsg==&ch=P4yL9VzNJqpCoiL3zEX-3nBQMRoFJXoOCn-JuGYmUcSdjGJ9tKSmIw==) is greatly appreciated, but we also need your help to ensure that we are on the ballot for the primary.
Please go to our website at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhtLTqsafbr4ppQpLq0TzS-n7tXFA9NKzyRKoV_IJ3KUP2ZRBNND0GoiFOl42qfXn6HEafV6DkO3kOY8XD_4w54iCdW4WUCPngV-FYkfi0fhPgdx0bAdyAnUqmjWzOu7AepoDOyZS1SMF7ZqAIlFo1zQdmWiDax&c=ou6VY8uJbYgqGwgnkbdk5qilmgR3uMxpZm6RylBJ2yZe4Fn49Wjfsg==&ch=P4yL9VzNJqpCoiL3zEX-3nBQMRoFJXoOCn-JuGYmUcSdjGJ9tKSmIw==) and sign up now to volunteer in your community. We need your help to gather petition signatures, engage with voters, and spread our conservative message to the people of the 11th Congressional District. [Sign up now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhtLTqsafbr4ppQpLq0TzS-n7tXFA9NKzyRKoV_IJ3KUP2ZRBNND0GoiFOl42qfXn6HEafV6DkO3kOY8XD_4w54iCdW4WUCPngV-FYkfi0fhPgdx0bAdyAnUqmjWzOu7AepoDOyZS1SMF7ZqAIlFo1zQdmWiDax&c=ou6VY8uJbYgqGwgnkbdk5qilmgR3uMxpZm6RylBJ2yZe4Fn49Wjfsg==&ch=P4yL9VzNJqpCoiL3zEX-3nBQMRoFJXoOCn-JuGYmUcSdjGJ9tKSmIw==) to be a part of the Evans team!
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. We all know that campaigns are won by having a grand coalition committed to victory. That is why we are asking you to share this message with your friends and family to spread the word. A simple donation of [$30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhtLTqsafbr4ppQpLq0TzS-n7tXFA9NKzyRKoV_IJ3KUP2ZRBNND8SD0gtQVlyuFqUkKtS6njjf_xxEWRqFk9WnuD9FPyXMn8CDtvHV1tLBM5ORkNJ7l_XUtiBCoROu4Qiiz54RjATjbjNWeTmrYSqJYXHid3LDqLOV3mX6lHod3mfc2X3ZRfmzG9MWTbJIct9RcMEDxqc=&c=ou6VY8uJbYgqGwgnkbdk5qilmgR3uMxpZm6RylBJ2yZe4Fn49Wjfsg==&ch=P4yL9VzNJqpCoiL3zEX-3nBQMRoFJXoOCn-JuGYmUcSdjGJ9tKSmIw==) from your network can make all the difference in this race. Please help us continue the fight!

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: exactly one month ago…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Because of all of you 💗

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70987275/430933408/-849459103?refcode=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRjMWJjMy04ZDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQFVDdFlbiT6IrTkaqYZjCkzBBBZSjqsWgaRp5Z80as=&emci=8b5c09e6-8163-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
I wanted to share my thoughts one month after the launch of our campaign. This is a longer email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll give me a couple minutes of your time and read to the end. Then, if you’re able, **_[I’d like to ask you to give what you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70987277/430933410/209297649?refcode=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRjMWJjMy04ZDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQFVDdFlbiT6IrTkaqYZjCkzBBBZSjqsWgaRp5Z80as=)_** to support our work throughout the months ahead.
* * *
Y’all — something’s happening here in Tennessee. Tennesseans like you have lit a fire. We see that our democracy is slipping away; that working families are in need of better wages and benefits; that rampant, unchecked gun violence is ripping families apart; that women’s most fundamental rights are being denied — and we’re ready to fight back. Our state legislature won’t protect us. Neither will the MAGA Republicans in Congress. For too long, we’ve been saddled with too many politicians who only serve CEOs and do _absolutely nothing_ to make Tennesseans’ lives better. **But that’s changing.** We’re building a movement from the ground up to change our leadership in Washington and make _real_ progress on the issues that matter to us. In the month since we announced our campaign, we’ve received more than 25,000 individual contributions. Those are gifts from educators, health care workers, community leaders, service workers, parents and caregivers, and more — folks just like you, who know what’s at stake in this election. It means more than I can say. **_[There’s still a long road ahead of us, though, so I need to make a personal request of supporters like you. If you haven’t yet had a chance to make a grassroots donation, please: consider chipping in just $5 — or any amount that’s right for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70987284/430933415/209297649?amount=5&refcode=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRjMWJjMy04ZDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQFVDdFlbiT6IrTkaqYZjCkzBBBZSjqsWgaRp5Z80as=)_** | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70987285/430933419/209297649?amount=5&refcode=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bb4c1bc3-8d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRjMWJjMy04ZDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQFVDdFlbiT6IrTkaqYZjCkzBBBZSjqsWgaRp5Z80as=)
---

clean_body: Because of all of you 💗 | I wanted to share my thoughts one month after the launch of our campaign. This is a longer email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll give me a couple minutes of your time and read to the end. Then, if you’re able, = to support our work throughout the months ahead. Y’all — something’s happening here in Tennessee. Tennesseans like you have lit a fire. We see that our democracy is slipping away; that working families are in need of better wages and benefits; that rampant, unchecked gun violence is ripping families apart; that women’s most fundamental rights are being denied — and we’re ready to fight back. Our state legislature won’t protect us. Neither will the MAGA Republicans in Congress. For too long, we’ve been saddled with too many politicians who only serve CEOs and do absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. But that’s changing. We’re building a movement from the ground up to change our leadership in Washington and make real progress on the issues that matter to us. In the month since we announced our campaign, we’ve received more than 25,000 individual contributions. Those are gifts from educators, health care workers, community leaders, service workers, parents and caregivers, and more — folks just like you, who know what’s at stake in this election. It means more than I can say. = | = Thank you for everything, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ** ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. **Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e148c39b90f34510bd443046ad8b1f68&_e=H0iub8DBv1LYiLsJ0gaXPOzBfzeX8sNxGy7cEs9Mdp46nPsAZj9uwKJPe_Aig2D4tUnBafC2Ymh9EoMn97wg7d1PCDKXuTFvEZBsfjlTstXJo4d4t_TSz5Ox2AWVaD7R5uSX12RU__p0Dkx-t3-S41BkfkxvlfWTC2XAEIBK3ibs_CpgayUu5JVYMJ-RxZ5S9s4uSNwgjcAZd1pPz3uTqLDIPe_zFtjJfqn--twstzIwvW_zXP8t5LQ1eZa2aWkIJ2aADHIQn4j7i3CBvUYtuU3mbvJQBzLKDUMs4M2kF4bci1MenvNphcwqjfW14jEkaQMNNRZoLXxE9fOcX9f-66K2-mGRJKlCipt7AqDjJDO9ze7Nx8VZYZoOJ2bb3HPtJztd60p35lcexYaAuvwQeIt3o_Ey-pawxr-9u97GIcZpS3bxhG-1t0excHcfW5j27QqtvAGKY3wuIC9OcZL5go8HNao-SfcOKugPx1cg2yY%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e148c39b90f34510bd443046ad8b1f68&_e=H0iub8DBv1LYiLsJ0gaXPOzBfzeX8sNxGy7cEs9Mdp46nPsAZj9uwKJPe_Aig2D4tUnBafC2Ymh9EoMn97wg7d1PCDKXuTFvEZBsfjlTstXJo4d4t_TSz5Ox2AWVaD7R5uSX12RU__p0Dkx-t3-S41BkfkxvlfWTC2XAEIBK3ibs_CpgayUu5JVYMJ-RxZ5S9s4uSNwgjcAZd1pPz3uTqLDIPe_zFtjJfqn--twstzIwvW_zXP8t5LQ1eZa2aWkIJ2aADHIQn4j7i3CBvUYtuU3mbvJQBzLKDUMs4M2kF4bci1MenvNphcwqjfW14jEkaQMNNRZoLXxE9fOcX9f-61AqMzE51SmpU6p9F0clJTEiRopok7XwFp6_3n57sTMmdoTtuq1hoKytGtR2uNLP6cgrj-7g3FVnj3teAoOCs509g26w60LsphYdT2eF-sV2WBXgEvw_-gHsEiRXn1Y9oZ4EFECR6art7lBQTQlYzZ8%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Team, Brian Fitzpatrick and House Republicans just tore themselves apart and proved they can't govern themselves, let alone the country. From my perspective, House Republicans are what we in the military call FUBAR – f**ked up beyond all recognition (or repair) – thanks to MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz. **First:** They nearly shut down the government, which would have put our national security at risk and left our troops without pay. Fortunately, House Democrats saved the day. **Then:** Gaetz retaliated by ousting the House Speaker, creating a new national security threat – because the House can't get anything done until they elect a new speaker. Republicans have essentially told those who would harm us, "Come on in. We're not home, but the cash register is wide open." **I know it can be easy to look at what's happening and think our whole government is FUBAR. But the fact is,** the only thing that is FUBAR is one party – with weak leaders like Brian Fitzpatrick who let the worst among their ranks run amok. We can fix what is broken by electing strong leaders who will stand up to the MAGA agents of chaos. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: RINOs and Swamp Monsters Beware
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
McCarthy is Out, Conservatives are In
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uwhBOEZKecToj7NmKM4Kmzn7Kk1NS4c9P2YZbrO6VVhLE2-UZBOy69AV9xfNGwxJDr9OKQN0fDhi6tXpVc5N6-ZX1tsw9Y5yUgqlXNjjJ9K0SoPRC1cnrWskloz6k8jnTFX-87gdssNxyjIJSo0u_HkWzlpgxllOvf3gMM8ifHI=&c=Uiaa105K-NQ_kfWplFRaJUiU2LdKH0ShE3SXqhtJpd0I0jXW6WXYUA==&ch=Qs0WCebJKILJvVa2jZdeHdxiV2TzsBS5zdJO3Mh2zvdFJHVOTIp6Og==)
---
|

---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

Rep. Kevin McCarthy has been officially ousted as Speaker of the House, and deservingly so. We need a shakeup in DC., and now we are getting one.

Lead by Rep. Matt Gaetz, seven Republican members, including Virginia's Rep. Bob Good, voted to oust McCarthy. The others were Reps. Andy Biggs, Ken Buck, Tim Burchett, Eli Crane, Nancy Mace and Matt Rosendale.

Republican leadership needs to be held accountable. It is so refreshing to see the status quo up on Capitol Hill get rattled like this.

The people are sick and tired of sending their hard-earned money to support boondoggles in Ukraine. Europe can pay their fair share for their war. We have been more than generous with aid to Ukraine.

One of Mr. Gaetz's principal complaints against Speaker McCarthy was that leadership had passed legislation with Democratic votes that a majority of Republicans opposed. We need a Speaker who will stand up for our conservative principles and McCarthy was never the right person for that. Removing McCarthy is the right move.

Special thanks to my friend Virginia Congressman Bob Good for standing with the people.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase
---
