Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm under attack
body:
They don't want you to be a part of the fight
| | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8952b84891e24028b0f74fa9ab9c67c6&_e=FZLZoKpxIgc33hqPnZbQ2BRaZ9ZnwaoR_EFI7-cCO0iLE7hv8osM3XWyY-_dXCLn7fHGBlVcASWi-tn5_N6xg1-JQBi2cqOAPsADUq-qmkpYszQ4RT4UqxVBA6RsN8brPz7S3v7rr8Bd-SF7d-eXvtROQWMqx_puAdFQA9VdXXwLzHHg9zR8tfktc0Y0JOvoSdH7at3TZ4EdIRLX-GvEsRG1ssPoeu7u5wn8SatqLTsKa7mk3tXOesBqdp3m2t92DZcVVwEjbhhxRWVWEpQPrFYZjDHjuS21cj-4KF-vT7yoawfr9YUUYwLJ8Mjfl5ZI2eKWneAnf8rIk3D8mbrCIg%3D%3D)

Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We 're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I 'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8952b84891e24028b0f74fa9ab9c67c6&_e=FZLZoKpxIgc33hqPnZbQ2BRaZ9ZnwaoR_EFI7-cCO0iLE7hv8osM3XWyY-_dXCLn7fHGBlVcASWi-tn5_N6xg1-JQBi2cqOAPsADUq-qmkpYszQ4RT4UqxVBA6RsN8brPz7S3v7rr8Bd-SF7d-eXvtROQWMqx_puAdFQA9VdXXwLzHHg9zR8tfktc0Y0JOvo5gUamQBhX2pQdKw5mYAbqcc4JIXA4plzFDyFkRWtGbC2VI1TWN4eeJWVQM65Azu9clRsujNUqoF2-nBsyeIe_0ZZWB4dqpJpiAMMZ1Jae6ryw1-C4Bt2c8Fr_1bgCr_SzviA6aCtNR_EB2MJEqoaJw%3D%3D)
| [ **DEFEND MATT GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8952b84891e24028b0f74fa9ab9c67c6&_e=FZLZoKpxIgc33hqPnZbQ2BRaZ9ZnwaoR_EFI7-cCO0iLE7hv8osM3XWyY-_dXCLn7fHGBlVcASWi-tn5_N6xg1-JQBi2cqOAPsADUq-qmkpYszQ4RT4UqxVBA6RsN8brPz7S3v7rr8Bd-SF7d-eXvtROQWMqx_puAdFQA9VdXXwLzHHg9zR8tfktc0Y0JOvotVctifICBVdK4cHItrY8sK18YUFVNGahD4qWNCC1ZZK5frLza9GCOybz9VLFULliCsBvBZCcds0Wn1yXxmfPveaE3RGvEk2fjNoJ1agwcB5--IA2ScaNhYA4WUlze9dRRclyKaocVprJABKemAuzHQ%3D%3D)
---
The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: _**FOR THEM!**_ I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: _**FOR YOU!**_ I've got more enemies than ever, just because I won't bend the knee. **Stand with me.** **[RUSH an emergency donation. ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8952b84891e24028b0f74fa9ab9c67c6&_e=FZLZoKpxIgc33hqPnZbQ2BRaZ9ZnwaoR_EFI7-cCO0iLE7hv8osM3XWyY-_dXCLn7fHGBlVcASWi-tn5_N6xg1-JQBi2cqOAPsADUq-qmkpYszQ4RT4UqxVBA6RsN8brPz7S3v7rr8Bd-SF7d-eXvtROQWMqx_puAdFQA9VdXXxhoo1yrgVHmwXi8K6QJCle2dGe-Vib0sqPmOeXiFLfG-RQNUSHALSB7Wl9wwpxW7HJeDHAeHIIKf_SYDKJGUxXjido7PQSJQN0Fsufl3VOJNpoqG7hLB-G4tp-IEkS6lNyBPVOsLt_Rwh8EXHk0alUS2HMxTBQjE6YhhCJkH3OvA%3D%3D)** Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8952b84891e24028b0f74fa9ab9c67c6&_e=FZLZoKpxIgc33hqPnZbQ2BRaZ9ZnwaoR_EFI7-cCO0iLE7hv8osM3XWyY-_dXCLn7fHGBlVcASWi-tn5_N6xg1-JQBi2cqOAPsADUq-qmkpYszQ4RT4UqxVBA6RsN8brPz7S3v7rr8Bd-SF7d-eXvtROQWMqx_puAdFQA9VdXXwLzHHg9zR8tfktc0Y0JOvoWxPuYl3-Kl56VDIMmYPePFjJBsrHPnDuw5aZNfgLtWjSZGysK6f2DjIdjEwliY80YvwkYUCjWHq-E1UCFGEB7iNEziGMQutGOY2QmrXBhqgu4h88I9K4N6RwbHcKt3xzkdPfTZw4K8d_LNcYI8q5Jg%3D%3D)

name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Cigars and Dinner with Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.!
body:
Get your tickets now! October 26 - 5:30 PM
| | | |

SHERIFF JONATHAN M. SAMMONS, COMMISSIONER CHRISTOPHER KONAWEL, JR. AND COMMISSIONER NICHOLAS DESILVIO
---
| cordially invite you to their Cigars and Dinner Event with special guest
---
| "America's Sheriff" Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.
---
| VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet with Sheriff Clarke will start at 5:30 PM. There are very limited spots for the VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet, so get your tickets now!
Dinner will start at 6:45PM.
We are offering a Discounted ticket to Law Enforcement Officers and Military Personnel for the Dinner portion of this event. Please provide proof of LEO/Military.
Tickets will not be sold at the door.
All check payments must be accompanied by the Donation Form found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014v-XGwuYNIPepnLiZj9G86LtF-T14ZXD0pMcvXcb0V8RxE9ZOBQcjupkppHsi6L6S63m7TFFwojjTc1jxsDTCtnylveqV1Gzxtx-KVYLb0zyqw8NepYdfZ9VxprjYXuI2lEGEH-Ez5U_n1x3-k1gqKaaYtpErTE9Uy1U3fv0BKuebQr1q-erGRETWZCxKni-GrCLfAQeIYhXCQcbYC0AEAvyMEcCrncx-_5yJft83CEAK2qBsTf2Iw==&c=Crc4yHIpZUnqoFXRnVk7TneUKj07mKy_b3eAGQOL3dcE-JkYRijbiA==&ch=s8FlNCXXm0yq4IFeim6wDJ22f0PR3KLYMMXzwqZKhtlJfHL9R5t9BA==).
Tickets can be purchased online [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014v-XGwuYNIPepnLiZj9G86LtF-T14ZXD0pMcvXcb0V8RxE9ZOBQcjupkppHsi6L6PniLXQvnAKtiJbce9gIS5E7Pcj_Aivum4xVZKMX-5X-Da7_2YX2Eqyt6F4WU7h8t2OHjlxGaGaw6yN-XgNeg3FiMbuo5sZCisHy3mpgMqJS9h73gi5aj3UcEZgvAFNLOUj7GTz5dfrI=&c=Crc4yHIpZUnqoFXRnVk7TneUKj07mKy_b3eAGQOL3dcE-JkYRijbiA==&ch=s8FlNCXXm0yq4IFeim6wDJ22f0PR3KLYMMXzwqZKhtlJfHL9R5t9BA==),
Sponsorships must be in by October 23, 2023.
If you have any questions, please reach out to Samantha Sammons at gcgopsecretary@gmail.com) or 856-535-7113.

|
---
| [GET TICKETS NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014v-XGwuYNIPepnLiZj9G86LtF-T14ZXD0pMcvXcb0V8RxE9ZOBQcjupkppHsi6L6PniLXQvnAKtiJbce9gIS5E7Pcj_Aivum4xVZKMX-5X-Da7_2YX2Eqyt6F4WU7h8t2OHjlxGaGaw6yN-XgNeg3FiMbuo5sZCisHy3mpgMqJS9h73gi5aj3UcEZgvAFNLOUj7GTz5dfrI=&c=Crc4yHIpZUnqoFXRnVk7TneUKj07mKy_b3eAGQOL3dcE-JkYRijbiA==&ch=s8FlNCXXm0yq4IFeim6wDJ22f0PR3KLYMMXzwqZKhtlJfHL9R5t9BA==)

---

---
| | |
---
|
### About Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.

After nearly four decades in law enforcement, Sheriff David Clarke has found innovative ways to serve the public that gives him the freedom to reach millions of Americans with his message, unfiltered by the confines of holding an elected office. In addition to his dedication and focus as the Sheriff of a large metropolitan county, Clarke developed a passion for political commentary. He is fondly referred to as the "America's Sheriff" after being given that name by Sean Hannity because he has the natural ability to explain complicated national controversies in a way that everyday people can understand. He is the keynote speaker at countless events across the country, where the audience praises his no-nonsense way of promoting conservative values. He truly enjoys mobilizing everyday Americans to become more politically active and civically engaged. Clarke has ramped up his massive social media activism, including regular communication with his nearly one million followers. In 2017, he became Spokesman and Senior Advisor to America First Action, dedicated to supporting the Trump-Pence Administration. Sheriff Clarke is President of America's Sheriff LLC, President of Rise Up Wisconsin Inc, best selling author, host of Straight Talk With America's Sheriff David Clarke Podcast, and has signed with TruBlu Streaming Service to host, COPS Under Fire, coming out later in 2023. He is also one of the country's most sought after keynote speakers and thought leaders in the conservative movement.
---
| | | | | | | Gloucester County GOP | PO Box 503, Woodbury, NJ 08096
---

body:
I am proud to stand by Michelle | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dJdxabRqMGgO0Wji5AzJ_EXkM-BYtxr0I_RuCb_3xppoLX05B1Gu_SMRcX6uXmj_Es5SGAxhQmI-XcgriMfqhWol2yCTWcUEri0vmh93eXP1ej_LZWCpFEVNW5iO0Vh4dy5z_IOHSnWdnV14nPMbmas59BOVTsRs7_DLJ8d4g4Pc/406/t0mwpK3WS5OUiNiW5QabvQ/h0/J3-fB53i_xES22cWk_K-b1uc5lnx6MjJO20hh7JN3DU)

Hey Peter, I want to share a bit about my good friend, Michelle Vallejo, who is fighting to represent TX-15 — the most competitive district in the state — in Congress. Michelle comes from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. She is hard-working and community-oriented, and I know that these qualities are exactly what we need to take back the U.S. House and flip Texas blue. Michelle is committed to fighting for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter — because she sees every day how hard everyday Texans are working just to scrape by. **[I'm proud to stand by Michelle in her race to represent South Texas in Congress, but she needs all the help she can get. Will you join our fight today with a $30 donation to our campaigns?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_b9mHC6VwwEFBGBTy5oLk21uq1V-xUC5fLv-lax81wqSZl_ANkg8xCKNG2DLk-NeL2bJabpsqXYOVuBdsXUdlON6bHi0EsXNbxwOI8HLhUvaCJFc0kNlC7mgtNKb8MvLy8j-BOYuoEcxvyPjotugef6QpxfXzbLoxfGcaNTfo3TO6gCT_mdIJEynG0QwlJh7xKkeBQ3XXnnycNdC2ZYlseeiwV8HSOz7w0pCBJ7TbUV5_JCeF5X4zrVmbvjzpFcOlFeDQRQXwM8le9O-b8GwLFVwEPUpVqFcEtx7fIRllOkYANSaF2upFScZ7TSZxVKf6Q5uYJKbY47Z_L5z4xKC0Lw/406/t0mwpK3WS5OUiNiW5QabvQ/h1/w609Ik6ZysptjkjPcmDCF8zhTcaY32Ba83h81LG7reI) ** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_b9mHC6VwwEFBGBTy5oLk21uq1V-xUC5fLv-lax81wqR_TvAkVwuMSd_D38gt7JEh_1f7DeFo2uNaY9luiwcuSllC6C-4eo1nwGeNG6VjpIGyEv8aDMqQB2SWqV1cOZNKYvnXdyEt35kRMB0eRnL7fGkHbTZKe-L1yAvY2nX3YYA6hz7XrGGYF6F9JZhfNew9ECKuLajsuFoB-R55jZ0TZcFcD26-fxrwT_uH1-XHRg_CknjwLqJojJC1wAKEu-5uBvoI1356SakmMcmMfTG1FoIWy-mLq2U_I1EprCHJIdOYfiMm0KCk_VMxoZS_iM2EAqL2dbcQZi8JxHq9858vxg/406/t0mwpK3WS5OUiNiW5QabvQ/h2/CP3twG9Ard3wABiG78gCyvCbJYcI9P28FD8kwQeRdOM)
**[Chip In Now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_b9mHC6VwwEFBGBTy5oLk21uq1V-xUC5fLv-lax81wqSziIPrz8ocIBUDNcd9YDrE5qplJqH7rp_doewfczR6TFivP3d-GZ2WlAUvnOKryDILMTf0O90gshcmYv8mXzljsaDkUQjArUW3-eL_9YbKDPxr0FhJLDhziQgGrVproGWU39KEcE_RtzfkYIS7UAP-ZBs7hexNrCSyiMhjCITrYhQWodieR8qpMz_Ptz8F3n7d4PSJ6IA5o3tBWD7SsEuwcyoWskrRrX9x3YJNsSaLH_OCNgv439IV_wvzwJuPeYDaq3JG5cfZD482T3ebH6q0alDu_AAOR_MHkXW3IfvqmA/406/t0mwpK3WS5OUiNiW5QabvQ/h3/O1IKupchtZ-GeSd15HxxPTzSA9OcZTGAcFApMdKK1Hg)** We’re at a critical moment for the future of Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises — but meanwhile in Congress, she supports devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. On top of that, Monica De La Cruz would let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away the right to choose what to do with their own bodies. **There has never been a more crucial time to flip Texas blue and take back the U.S. House — and that work begins in TX-15. Texans everywhere need an advocate who will stand up for working people, reproductive rights, and fight for a better future for all of us.** I know that Michelle Vallejo is undoubtedly the best person for the job. If we want to regain our majority in the House and turn Texas blue, Michelle is exactly the person we need to get behind. **[I look forward to working with Michelle in Congress to build a better future for the people of Texas. Will you step up now by making a split donation of whatever you can afford between my campaign and Michelle’s campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_b9mHC6VwwEFBGBTy5oLk21uq1V-xUC5fLv-lax81wqTI06UcrqcMV9wgq8gdx0JaIP164NOJTOvqvGG-pifXSAYrcdDsmVnGNyjQxi5Ts_C2EyD-Ru6H-rv9gMhhY8zINZwlRAiZHFfwgOmQcU1KeSYLR04ak61uhlh3Cs8McxKv8bEC2V565REor2375nhia4ktQ5fHeD7UifA4gzEx1UUu-ntjgYCG8O18RmVd-lX6fAFNzth4Yq8YfBfr2V2Qe-dcd-L8Mq9AMT3PmyGr_IuJBIcT832W1rqzTJcYqpXvVUmFVTs7-muFWCZ0aaDnar5Q1sFPjum55vGHFWa99g/406/t0mwpK3WS5OUiNiW5QabvQ/h4/ohpLmUZZm7hsHr01IZp1B1XLTJ5gX5hNGmrHp7meq8w) ** Thank you for joining me in the fight to protect South Texas from extremism, \- Greg Greg Casar

clean_body: I am proud to stand by Michelle | | | Hey Peter, I want to share a bit about my good friend, Michelle Vallejo, who is fighting to represent TX-15 — the most competitive district in the state — in Congress. Michelle comes from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. She is hard-working and community-oriented, and I know that these qualities are exactly what we need to take back the U.S. House and flip Texas blue. Michelle is committed to fighting for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter — because she sees every day how hard everyday Texans are working just to scrape by. We’re at a critical moment for the future of Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises — but meanwhile in Congress, she supports devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. On top of that, Monica De La Cruz would let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away the right to choose what to do with their own bodies. There has never been a more crucial time to flip Texas blue and take back the U.S. House — and that work begins in TX-15. Texans everywhere need an advocate who will stand up for working people, reproductive rights, and fight for a better future for all of us. I know that Michelle Vallejo is undoubtedly the best person for the job. If we want to regain our majority in the House and turn Texas blue, Michelle is exactly the person we need to get behind. Thank you for joining me in the fight to protect South Texas from extremism, \- Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12f54800c4934986b2fdffbefe80ad05&_e=t05MoYPPzvF8Q3M7Hvvmv4KfLktnyd0RsGMNb4vtcrIRELg-0M8xENYSVAn_3nxB1sWWTwSWnU7oRe5064kJ4hqeXUFeVHlU0fD86p4myllqtXWQeIoktTjHg_V9WRB2KYSvJNne38zebsemjDQLQmDqeppRj3DehpxfmwD-0HGw4Pwc4o8SpOluHwf7F_SlgLvGBbodKhYWrNhJkyCafy7qvUZHwUhAk5V4xZGNl7cdS2K1AyRUDyGjx-ZWnn-3ufrBUsOfYHfoS8bJSbdBLgmPuW3yG1LQLRn_ARE-Zw-3PrY6F6047Cuwk7Dbh3HdFHv-aanEHjseb8VaFt95nz5qrhVXv78ko4xJa_Nfx1GQa1lMvZbPsD-erVLRS52gR13JG10S13MRZxbul3JgRPuZRMIY7Qj5v9UhJaLdG6h0m1KKNPtr-wckp7XL6Rwn3dQkbJjuMMhICr1ynZrwNYHcVY-pq2yRA-y4EFK0lSc%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12f54800c4934986b2fdffbefe80ad05&_e=t05MoYPPzvF8Q3M7Hvvmv4KfLktnyd0RsGMNb4vtcrIRELg-0M8xENYSVAn_3nxB1sWWTwSWnU7oRe5064kJ4hqeXUFeVHlU0fD86p4myllqtXWQeIoktTjHg_V9WRB2KYSvJNne38zebsemjDQLQmDqeppRj3DehpxfmwD-0HGw4Pwc4o8SpOluHwf7F_SlgLvGBbodKhYWrNhJkyCafy7qvUZHwUhAk5V4xZGNl7cdS2K1AyRUDyGjx-ZWnn-3ufrBUsOfYHfoS8bJSbdBLgmPuW3yG1LQLRn_ARE-Zw-3PrY6F6047Cuwk7Dbh3HdFHv-aanEHjseb8VaFt95n90X4WxzMf6psLnDW-4oCQGqxHNBtml_xo219ltWLjkjsd--nKXuZ2ubuFYXCuwBj5z2Q6F47DJgY0Pw7R4QSKLop5yTdA8KxpsrQMKi5H1QqBsot_YuM5dAq5JsYWApZ_fc__mZLCmGlF_ndPfa_SQ%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12f54800c4934986b2fdffbefe80ad05&_e=t05MoYPPzvF8Q3M7Hvvmv4KfLktnyd0RsGMNb4vtcrIRELg-0M8xENYSVAn_3nxB1sWWTwSWnU7oRe5064kJ4hqeXUFeVHlU0fD86p4myllqtXWQeIoktTjHg_V9WRB2KYSvJNne38zebsemjDQLQmDqeppRj3DehpxfmwD-0HGw4Pwc4o8SpOluHwf7F_SlgLvGBbodKhYWrNhJkyCafy7qvUZHwUhAk5V4xZGNl7cdS2K1AyRUDyGjx-ZWnn-3ufrBUsOfYHfoS8bJSbdBLgmPuW3yG1LQLRn_ARE-Zw-3PrY6F6047Cuwk7Dbh3HdFHv-aanEHjseb8VaFt95n2nWmmyzwf_9nP5iK47WNrI9SbKEAwxEgZDXbsyla70WaIePqXCtqqc_o8aNrdTlBotgd3rOmv2Ql6GaaH_gUPYTIDjo-pCyezSMLkdBPdaWD8uA4fwfy9vGUYP6qUtkMkv_5yYka6xIebEEUktHCvk%3D)

What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's called Horizon by hear.com. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023 , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes Horizon so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. With Horizon, they can. Imagine effortless hearing in every situation --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to understand every word clearly with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it. This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
My opponent has made no secret of the fact that he wants to ban books in Texas.
Whether they’re written by people of color, members of the LGBTQ+ community, or simply don’t conform to his twisted worldview, Cruz has made it clear he wants a say in what books can appear in our libraries.
In Cruz’s universe, schools would become right-wing indoctrination factories that whitewash American history.
Look, as the State Senator who represents Uvalde, I’m committed to protecting kids – not only by banning guns but also by restoring diversity of thought to our schools, libraries, and, most importantly, the U.S. Senate.
I know Ted Cruz is beatable – he almost lost in 2018. And this year, I plan to finish the job. Will you pitch in $10 or more to help me send Cruz packing? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

clean_body: They don't want you to be a part of the fight | | | Fellow Conservative, I need your immediate attention. I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs **for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight . I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and | The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM! I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU! I’ve got more enemies than ever, just because I won’t bend the knee. We’re in the final stretch of election season, and we need to be doing more. MAGA extremists have made it crystal clear that if Republicans win in Virginia’s November election, they will make a 15 week abortion ban the law. Republican extremists are doing everything they can to take over the Virginia statehouse. They were just one vote away from passing a Virginia abortion ban, and if they succeed in November they won’t stop there.

|

| | PETER – **_THIS IS HUGE NEWS: There will be a Black Woman in the US Senate!_**
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn5heBv6-Nf15tNN5yVxlsG8psVWeKuZxvEacOdWOHkrHK2bcXOXQOvYTGH3SeFqTYV_2qH1pu5EL0-5FIumiInhosCoZALMhm7MM6euwBCndZ5B0iqN9VXyHpN3AmICjBbAF8d0z-J7K3KPSBnJQIXettMLdHw_ZQGUmv-OYmx7NN90ejfXj_AS6uij7ETxlY7CyrHhVQ1kkekdB3sQ_QUD9EMMMDXBS5tJa-WO7QywI7ga6-Z_4LCf6gptTED8VE945UfwpwsQbGeW233OnJq2jFyAhJjg9RPAYBgsl7h6KAns6FrQVPK-3vk-5klaWs/406/Y6NRA1zCSK6USCsHKsfiww/h1/f68Voo8ngqNvWFkv_p1XVFUM8sAbv7KWibVLo7mxnPk) That’s right. California Governor Gavin Newsom announced that he will appoint **Laphonza Butler** to the US Senate, taking the seat of the recently departed Dianne Feinstein.

Laphonza Butler will become the only Black woman currently in the Senate – **and the first openly lesbian Black woman to ever serve as a Senator.**

She’s been on the frontlines of the fight for abortion access and workers rights, both during her time as **President of Emily’s List,** and her career as a union president and campaign advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris.

[Here at The Collective PAC, we’re proud to see another Black woman serve as a US Senator – but the work is far from finished. Will you sign on to congratulate Laphonza Butler and show your solidarity for the fight to elect Black women everywhere? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn5heBv6-Nf15tNN5yVxlsG8psVWeKuZxvEacOdWOHkrHK2bcXOXQOvYTGH3SeFqTYV_2qH1pu5EL0-5FIumiInhosCoZALMhm7MM6euwBCndZ5B0iqN9VXyHpN3AmICjBbAF8d0z-J7K3KPSBnJQIXKMm_zTpEH4JXJDl9g7xCe5rTOllotKbgpZ9ksV_ItJ54Q0aL9hfK52r7o3Bg0Ezmsrz9FpO0br_Ooer7CXxDsdGXGfXf4-ZV5ky24yzA0hZhFj1ADcsL3ojQyS7S2YfV5k7iHsT2rbVa9AQFRN8V1kea4HNcZqnqvUunS8uw_j4/406/Y6NRA1zCSK6USCsHKsfiww/h2/rFE5QS2dMbuJ00aWCN2V52PzjSZGPAYA5l5exUNO97g)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | PETER – THIS IS HUGE NEWS: There will be a Black Woman in the US Senate! That’s right. California Governor Gavin Newsom announced that he will appoint Laphonza Butler to the US Senate, taking the seat of the recently departed Dianne Feinstein. Laphonza Butler will become the only Black woman currently in the Senate – and the first openly lesbian Black woman to ever serve as a Senator. She’s been on the frontlines of the fight for abortion access and workers rights, both during her time as President of Emily’s List, and her career as a union president and campaign advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. | Thank you, — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . Peter, this will be a quick read, but it’s really important you understand where things stand: 1\. Democrats continue to fight for working Americans by growing the economy and delivering on meaningful legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the CHIPS Act. 2\. The other side is focused on destroying the progress we’ve made, and extreme MAGA politicians are actively working to undermine our democratic institutions. 3\. We need your help to stand together in opposition to these MAGA Republicans who want to take us backward. Every supporter has a role to play in this campaign, and our work isn’t over until every American has access to the health care they need, the education they deserve, and an economy that’s built from the middle out, not the top down. **Every donation, regardless of the amount, gets us one step closer to achieving these goals. name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: An Independent Run for Truth Justice Love
body:
We MUST challenge the hegemony of the two monopolistic parties.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231005all_announcement&n=1)
---
My Dear Brothers, Sisters, and Siblings, We stand at a crossroads in our nation's history, where our corporate-funded system is unable and unwilling to solve the critical problems poor and working people face. I am in this race to challenge the hegemony of the two ruling parties, the never-ending dance between Republicans and Democrats that leaves millions of our friends and neighbors without housing, health care, decent jobs, clean air, clean water, nutritious food, and a healthy environment. **Our Constitution provides for Independent candidates to gain ballot access in all states, and I have begun seeking ballot access as an Independent, unaffiliated with any political party.**
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231005all_announcement&n=2)
---
I nod in solidarity to the Green Party for their shared values and commitment to justice. But my quest for the presidency belongs to the people. I believe the best way to challenge the entrenched system is by focusing 100% on the people, not on the intricacies of internal party dynamics. I need your help to build a movement that establishes a true democracy in which we secure the freedom to vote our conscience without being shamed, intimidated, or bullied. Democrats and Republicans have failed us, perpetuating crises such as poverty, the climate emergency, endless war, and systemic racism, all for the personal gain of the rich and powerful. Together, we can build a movement of independent thinkers, fearless truth-seekers, and unwavering champions of justice.
---
In the spirit of independence and unity, **Dr. Cornel West**
---

ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018

Canvass for Roanoke's Democratic candidates!
Join the Roanoke Young Democrats this Saturday for a tailgate party before heading out to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn.
Door knocking will begin about 12:30pm! Party starts at the Glenvar Public Library at 11am!
RSVP here: https://fb.me/e/IGNwkkB4
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://cardinalnews.org/2023/09/26/wells-fargo-to-invest-87-million-in-roanoke-county-support-center/ [https://cardinalnews.org/2023/09/26/wells-fargo-to-invest-87-million-in-roanoke-county-support-center/] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Wells Fargo to Bring 1,100 Jobs to Roanoke County VT Supplying Overdose Reversal Kits to Dorms Across Campus
Wells Fargo announced this week that it will be opening a new customer service center in Roanoke County. Virginia Tech is taking steps to ensure the safety of their students and giving them the tools they need to save lives.
This $87 million investment will bring 1,100 jobs to the region! Officials predict that annual economic impact of these new jobs will average $322 million in the Valley. Each overdose reversal kits contains 2 doses of Narcan and protective supplies for users along with a video tutorial on how to use Narcan.
Read More [https://cardinalnews.org/2023/09/26/wells-fargo-to-invest-87-million-in-roanoke-county-support-center/] Read more information on Narcan training through VT here: https://hokiewellness.vt.edu/students/workshops/Revive.html [https://hokiewellness.vt.edu/students/workshops/Revive.html]
Read More [https://www.wsls.com/news/local/2023/09/26/overdose-reversal-kits-brought-to-virginia-tech-dorms/]

Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
Family Services of Roanoke Valley will be hosting a kids' movie night tonight from 5 - 7:30 pm at the EnVision Center (2607 Salem Turnpike, Roanoke, VA, 24016). - Sept. 28
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://localcolors.org/events/hispanic-heritage-month-celebration-1 [https://localcolors.org/events/hispanic-heritage-month-celebration-1] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Hispanic Local Colors - Sept. 30 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
The Local Colors 4th annual Hispanic Heritage Month Celebration is a free, family friendly event that spotlights the rich cultures of Latin America and recognizes the positive contributions of the Latino community in our area. There will be many dance and live music performances, educational segments, storytelling, and more. Vendor booths will be present with a diversity of Latin American cuisine, artisan crafts, Latino owned businesses, and community services. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Don't miss it this Saturday, 12-3 pm at the John Nolen Plaza! Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Read More [https://localcolors.org/events/hispanic-heritage-month-celebration-1] 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Gaetz Provides Road Map for Removing Party Chair
body:
Removing Don Tracy as IL GOP Chair would not be chaos. "Chaos" is landslide election losses and being an irrelevant super minority in Springfield.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/251bea41f3ad/gaetz-provides-road-map-for-removing-party-chair?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Rep. Matt Gaetz Provides IL GOP with the Road Map for Removing Don Tracy as Party Chair (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/rep-matt-gaetz-provides-il-gop-with-the-road-map-for-removing-don-tracy-as-party-chair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/rep-matt-gaetz-provides-il-gop-with-the-road-map-for-removing-don-tracy-as-party-chair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) and IL GOP Chair Don Tracy, right. (Illinois Review)
Illinois Republican Party chair Don Tracy’s fate was sealed last Spring when over 30 organizations representing more than 80,000 grassroots activists (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/ir-exclusive-30-organizations-across-illinois-representing-over-80000-grassroots-activists-sign-an-open-letter-of-no-confidence-in-il-gop-chair-don-tracys-leadership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from across the state signed a letter of “No Confidence” – in a major rebuke to his tenure as party chair, as Republicans racked up losses and the Democrats increased their supermajority control on local and statewide matters last November during the midterm elections.

And this publication has not stopped making the case, since last November, why Tracy should be removed as chair. The numbers don’t lie – and under Tracy’s leadership, Illinois Republicans maintain their status as the party in the super minority.

Since late Winter, many members of the IL GOP State Central Committee have privately communicated with this publication that the writing is on the wall and that Tracy must go.

And the question that has the entire State Central Committee paralyzed with fear despite their convictions telling them it’s the right thing to do, is one simple question:

“Who will be the next Chair?”

The fear of who would be the next chair has consistently overshadowed the bigger issue that Tracy cannot remain as chair if the IL GOP wants to win races.

And the consequence of accepting mediocrity has borne its fruit.

Last April 4th, Illinois Republicans witnessed a bloodbath at the polls, where Republicans lost 80 percent of the school board races.

This fear derailed an
attempted ouster (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-grassroots-committee-co-chairs-larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-disrespect-the-grassroots-and-defend-don-tracy-as-calls-for-their-resignations-grow.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) at last May’s State Central Committee quarterly meeting, when some members of the State Central Committee sought to bring a motion of no confidence against Tracy.

Although not offering himself to be the Chair, State Central Committeeman and Illinois Republican Senator Jason Plummer’s involvement in the motion of no confidence led some State Central Committee members to believe that Plummer was seeking the chairmanship himself. And when the vote was finally called, the fear of who would be the next chair prevailed and Tracy held onto his job.

It’s human nature to fear change.

Fear holds people back from seeking better employment or from leaving lackluster or even abusive relationships.

And here, fear has held the IL GOP back from winning and becoming an equal force to the Democratic Party of Illinois.

On Tuesday afternoon, Congressman Matt Gaetz (R-FL) set forth the road map for removing incompetent leadership: First remove the Chair.

In a surprise move that has left Establishment Republicans angry,
Gaetz (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/breaking-conservatives-force-historic-vote-and-remove-kevin-mccarthy-as-speaker-of-the-house-leaving-gop-establishment-stunned-angry.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) led the conservative effort to remove Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) as Speaker of the House of Representatives. The move was made with no Speaker replacement in mind – an act that Establishment Republicans called “chaos.”

Gaetz, standing on his convictions, responded to the opposition in his party:

“I don’t think voting against @SpeakerMcCarthy is chaos. I think $33 Trillion in debt is chaos. I think not passing single-subject spending bills is chaos. I think being governed by continuing resolutions and omnibus bills is chaos. Chaos is somebody we cannot trust with their word. That’s why I’ve moved to vacate the chair.”
https://twitter.com/RepMattGaetz/status/1709286103612613115?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
And now that the Speaker has been vacated and McCarthy is no longer part of the conversation, House Republicans are able to approach the issue of a new Speaker with a clear mind.

Already, House Freedom Caucus founder Jim Jordan (R-OH) and House Majority Leader Steve Scalise (R-LA) have signaled that they are
campaigning (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/mccarthy-allies-throw-temper-tantrums-vow-to-block-speaker-candidates-as-country-nears-another-government-shutdown-before-the-holidays.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to be the next Speaker.

That Scalise is running would have been unthinkable just days ago, as Scalise had stated repeatedly back in January that he was not interested in being Speaker. But the reality is that Scalise was not interested in running against McCarthy for Speaker, and with McCarthy out, the calculus has changed.

The parallels between McCarthy and Tracy are not lost on this publication. Both have been accused of working a little too closely with the other side—McCarthy with former Speaker and Democrat Nancy Pelosi, and Tracy with Illinois Governor and Democrat JB Pritzker.

As Illinois Review has previously
reported (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/don-tracy-dot-foods-making-up-majority-of-donations-to-the-il-gop-as-embattled-organization-struggles-to-raise-money-financial-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Don Tracy’s family business, Dot Foods – where he is an owner, has embraced woke culture and owners have contributed to Democrat politicians, even including donations to President Joe Biden.

And Gov. JB Pritzker has signaled his approval. On August 30th, Gov. Pritzker posted a message on X congratulating Dot Foods for being “committed to our state.” The message sent by Gov. Pritzker is clear: play the game by my rules, and your business will succeed.
https://twitter.com/GovPritzker/status/1697008183582028190?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
And Don Tracy has every reason to fear Democrat retaliation against his family’s business should he actually challenge the status quo. After all, a Democrat judge in New York has ordered (https://www.newsmax.com/politics/engoron-giuliani-rnc/2023/10/03/id/1136775/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7967c93d9e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7967c93d9e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) President Donald Trump’s business operations in New York to cease and his assets, including the iconic Trump Tower, to be transferred to new owners.

That is exactly why Don Tracy must be removed as Chair from the IL GOP, because the IL GOP will never be anything more than a superminority so long as the business interests of a few prevail over the best interests of the people.

Matt Gaetz set the road map for the IL GOP. Get over your fear and remove Don Tracy.

Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – any amount you can afford will go a long way – and make sure we have the resources to finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70993656/430956094/1610638071?refcode=em20231005am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=0069a046-9863-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5YTA0Ni05ODYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=829gNdIsWw-lLGomvyVHo9AKxm6mkKiWzYcPusdS3rI=)

body:

| [](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/777344e754212c53d54398ad66337647/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVxyyhvIiKieYg6x6ZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAouaS4AA_u9GBsCRZozIUSKCmoJfH89WXuylk6FpRC3iJdtwq84Wt4Bqaz47prC6hXaJDD3g-SOItOaZwlhlRcm47_PGy7mT3hzo9TGMefYqwEhZ1xN-CRbnFaVAizio66NPyVSDWebed1VdXyYkpkscjL9myXokMj4EqhLD7rE-zfmvEJH9Fi6Q==)
---
| Peter, We will be airing a powerful encore episode (that many of you missed) of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon, since Bill is still on the trial.
Today's episode is about **saving our shores, and covers how the wind turbines are affecting the Jersey Shore. It is an encore of the podcast streamed from The Arlington on Long Beach Island last Saturday.**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/70a0babc091da23ee62f94fadddd60a9/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCXRFMqbiIhoHqLOYbtDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoS0kphwDu9HDdNVigkQklUFLUSCrZ6-v6nrN2LKiEvCW66RQE49fwAsxnx_c9C2hQaJDDPoyytEhOeVpkhlSlNh3_edztZvHEuzDNYZp-irEWFPfG3UJAusN5ERdmFR11ZfgrkWoD22ZNXTfyYkokX7GqO9uV6NEISqVQ8s_6DIe3ZnoCHjti5w==)
---
|
---
| Bill was joined by several special guests, including Jim Hutchinson from The Fisherman Magazine, John Peterson, Mayor of Seaside Park, Brian Sabarese, owner of The Arlington, and Mayor Joseph Mancini of Long Beach. As we dive deeper into the effects of wind turbines on the Jersey Shore, let us remember the beauty and sanctity of our coasts. Every conversation brings us closer to preserving what we hold dear.
Make sure you [**click here to join us now (our encore stream will go live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/5ecd4f9f764a77037dd7c17804431b62/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVxTai9iYiI5iHqHKZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoc0lxCRzu9GDMBQs0FkIJlBQ0kvLi9WXe2nEdCyohb5FuOgV8_BpegPnseB6zgAaFBjns_SCJs-iUxlliSJVr0_Gfh203iyfc-XEK0_RTjLWgsDfuFjjpDudFpTCr6Kgrw1-JVMttu2jqupEXUyLLVVF1Z7sSPRpBrhTK8rM-weGtmZ4cpWLl)
Common Sense Action Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/13862694/7204464f7e4859b4) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty. We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals. We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses. We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all. I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections. If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in! Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America. Thank you,Bill Spadea | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

Even before the vote to depose McCarthy, two of the appropriation bills were on the House schedule for a floor vote and could be taken up Thursday. More bills, two a week, are expected to follow._ _"It's all doable," Larsen said."_ [**Rick will be in touch with updates, in the meantime, take a moment to read the editorial today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70994822/430959954/-1028423946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFjZTZlNy05OTYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41rpYJHtaMc8LVLlTR0qnNyx1fayQrwePZa5gWP0vvk=&emci=5f4d029e-f262-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3b1ce6e7-9963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239) More soon, _Team Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

subject: Mike Dennehy and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS DECIDED TO SHARE ALL OF HIS CONTENT VIA [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bXKQ9kAo1PHdTqrGQ1Lr-gpFeivBXY1zS5BD4Z3POKrPVkzt600jDg2j_Mm5FLvE33Qm2Nit_c3RAOw0hZf_JRAVoEvdp5O4QsOsPFoUnJftxszhJuogGKS1N8HO22mFkxYv_p3oqXoMRn7q06UgbvhfEoUlYg1H&c=O-lVpoBBQTTtiRCbtc2voOrn5UX0kdbXLIOr_ozPdtdve8gY-Hhhdg==&ch=7F-y89pBiwGap_yWhQLSm_NhOYAvC1PrJaO5lTFVLx2e0kB2_9dZng==). PLEASE SUBSCRIBE (FOR FREE) AND FORWARD THIS EMAIL TO OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
# Mike Dennehy,
# Public and Political Affairs Professional and
# Co-Founder of Dennehy & Bouley
---

In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Dennehy, a political and public affairs professional who has been working in New Hampshire politics for decades. Mike shared the story of his voyage north from Massachusetts and into the world of American politics of the very highest levels. He also reflects on how politics has changed over the past few decades while lamenting the rise of a politics "industry" filled with business-minded consultants. Mike leaves us with great advice for our fast-paced world: slow down and reflect a bit on what's happening.

Tune in to the conversation via the links below! There is also a video of the conversation available at [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bXKQ9kAo1PHdTqrGQ1Lr-gpFeivBXY1zS5BD4Z3POKrPVkzt600jDg2j_Mm5FLvE33Qm2Nit_c3RAOw0hZf_JRAVoEvdp5O4QsOsPFoUnJftxszhJuogGKS1N8HO22mFkxYv_p3oqXoMRn7q06UgbvhfEoUlYg1H&c=O-lVpoBBQTTtiRCbtc2voOrn5UX0kdbXLIOr_ozPdtdve8gY-Hhhdg==&ch=7F-y89pBiwGap_yWhQLSm_NhOYAvC1PrJaO5lTFVLx2e0kB2_9dZng==)

PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bXKQ9kAo1PHdTqrGQ1Lr-gpFeivBXY1zS5BD4Z3POKrPVkzt600jDhoVf3ButI7iHRuPF_boLhGaooJBkVzcKuDT6O5l9xonLX8kdxJC14ReObHqzwBKk0DXN3fVgHY-JdSMM6Db9PT61LkAO_SPzQ==&c=O-lVpoBBQTTtiRCbtc2voOrn5UX0kdbXLIOr_ozPdtdve8gY-Hhhdg==&ch=7F-y89pBiwGap_yWhQLSm_NhOYAvC1PrJaO5lTFVLx2e0kB2_9dZng==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

subject: Chairman's Video & Republican Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Listen to WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh's newest video on the 6 initiatives. Plus join us at one of these upcoming Republican events nearest you....

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=e8db5ca30e)

name: Bob for Congress
subject: Denounce Trump, Save Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friend
My opponent, Rep. Bergman should be ashamed; Not only is he an ineffective politician, his continued support of Trump undermines our democracy. I need your help unseating him. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] If you're able to make a contribution to my campaign for Congress and help me defeat extremists, together we can restore dignity and integrity to the House.
Thank you for your unwavering support, Friend. It means a lot to have you in my corner, and your contributions are going a long way.
v/r
-Bob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Rep. Bergman needs to denounce Trumpism
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
The civil war of the GOP is causing a dumpster fire in our House fueled by Trump extremists. Through it all, Rep. Bergman is still standing by his man. It's a disservice to the district, the nation, and democracy itself.
Y [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] our contribution [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] will directly support our efforts to defeat Bergman and calm the chaos taking place in DC. What's happening isn't governance. It's political theatre and the GOP is preventing Congress from working for the American people.
if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE MORE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Twenty-four people inside Trump's inner circle have turned on him [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/rep-bergman-needs-to-denounce-trumpism] . Republicans who haven't, such as Rep. Jack Bergman, don't get a free pass for trying to save McCarthy. Trump has his hands all over the chaos in Washington caused by MAGA extremists, and my opponent is still aligning himself with the disgraced former president.
Make no mistake. If it were true that "politics in Washington is broken," we would have seen this destruction when Democrats were in charge. The GOP alone is broken, their civil war is wreaking havoc on our Nation, and Jack Bergman's actions and extremist affiliations fuel this dumpster fire.
If our Representative was genuinely focused on serving the American people, he would denounce Trumpism, rise above the division, and get to work for the American people.
Instead, he's standing by his man. "A person that has no idea what America stands for and has no idea what America is all about" , according to John Kelly, Trump's longest-serving White House Chief of Staff.
Can Bergman align with Trump, work with extremists, and still get things done? No. This year, a mere 16 bills have been signed into law, and it's unclear which ones could benefit our district. As for Bergman's actions, he has consistently voted against us [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/bergman-s-record-shows-constant-abandonment-of-northern-michigan-u-p-priorities] .
In this congressional session, he has sponsored 18 bills, out of which only one has become law — the naming of a VA clinic. He has also cosponsored 135 bills, with only one becoming law — the Marine Corps commemorative coin act.
It's just not enough. Good legislation is about being proactive and productive and avoiding petty political squabbles that don't benefit the American people. Bergman is making no effort to distance himself from the source of all the chaos in Washington, and rural America deserves change.
Friend I need you with me in this fight. Thank you for your continued support.
V/R
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://www.votedrbob.com/post/rep-bergman-needs-to-denounce-trumpism [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/rep-bergman-needs-to-denounce-trumpism]
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: I want to share some news with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70997120/430968837/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ZkZjYzZWMtOWY2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mIDBwE4swCfmbnVJnEs-HUP3ywlf_H65IU7oReHwqb8=) Peter – This week’s debacle in Congress shows why we need a new majority in the House and new leadership in our country. I’m running for Congress to protect democracy, address the climate crisis, and create an economy that works for everyone. To do all that, I need to beat radical right-winger David Schweikert, which is why this news is such a big deal.

**The National Journal just ranked David Schweikert as one of the most vulnerable members of Congress! name: Lose Cruz PAC
subject: Just when you thought Ted couldn't sink any lower
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
He justified his new anti-immigrant bill by saying "students have a right to feel safe" in schools.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)
Just when you thought Ted Cruz couldn’t possibly sink any lower, he does it again. He recently introduced a bill that would **cut all federal funding** to any public school, college, or university that houses undocumented immigrants.
Ted even had the nerve to justify his new anti-immigrant bill by saying "students have a right to feel safe" in schools — **despite his complete lack of support for any measure that could actually help to prevent school shootings.** **[Pitch in $5 or anything you can today to help us defeat Ted in 2024 and elect a senator who will _actually_ protect students.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-202301005?refcode=em20231005&amount=&refcode2=110_623276_Y8FPjR&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)
**[PITCH IN TO DEFEAT TED IN 2024 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-202301005?amount=5&refcode=em20231005&refcode2=110_623276_Y8FPjR&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)**
**So to help summarize, here's what extremists like Ted Cruz think will protect students in schools:**
* Banning immigrants
* Armed teachers
* Defunding public schools
* Arresting students for behavioral issues

**Meanwhile, back in reality, here's what will actually protect students in schools:**
* Free lunch programs so kids don't go hungry
* The freedom to learn without the GOP whitewashing their lessons
* Common-sense gun laws to help prevent school shootings
* Adequately funding our schools

**[If you're tired of Ted's antics and want to see our part-time senator replaced with someone who will _really_ work to keep students safe, pitch in now to help us Lose Cruz next November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-202301005?refcode=em20231005&amount=&refcode2=110_623276_Y8FPjR&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-202301005?amount=5&refcode=em20231005&refcode2=110_623276_Y8FPjR&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)**
— Lose Cruz PAC

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-110&t=2&refcode2=110_623276_Y8FPjR&akid=110%2E623276%2EY8FPjR)**

---
| Dear Friend:

**I am happy to announce that City Controller Kenneth Mejia has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in CA-34!**

City Controller Mejia is the first Asian American elected to citywide office in Los Angeles and the first Filipino elected official. Controller Mejia has proven to be a dedicated community activist, pledging to audit the cost of homeless encampment sweeps and aiming to decriminalize homelessness and hold the police and other city departments accountable. A champion for climate justice, he has promised to audit how much the city pays oil and gas companies for power.

Fighting for these critical movements is essential not only to the tenets of my campaign but for everyone who calls LA home. Controller Mejia’s trust and support means the world to me and I am so excited to get to work and make a positive difference in our city together!
---
| **✨ ****VOLUNTEER ****✨** Let’s keep the ball rolling! We’re about to start hitting the streets to knock on doors and set up tables to speak with voters about the issues that matter to them most. But we can’t do it without you! We’re looking for passionate and dedicated volunteers who want to make a difference to help get the word out about David's dream for a better Los Angeles.

**If you’d like to join our team and sign up to volunteer for these events ****[[Click Here]](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=0b6fc3d3ab&e=fee98d637f)****.

If you'd like to contribute your efforts in other ways, please ****[[Click Here]](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=0a1f4a56af&e=fee98d637f)****!** **💲 DONATE 💲** Another great way to support our campaign is by donating! Since we don’t take money from corporate PACs, we rely solely on grassroots donations from people like you. We need 848 more people to become monthly donors of $34 to meet our goal.

**[[Click here]](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=3a32a2f1cf&e=fee98d637f)**** to help us cross the finish line! Can we count on your help to take back power for the people?**

It’s time for us!

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: In 2018, $98 was spent to win a vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Do you know how much political campaigns will spend to win a vote? | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=fe9bdefbfd23417794538e821d3f5338&_t=xgr1Do46vrJ1fuDmFYoUB93aCwq11hZLwIc5IFDV60iGCI6mxV7pvAI87voeP_55Vbh2VoZJYywS61iQGsuxDmCCCEeYsa7roQSAXvagbic%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=fe9bdefbfd23417794538e821d3f5338&_t=xgr1Do46vrJ1fuDmFYoUB93aCwq11hZLwIc5IFDV60iGCI6mxV7pvAI87voeP_55Vbh2VoZJYywS61iQGsuxDmCCCEeYsa7roQSAXvagbic%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fe9bdefbfd23417794538e821d3f5338&_e=xaVm1uN6mJ1gmCZYzmjHipG9wi7hXOlLwPV___H05o-xSpb2nTg9uJMYgHu8kjhnGxZnB5aVlPXOo77-MNeiZOsuFoL4UNTky0kB2B5p2k_ZoagZRGoDzBWgCYPzz_i2nSB6_Mo-kO3hGoHvo_jSMqfFlO937rfdbDGgk4rzBhvQjkWVeQLRyfennIxc30QHZIqUbSuMzGKOX3GA4otkU3pXRC5IL8XFQp9IkoOWyHsm4la2T0T91YmGJHlimWKbOCvhLMwC56-oFRVV_pI8CHPdvevaenWJ1Z6KbRE_OmrRBTaTh3gorCBpwDX5g11fe5_jx1iNAKUn-VxrNo5R6RKYwUNpP8gcFejcra44Uy_Ml3MyY0b9BnVMo591cbO1dSWebacmb4bqwtOPiqouHA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars.

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fe9bdefbfd23417794538e821d3f5338&_e=xaVm1uN6mJ1gmCZYzmjHipG9wi7hXOlLwPV___H05o-xSpb2nTg9uJMYgHu8kjhnGxZnB5aVlPXOo77-MNeiZOsuFoL4UNTky0kB2B5p2k_ZoagZRGoDzBWgCYPzz_i2nSB6_Mo-kO3hGoHvo_jSMqfFlO937rfdbDGgk4rzBhvQjkWVeQLRyfennIxc30QHZIqUbSuMzGKOX3GA4otkU3pXRC5IL8XFQp9IkoOWyHu9lVIxD_n1rtQP6vZ5IbAwekSz0yTxDZd0pZiv6lPU3iUyHGSuFpYbM0tRoPsAoQGDWvLcby0xO5htS1-CnD1IDoo91ODSf77dXKJOflsT8deHz4xtgMDaJyn0nPVyOQbAC6bklYWsCzkFY9yGM4pMJMTyhmUo0Bb3fwjZbt0b2w%3D%3D)**.

**[I’m coming to you today to let you know that we’re aiming to raise $886 today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fe9bdefbfd23417794538e821d3f5338&_e=xaVm1uN6mJ1gmCZYzmjHipG9wi7hXOlLwPV___H05o-xSpb2nTg9uJMYgHu8kjhnGxZnB5aVlPXOo77-MNeiZOsuFoL4UNTky0kB2B5p2k_ZoagZRGoDzBWgCYPzz_i2nSB6_Mo-kO3hGoHvo_jSMqfFlO937rfdbDGgk4rzBhvQjkWVeQLRyfennIxc30QHZIqUbSuMzGKOX3GA4otkU3pXRC5IL8XFQp9IkoOWyHt-CpqrVUxIX1ESQ5NsBHv7ggP8SR6FRmbgMd7ciNYahizgHpxsmTrHQa7fmjk4JsDOPwI9QcrNMUhS6_srAAA592yPr9_vGsNI9IZWqLLjFRaqt0LY6-j4tQoB8scCS7q3KfIHbNzffZEpC2xBZzlVuEwyu9bZQXS5PPFJ-s-kxQ%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: Do you know how much political campaigns will spend to win a vote? | | Fellow Conservative, $98 PER PERSON As a former Navy SEAL , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable. While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team. On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,I’m still in the line of fire. When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. What I discovered shocked me. OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE. Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,the 2018 record won’t stand. While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election. By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and . . Divide that by 55 and we just need you and 54 other patriots to chip in $16 before midnight. Are you able to assist? With respect, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION.
