| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d85575ce4446495e91bc2262196c2ce6&_e=eI0WJeZ5BZN4zWE9RTspAytptibn9S3yeO6dIr2R29tmSSi8htjACFpQRXd8OAJSzqOJnLqm0cAgOG7hVeb2lVSTkEQqO74TxKugJ7BFruop7aKxlgdldN0VAHvEhEldunIdmMQ7HHNCMUBKN6Ad2aLnEpPM327MHHVG6bapjP74HGuMdHic9ELhenc7-bKRwV5-B6gAp2zRPU_P1YunpHLha-smnPcS3nBExxCwaF0boZt7g649aM-DMcq2BKEuB14fISz-B-0YnBSms6aITbFlh6MqnyUrIPxUPK6fhtovb6fIhTMXarsSGWkzetY9Cp_Hyivr_hpW7EgjS9IkYI5x7S2PrydAnvhNQwpVw3QxebRR2B8YRm6d2FL5IA0BqQNvYr-EOVMgVfPox_6z9t1z6bN1zTBVWAwJH-XVJOnqzTFnlh4IefKFuenT5Fcn-5OIYX-DMSOuAvMpcAwk4A9KhDJRfDevDJbUHb-9ME4%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d85575ce4446495e91bc2262196c2ce6&_e=eI0WJeZ5BZN4zWE9RTspAytptibn9S3yeO6dIr2R29tmSSi8htjACFpQRXd8OAJSzqOJnLqm0cAgOG7hVeb2lVSTkEQqO74TxKugJ7BFruop7aKxlgdldN0VAHvEhEldunIdmMQ7HHNCMUBKN6Ad2aLnEpPM327MHHVG6bapjP74HGuMdHic9ELhenc7-bKRwV5-B6gAp2zRPU_P1YunpHLha-smnPcS3nBExxCwaF0boZt7g649aM-DMcq2BKEuB14fISz-B-0YnBSms6aITbFlh6MqnyUrIPxUPK6fhtovb6fIhTMXarsSGWkzetY9zFKv7scLSOzZB4GchoikuNJf_RvcvhcSv3S6d_Bw5Z1UC0mq1YSJzIfrUKBmZqSv2KGkMhIJq8iLb3CCEADVuDPRQdIIz7Ru6Gn_keM_WJGurkfuAYJnSf2kyzCV9BrY1YtQahQJ8IZQOzGA-kU5IYfPXx4RFWlxi9sIHST72Jc%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70998560/430973658/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZjMjZiYzUtYTE2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nNVomPsSGVcfq0wQuiR1zvAJNqwO5QpoGNVUyUSZDoM=)
Peter,

As we look ahead to October and the last few months before our election year begins, I want to thank you for your support. Our momentum is strong -- in just the last month, we’ve received endorsements from Rep. Eric Swalwell, Rep. Sydney Kamlager-Dove, Moms Fed Up, and more.

I’ve crossed the district meeting thousands of voters, connecting with local organizations, and making sure that our message is heard far and wide. I’m running to continue my life’s work of fighting for our rights here in Orange County -- from my extensive _pro bono_ work to founding and leading an organization for OC women to become politically involved.

But to build on our progress, I’m counting on your continued support. **CA-47 is the only Democratic-held open seat in California, and this race is already considered a “toss-up” by political experts.**

[**As we strategize for October, will you take one minute to complete our campaign survey? My team and I will be combing over the responses at the end of the week, and I hope to see your thoughts about this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70998561/430973659/818436750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZjMjZiYzUtYTE2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nNVomPsSGVcfq0wQuiR1zvAJNqwO5QpoGNVUyUSZDoM=&emci=a1c26bc5-a163-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a6c26bc5-a163-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1771054)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: There’s NOT a 15X match
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
My campaign won’t resort to gimmicks
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bd7d7db950&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# There’s NOT a 15X match
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Patriot, You probably get hundreds of emails a day from candidates, causes and companies, all wanting your hard-earned money. And in Biden’s economy, your cash probably doesn’t stretch nearly as far as it used to under President Trump. Mine doesn’t either! That’s why I told my team in the beginning of this election, we will NOT use cheap fundraising tricks like 15X matching gifts – or giving away gift cards for donations like others – because I value your support so much. [**So, I’m asking directly and honestly, will you please contribute $20 today to help my campaign stay in this presidential race?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c29296b53f&e=0be619cbaa) We don’t have Billionaire benefactors, or lobbyists lining up to give to us from their PACs. We rely on conservative patriots to fund our campaign operation. With your help we’ve already:

* Received donations from nearly 70,000 unique individuals nationwide.
* Raised almost $1 million in small dollar donations.
* Put the RNC on notice about their deceptive debate qualification practices.

I’ve also spoken to thousands about the issues that other candidates are scared to talk about, such as:

* The epidemic of fatherlessness in the Black community.
* My proposal to FIRE liberal, Soros-funded district attorneys, and
* Rejecting the idea that America is systematically racist.

And if you want me to continue to fight for you and our shared values, I need you to continue to support my campaign. [**Please contribute $20 or more today, so we can ensure we have the funds to continue to spread the messages that will help bring prosperity to all Americans, not just the folks in the D.C. beltway.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=22024aa530&e=0be619cbaa) Your support, as always, means the world to me. I can’t thank you enough. For America,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---

If the election were held today, who would you vote for? | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: DLCC Grassroots Outreach Team
subject: Voting in Virginia is underway...
body:
Election Day is just 33 days away, voters are already casting their ballots in Virginia, and we still have work to do – but we need your help. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Election Day is 33 days away, and voters are already casting their ballots in Virginia. ** State legislative campaigns are often overlooked and have tight budgets, despite being the last line of defense to fight back against GOP extremism – so your donation at this ballot level will have an outsized impact:
* **A gift of $7** could buy 10 clipboards for organizers
* **A gift of $25** could pay for 1,000 people to see a digital ad
* **A gift of $50** could mobilize hundreds more voters
* **And a gift of $100 could _make or break_ our chances of winning in November**

[Will you chip in $7 right now to ensure we have the resources necessary to defeat state Republicans ahead of Election Day?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrEhox7HrzimFiKPn8qCNt7VAI5o0RthY99b6Ph3uqDq9uvTaBeOfs6fpAzaOwxaN6sl5LUaEnCi3_IlKkD1GrFJ0d6BbKzS44R63tjlztsrEQBVdPMyxoQ4pWyquop6uBXZ10E-WD9eeSlIWrUCwX__XCSWTp72qOXcyqVjCUWxxTA8RwZd7Wo9ERAghsUADcalnPlXGY2Y_vySMkiAdn3EQLv1ULp-_-HpxcT78WBVjxlRPY2op9ZJf8n9nGN0d28PylYAm-QJXQr4sAa8xCueEt91GoHQ-sfjYhlPElYTc-NlI8gcZZSpOMph9M78gZBHOnaSVor3onflMOE0VngMJz5Q-XmIZTAc6GhtXR1KUECMRCeg18hHfA5Gr2pj_wwfleg-ldVZ5EZRBMXcy2nl_OxtChQVKlHPy7_hIUpVzfvPM4kZiLAEnW6T_CpCucMCdn5kdmTU6PstfsprB4JqvPOHTqY5Sv17Xd4DYFppONidcCe025GETzVYsAKptoRg/406/ILDvupKSRZCx8zjZig5w1A/h0/pRQASo_2hGyEisVH6TGMR07Ik-ZkfzqIpktWqumwOgU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: One of the 5 most likely seats to flip
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| You need to see this:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1284%2E35263%2EcXAggh)
Peter — You need to see this: **_The Hill_ named Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat as one of the 5 most likely to flip. Make no mistake: Kari Lake is dangerous. A former TV anchor, she’s a statewide celebrity who has been called “Trumpism’s leading lady.” She aggressively pushes Trump’s Big Lie, consistently promotes debunked conspiracy theories and has invited Q-Anon ‘activists’ into her campaign, and she’s in favor of a total ban against all abortion.

And here’s another thing: the **Republicans WANT Sinema to run.** They like their odds better in a three-way race than if they had to face Gallego one-on-one. **They’re betting on Sinema taking too many votes from Gallego, letting Kari Lake or another GOP candidate sneak by.**
That’s why we’re going to keep doing everything we can, right now, to keep educating voters about Sinema’s *real* record of corruption and obstruction, while also explaining **the danger that Kari Lake poses**.
**This is going to be a very tight, VERY expensive race. It’s going to take a lot of time and resources to defeat Kari Lake AND keep Sinema from taking valuable votes****.**[**Help us do everything we can to help Ruben Gallego win this seat, chip in now>>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zs6PamaJYUFvOFgQGIjTK4z6TQiXSpsyef1F8gLbDr7ADXP3oyW_lyIN4JjUh1MIntRiLAIm3KayftXBdUdVS7qU6ZFY6ZQTgoeM4HDBN2uEgtl_yoVEtLaZLQMpI-yu5wBTdGiDnwULsOHkrsZZqPnpQeYf2YJVeF2U14qHPpjDkiYKTV0LfrEF1bF6U6BJd6HhoKFsjcolX6Q03wRzI8ZHzQEgELuMw1Uk0lB9yp5_ix0D02kTjYTiPy7HOmqvEQ9bgL96fCyWCsMyxIcqsoHAEdjJq85pfRnouga73OtmIU6ByPhs2F9Z1VJTc7yH5zbafJ9EHKFVtu_1tphdlJ/406/LD0yStuiRNiFtylQZUJ70w/h9/ml_56eU2kJSZzw71rMmFkJYgcz1_wNzS_jjlbRRKxl0)****

body:
his stunning request...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)
---
**WOW! WOW! WOW!** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD) Special Counsel Jack Smith is seeking a gag order against Donald Trump to stop him from intimidating and harassing witnesses! _**YES!!**_

This is a huge step toward discovering the TRUTH & holding Trump accountable – _without a gag order, Trump could intimidate witnesses to his crimes!_ But Republicans are FURIOUS, so we’re launching a public opinion poll:
**[Do you approve of the proposed gag order against Donald Trump?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)** | **[YES »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)**
---
**[NO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)**
**[I’M NOT SURE YET »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)**
**We need 500 responses from your state for valid data, or else our results will be tossed out. Please respond within 3 minutes of receipt!**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231005_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20264%2E4449941%2EC8bQbD)
Thank you,

– Fight for Reform

Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.

Tate sure loves to flap his gums about himself. But when it’s time to prove his record, he hides. Why won’t Tate jump on stage before November and show the public that he’s the best choice for our state? It’s simple: he’s not.

❌ Tate routinely turns a blind eye to the issues that matter—our hospitals, healthcare, our economy, and the water crisis in Jackson, to name a few.
❌ He’s also caught in the middle of the worst public corruption scandal in state history.
❌ He puts special interests time and again over the good folks of our state.

His record speaks volumes.

Unlike Tate Reeves, Brandon believes that Mississippi voters deserve to hear straight from the candidates for Governor. And he’s not afraid to defend his record.

Brandon is well-known for standing up for the little guy against special interests. He isn't afraid to ruffle a few feathers to deliver results for the hardworking people and families of Mississippi.

clean_body: They don't want you to be a part of the fight | | | Peter, I need your immediate attention. I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs **for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight . I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and | The Lobbyists and Special Interests want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM! I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU! I’ve got more enemies than ever, just because I won’t bend the knee. Stand with me. ** Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz | | | | | | ../../../private/var/folders/r/prmwhjj3zq7czqp52lmjdcw0000gn/T/com.microsoft.Outlook/Outlook Temp/%unsubscribe_url%

But today, I’m humbly asking if you will chip in your support to help fuel my campaign and DEFEND my seat against the Left’s attacks. SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS Your support, even if it is just $1 will make a big difference, Peter. SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS CHIP IN $1 Thank you, – Congresswoman Jen Kiggans JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: They just keep slithering after Fani.

body:
Peter,

Only a week after a judge - herself an elected official - upheld Senate Bill 92, the law that lets Georgia legislators oust prosecutors elected by the people, radical GOP members are encouraging people to file complaints against Fani Willis.

They’re also trying to hire a director for their panel, the “Prosecuting Attorneys Qualification Commission,” a name that sounds like it was chosen from George Orwell’s 1984 .

Even Brian Kemp thinks these actions are ridiculous. But he still does nothing to bring the radical wing of the GOP into line.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action Oct. 5: Where do we go from here?
body:
| | |
---
With the ouster of Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, the focus for the next week or so will be electing a new Speaker. Jim Jordan and Steve Scalise have both announced they will run for Speaker. Tom Emmer and Byron Donalds are two other names that have been mentioned as possible candidates, but neither of them have officially announced. The election for Speaker will occur next Wednesday, October 11th. _**[Complete this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._hTdNti1wOuiIE0HaONFQ)** to tell us what you want to see from the next Speaker._ So, what happened? At the end of the day, McCarthy made specific commitments in January to get enough votes to become Speaker. He did not fully deliver, and was held accountable for that. He knew and agreed to those rules ahead of time. Most conservatives can agree that he did not deliver on some of his most important promises, even if they disagree over whether or not it was strategically smart to oust him. The next Speaker must have the integrity to faithfully adhere to the principles and promises agreed to in January by McCarthy and the conservatives, and any others that arise over the course of this week.
---
[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Critically, the next Speaker must agree to keep the motion to vacate. If that is gone, it will never be reinstated. If that happens, it will severely limit accountability of the speaker in the future, not necessarily this Congress but future Congresses. [**You can read my post**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) about how to prevent a motion to vacate with the slim majority – keep your promises, do what you said you would do. If you agree, please like and repost it. There will possibly be an effort to eliminate the motion to vacate and we need as much public pressure starting now to keep it in place. We will update you with a list of all the principles that must be included, and that will likely be next week’s call to action. We will want to ensure that whoever the next Speaker is, he agrees to uphold the principles the conservative grassroots support – principles that are necessary to save America. Please keep an eye on your email over the rest of this week, over the weekend, and at the beginning of next week, as we will have a call to action for you to help conservatives get the right Speaker of the House elected. **Don’t forget to complete this form to tell us what you want to see from the next Speaker!** Thank you for all you do! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: | | | With the ouster of Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, the focus for the next week or so will be electing a new Speaker. Jim Jordan and Steve Scalise have both announced they will run for Speaker. Tom Emmer and Byron Donalds are two other names that have been mentioned as possible candidates, but neither of them have officially announced. The election for Speaker will occur next Wednesday, October 11th. to tell us what you want to see from the next Speaker. So, what happened? At the end of the day, McCarthy made specific commitments in January to get enough votes to become Speaker. He did not fully deliver, and was held accountable for that. He knew and agreed to those rules ahead of time. Most conservatives can agree that he did not deliver on some of his most important promises, even if they disagree over whether or not it was strategically smart to oust him. The next Speaker must have the integrity to faithfully adhere to the principles and promises agreed to in January by McCarthy and the conservatives, and any others that arise over the course of this week. Critically, the next Speaker must agree to keep the motion to vacate. If that is gone, it will never be reinstated. If that happens, it will severely limit accountability of the speaker in the future, not necessarily this Congress but future Congresses. about how to prevent a motion to vacate with the slim majority – keep your promises, do what you said you would do. If you agree, please like and repost it. There will possibly be an effort to eliminate the motion to vacate and we need as much public pressure starting now to keep it in place. We will update you with a list of all the principles that must be included, and that will likely be next week’s call to action. We will want to ensure that whoever the next Speaker is, he agrees to uphold the principles the conservative grassroots support – principles that are necessary to save America. Please keep an eye on your email over the rest of this week, over the weekend, and at the beginning of next week, as we will have a call to action for you to help conservatives get the right Speaker of the House elected. Don’t forget to complete this form to tell us what you want to see from the next Speaker! Thank you for all you do! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71000180/430979122/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYxOTY3NDQtYTY2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFIkOj3n9t7Vu3IKAGIq_R1QSJZ2jdINdj6dqCGWAeQ=)
Hi there,

Last week, I reached out about my signing of the Arizona Abortion Initiative alongside Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. This petition is the first step of many in guaranteeing women have access to abortion and reproductive healthcare in our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71000183/430979124/-1394212765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYxOTY3NDQtYTY2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFIkOj3n9t7Vu3IKAGIq_R1QSJZ2jdINdj6dqCGWAeQ=&emci=7971ae76-b462-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=56196744-a663-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=626985)
I am a lifelong supporter of a woman’s right to choose. One of the reasons I launched this campaign was because after Roe v. Wade was overturned, I refused to stand idly by while the GOP launched attack after attack on our fundamental rights.

**Remember: My opponent David Schweikert wants to ban abortion without any exceptions -- even for rape or incest.** He recently voted to make it nearly impossible for women to access the FDA-approved abortion pill mifepristone. As the only woman and mother in this race, I am furious at the thought of my girls growing up with fewer rights than I did -- I will fight like hell to stop Schweikert and protect a woman’s right to choose.

[**So today, I’m asking for your support in making abortion accessible in Arizona and the entire country. Schweikert and the GOP’s votes on this issue are unacceptable, and I’m counting on 500 signatures on my petition today to prove to them that we will never back down.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71000186/430979127/-1394212765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTYxOTY3NDQtYTY2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFIkOj3n9t7Vu3IKAGIq_R1QSJZ2jdINdj6dqCGWAeQ=&emci=7971ae76-b462-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=56196744-a663-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=626985)

Marlene

[Will you pitch in today to help?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71000207/430979154/1944870756?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlMTk2NzQ0LWE2NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_vVK1Ehx4hXwDD0si5X_ij6xJKtE-cmb6lwf4uGpHrg=&emci=7eaad1cd-a363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=4e196744-a663-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We asked our supporters to share why they invest in OLCV. Here’s what Bonnie New (Hood River, OR) had to say: _In my mind, the most impactful way to advance environmental and conservation objectives is legislative. And particularly at this time, action at the state level is critical. OLCV has a robust process for evaluating and supporting candidates for state level office, and an equally robust system of tracking and reporting their environment-related voting records (the scorecard). I use both OLCV's candidate endorsements and the annual scorecard to inform my own voting as well as my local political activism.**If you're wanting to see action on environment and conservation in Oregon, invest in OLCV. **_ From passing pro-environment and pro-climate legislation, to making sure we elect the right people to office, to holding our leaders accountable through our Environmental Scorecard–**none of our work would be possible without the help of grassroots supporters like you.** We’re gearing up for a big election year in 2024 and your support right now is critical to ensure that we have the resources we need to elect climate and environmental champions to office. clean_body: | Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw April’s email from the other day. For this week only, a generous donor is matching all donations to OLCV and DOUBLE matching new monthly gifts! 2024 is going to be a big election year, and we need your support now to build the resources we need to elect climate champions. With sincere gratitude, Jane Kwon, OLCV Communications Coordinator | | Dear Peter, This week only, a generous donor has offered to match all donations to OLCV and DOUBLE match all new monthly donations! We can only accomplish our mission – protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected officials accountable – with the help of OLCV members like you. We asked our supporters to share why they invest in OLCV. Here’s what Bonnie New (Hood River, OR) had to say: In my mind, the most impactful way to advance environmental and conservation objectives is legislative. And particularly at this time, action at the state level is critical. OLCV has a robust process for evaluating and supporting candidates for state level office, and an equally robust system of tracking and reporting their environment-related voting records (the scorecard). I use both OLCV's candidate endorsements and the annual scorecard to inform my own voting as well as my local political activism.If you're wanting to see action on environment and conservation in Oregon, invest in OLCV. From passing pro-environment and pro-climate legislation, to making sure we elect the right people to office, to holding our leaders accountable through our Environmental Scorecard–none of our work would be possible without the help of grassroots supporters like you. We’re gearing up for a big election year in 2024 and your support right now is critical to ensure that we have the resources we need to elect climate and environmental champions to office. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely, April Christenson, OLCV Development Director | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. subject: What the GOP wants

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71000466/430979817/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFmMDZjMy1hNjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXCPXL75jH_l35kebfbzfmiok7dJC91_p5qFqedG5m0=&emci=f3a583c9-9d63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=28af06c3-a663-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | While the GOP’s priorities might seem clear as mud, they’re actually crystal clear (and they’re **_disastrous_**).

Their main objectives: tax cuts for their wealthy donors, a national abortion ban, and no more funding for the programs everyday Georgians rely on.

This devastating agenda was on full display this weekend when the GOP tried to pass a funding bill that would have slashed funding by 30% for medical research for cancer, nutrition aid for pregnant mothers, housing subsidies for the poor, the EPA, NASA, DOJ and law enforcement, toxic waste cleanup, and employment training for disadvantaged communities.

**Eight Georgia Republicans voted for that bill, and the ninth didn’t vote for it _because it didn’t go far enough._**

**Peter, we need to flip control of Congress. Rather than fund programs that hardworking Georgians rely on, Republicans in Congress put their extreme agenda first and are unable to work with their colleagues for the good of the country.** **_[Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to help us flip control of Congress and help us return the House to a functioning, collaborative governmental body?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71000467/430979818/710125701?refcode=20231005.1_GAPU_10E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFmMDZjMy1hNjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXCPXL75jH_l35kebfbzfmiok7dJC91_p5qFqedG5m0=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Hi Team, I didn’t want you to miss this. We FAILED to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal last week. Right now, our Democrat opponents are bringing in MAJOR money as we’re falling behind. I know I can trust you, so I’m’ reaching out to you with a high-priority ask. We can’t let the Democrats control the Senate for two more years. They’ve already done unimaginable damage to our great country with their far-Left agenda. And if they take Josh’s seat, they’ll be able to do even MORE damage. This is our last chance to catch up and build our war chest after we missed our first goal, and I’m counting on patriots like you to step up. Thank you,Team Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: SURVEY: How are you feeling about Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2cmpLanS5w7PSglxwefZ6TMEfgPpBaU6JZiBqAcJj2-osLjN18eQxKSADzxrNTXUL4pVKdc7ocbaBwEg9WB7NJxNsMrzLJpVsf3lW6QZrOIxAE6___kBGhHUiooF_MZMEAY8i8-w_J6iWM-55c2KcHaP4pumFAFgDIvcf1zkxfWTAiXG9jwWLobntSur5TzZsYdXbwYvFsVc3GV3K5P6ShlM1_ug7M48AB2JgZZWEG3agw2PJT9yp87vgbFbcP4zMjdaxBgJ5a3mrs-kkFQTmpLpU7PsmlW3BXbDtW0jUmZy8dIPCbYztL7YBHp3ti2MpZu9iLJudBSSt6eQ5XUOoO3DBtpN0o8X6AdUQuykN2NA/406/3xmLcMapS1eFx8h82_k4AQ/h0/RE1DFzxVxF0l4LgZb44nVbkUIHAIu7R7N-RgQ729bm8)
---
Peter,

There isn’t a day that passes that I don’t reflect on the honor of having your trust.
For decades it was as your meteorologist, looking out for families in bad weather. And now, it’s with the privilege and responsibility as your representative in my home state and for my hometown.

While it’s not lost on me that the politics of hate and division have taken over the halls of Congress, and the dysfunction of Republican leadership has led to countless near-shutdowns and distractions, I believe the light of tomorrow is brighter. I will never stop believing that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences.

**[That’s why it’s so important that I periodically stop to see how you’re feeling about everything going on, and what issues you’d like me to prioritize. If you can, I’d appreciate if you’d take this brief survey letting me know your thoughts.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnnbr9LLld_MWG7x1GQq-4dcsrvclCb0qOMCZrCEl5sscPk8LOafbRgwX1wQ_x4TOgR59xYYMg6ATzNvieqrdKDtHH-XZYwwMH-IfqF3zZ5jjCUSGtEUQziZLi_eRWEvCo2hlLVCQL7k0m4ajGel3erJPzmZmT-5cS4EqRr4DCQJ5jFWKuDKgxAMC1KOEIBTgYaVWfEi1NxW3c6gAAeI2OTlLDnWtmYbS235S63Crd5ToufhCBu1iMjSYsc4U66-YqUJZuNRHs2CcxnvAFRpZBG5LbQdDaXo9Q4SXgtta-n8Q/406/3xmLcMapS1eFx8h82_k4AQ/h1/x5SKBemX37oBsj4iIUkxMo7-HDPIkk1oPjIqw6HCyYc)**
---
[ **Take The Survey** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnnbr9LLld_MWG7x1GQq-4dcsrvclCb0qOMCZrCEl5ssSTvURNs16mUbDksnBfR2PK-eySSGiCWB1loviQ54iNkJh58VRv8YKLoH48gQj2_zayhlC1JNI7rBhiBHWIeDB79tIL-LGrr0jSb6PRB-AvukEkIKpxx5Cfx3t3F11IH9reQAr_gr9Rfe3iFfLJy9jG5kPxfXoHidz3Cng-vw_37Tjz50tH7j3Ak6oHlxNDNmM4TqumMW3TZLoYYv70xnF2H4GctYWVADAesKmXMLafP5P8bxZy37RRAFmgW25N9YQ/406/3xmLcMapS1eFx8h82_k4AQ/h2/-1m3H8AxvP_eD6HvZ91tcGqJvjtYSu_05S0yEuLvG8o)
---
I regularly come into the Capitol rotunda and sit by myself at night. I usually sit on the bench right next to the statue of Abraham Lincoln, who also served Illinois in the House of Representatives.

Sometimes I come here and sit for a few minutes. Sometimes I need an hour or more.

And of all the times, I’ve never been joined by another member of Congress. I’d welcome the company of a colleague to break the silence. But the silence of this building really has a lot to say if you take the time to listen.

**[More importantly, I want to make time to listen to you. Please fill out my quick survey letting me know your biggest priorities for the months ahead.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnnbr9LLld_MWG7x1GQq-4dcsrvclCb0qOMCZrCEl5ssex93FHFL0tBFmWU5bz7afnSyhHBOVSM6XAHezf9ZUsaAQeDfbvThROA8tQoZoBRkpku-2pbm6rZn6p-aNe-wLVIxrKL4XqXR3AbzqYmYxfyidS-a35h15NQnKZ1zc4Y9dsmqQpNvvliJRBaUA3o-qJAcyqoczJ2RG4rC7Vyv8ob_BnTMJYQWSE-dr520Igkc0CRS3W4l5L1Xuvgm6KhN2vukXdew94a9UBw_OmqcuC4G5o56rE9sfOL8TJCWIFa8g/406/3xmLcMapS1eFx8h82_k4AQ/h3/JYEqmOBPoz85NnmMnW8CzLZwj8FajlKCw0iD4yKDlVs)**
---
[ **Take The Survey** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnnbr9LLld_MWG7x1GQq-4dcsrvclCb0qOMCZrCEl5ssTn7CM2F7heCZ7UXgId1EB3NdmWDILYCyp6hkZ7YbzDXVwH-Vk0taLU_EejlSgjFKuPQ3-HWClhrkLQQiD3TrIUpBhBYAAMxC79Di6oCbs5zyP0NA5T6jjOiaY0AfNd74KlC4g0aYCCoSxfY8VDhK59kg33H-IOstfhi3F9sbiZQtORFrY5b5XBNKzv5L5IGw6wxpI-mJ8y2DKtSq_bbU-ZLs_wmCHhET9acHGvRugZbX5cFkqjub07WVFhOnrdR8w/406/3xmLcMapS1eFx8h82_k4AQ/h4/YRmZ06RMJjb_n6dKwKMOWVJSUSDIhH8_MJ2ucGgoMHQ)

All my best,

Eric

clean_body: | | Peter, There isn’t a day that passes that I don’t reflect on the honor of having your trust. For decades it was as your meteorologist, looking out for families in bad weather. And now, it’s with the privilege and responsibility as your representative in my home state and for my hometown. While it’s not lost on me that the politics of hate and division have taken over the halls of Congress, and the dysfunction of Republican leadership has led to countless near-shutdowns and distractions, I believe the light of tomorrow is brighter. I will never stop believing that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. I regularly come into the Capitol rotunda and sit by myself at night. I usually sit on the bench right next to the statue of Abraham Lincoln, who also served Illinois in the House of Representatives. Sometimes I come here and sit for a few minutes. Sometimes I need an hour or more. And of all the times, I’ve never been joined by another member of Congress. I’d welcome the company of a colleague to break the silence. But the silence of this building really has a lot to say if you take the time to listen. All my best, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars.

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c7fdfefea8804ba0bf6b12ee1a73cea3&_e=5HGlls21Kq-ACcizxNE_QAtKpSEXlumEiZGaJmmSedmlN7JJkjLKeNaNzeuiwPu_kqlCShtOWSyrCthWPOngZ3c9aXEc8PsPOQAmBIzfTUfb0zMkZVSVxWrgLhm3CuR6I-q9msEwvoohIVBsJ4mWExphSbXhAgA-SUzucOz-KS6Jztk1FgEI44T97iKnUKBxQexymd9QtF_dfoiLoSRyBO9pv5uNYEPTU7wC2AVkJ97vBBqZATL6oWD_eB6Ccidlqp3JqkBPbC2WqRZjMQqLRJ9Ox4iQdTWkRQApLDDAACds-rh0URouSNEIqay5FpWDulFKH9QVmRczylAX5SSjJH-6gmK4iS93i4iTUyZa2hxp36oRddb0G0FDeEdg686iMkhgONe94up3UasyxTVGQw%3D%3D)**.

**[I’m coming to you today to let you know that we’re aiming to raise $886 today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c7fdfefea8804ba0bf6b12ee1a73cea3&_e=5HGlls21Kq-ACcizxNE_QAtKpSEXlumEiZGaJmmSedmlN7JJkjLKeNaNzeuiwPu_kqlCShtOWSyrCthWPOngZ3c9aXEc8PsPOQAmBIzfTUfb0zMkZVSVxWrgLhm3CuR6I-q9msEwvoohIVBsJ4mWExphSbXhAgA-SUzucOz-KS6Jztk1FgEI44T97iKnUKBxQexymd9QtF_dfoiLoSRyBO9pv5uNYEPTU7wC2AVkJ95zASYFJxX-mgX1ia-OzaP4T_vvKBmvUOA3rQw37L1QG1MK_GU84ufy6Ilxh8y-T6ms0hxPlKTt1LXOQZxwOLDevLxAmjpHDUV97KigxTFNdvbusiqNmSmBXLCp03IZvn4VTcv5-cjLMipLcG5nWmsUlQszd3nV8hOKr1pWziN7Hg%3D%3D)**.

Divide that by 55 and we just need you and 54 other patriots to **chip in $16** before midnight.

[**HELP ME HIT MY $886 GOAL TODAY ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c7fdfefea8804ba0bf6b12ee1a73cea3&_e=5HGlls21Kq-ACcizxNE_QAtKpSEXlumEiZGaJmmSedmlN7JJkjLKeNaNzeuiwPu_kqlCShtOWSyrCthWPOngZ3c9aXEc8PsPOQAmBIzfTUfb0zMkZVSVxWrgLhm3CuR6I-q9msEwvoohIVBsJ4mWExphSbXhAgA-SUzucOz-KS6Jztk1FgEI44T97iKnUKBxQexymd9QtF_dfoiLoSRyBO9pv5uNYEPTU7wC2AVkJ94kB6sH2vyha4pO06Q4ef3WMQLXan4fSUj29bWSIJmM0MFDRsKJWc5peXUKaHfxL_LpxirPO39MdddC8K_aWRyz7h7f-VUYd5gWXXRVDuAN_idfM-1ElHQgoLJrTgNrPiK9n-yElh6j1Rpk985uHqe7VJsXt846tLvRZfM3fRj0Lg%3D%3D)

No matter how much dysfunction we see on the Republican side of the aisle, Kim’s ready to keep delivering results for the people of WA-08. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71001681/430983115/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEyMzUwNC1hOTYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXy6-s3NdecYAm9zjC_IkstwLXt6CuNuCQHcRob9IY4=&emci=7f6858bb-9463-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=cd123504-a963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

The House Republican caucus has been in complete chaos, Peter.

First, they led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then on Tuesday, Matt Gaetz and his MAGA friends led the effort to remove their own Speaker – _for the first time in American history._

**No matter how much dysfunction we see on the Republican side of the aisle, Kim’s ready to keep working in a bipartisan way to deliver results for the people of WA-08.**

As we look ahead to the rest of the year, we have a lot of work ahead of us – from lowering costs to keeping our government open. That’s why Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team.

**[Will you take our Priorities Survey and share with Kim what issues you'd most like to see Congress address this year →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71001687/430983118/922920128?ms=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&refcode=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&source=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ru41g+rmP9cxbwvbVSkhi+mEWZmUrlk6o/hqi/ayZDseDT1PQyphMs6nUF6JfJtiTpPFoSXrH9LD3clVvM12DKLotQy3Z+z2iKeCtISFOHxIhCmrPdVU3scoq1j+eDHFBKYlWgMsQ8sct2430Dlm2VTcE5OKgzQEMpn7AgSV4pw=&refcode2=cd123504-a963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEyMzUwNC1hOTYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXy6-s3NdecYAm9zjC_IkstwLXt6CuNuCQHcRob9IY4=&emci=7f6858bb-9463-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=cd123504-a963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71001690/430983122/922920128?ms=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&refcode=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&source=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231005_PS_esrv_gq_act___DKS4C_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ru41g+rmP9cxbwvbVSkhi+mEWZmUrlk6o/hqi/ayZDseDT1PQyphMs6nUF6JfJtiTpPFoSXrH9LD3clVvM12DKLotQy3Z+z2iKeCtISFOHxIhCmrPdVU3scoq1j+eDHFBKYlWgMsQ8sct2430Dlm2VTcE5OKgzQEMpn7AgSV4pw=&refcode2=cd123504-a963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEyMzUwNC1hOTYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXy6-s3NdecYAm9zjC_IkstwLXt6CuNuCQHcRob9IY4=&emci=7f6858bb-9463-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=cd123504-a963-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: No matter how much dysfunction we see on the Republican side of the aisle, Kim’s ready to keep delivering results for the people of WA-08. The House Republican caucus has been in complete chaos, Peter. First, they led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then on Tuesday, Matt Gaetz and his MAGA friends led the effort to remove their own Speaker – for the first time in American history. No matter how much dysfunction we see on the Republican side of the aisle, Kim’s ready to keep working in a bipartisan way to deliver results for the people of WA-08. As we look ahead to the rest of the year, we have a lot of work ahead of us – from lowering costs to keeping our government open. That’s why Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Friend, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In case you haven't heard, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott in Florida. I'm also an immigrant from Ecuador, a gun safety advocate, a former Congresswoman, and a proud mom.
**I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my campaign. ([If you're ready to give now, you can click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71002887/430985610/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk183-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ZiNzQwYjUtYTk2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L7ik4LFUnnZP8WTt0SyOUI7GVqgoxn6HQOwJASfuDIk=)) **But first, let me explain why I'm asking and what's at stake:
* Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous senators in Washington. He wrote the plan to ****raise taxes** on working families and end Medicare and Social Security. **And he's supported a nationwide**ban on abortions.**
* Rick Scott only won this seat by 0.12% last time around — and he had to shell out $64 MILLION of his own money to do it.** Now, a recent poll shows our race is already statistically tied.**
* Election experts are saying that if I win,**Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.** If not, we could easily lose control.

body:

_[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-zm?source=em231005-90do&refcode2=487_8507_1wxrus&akid=487%2E8507%2E1wxrus)

| | Patriot,

---
This week, as you watched yours truly stand trial as a completely innocent man, you’ve seen exactly what the Radical Democrats' endgame really is...
---
A pursuit of _absolute_ power at the expense of our free Republic, our Constitution, and not just my civil liberties, but _YOUR_ _freedom_ as well.
---
The power-drunk Democrats, TERRIFIED by the latest polls that show us LEADING Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS, will do anything – _truly, anything_ – to destroy the one man who can and will defeat Biden in 2024.
---
**_They wrongfully impeach me and raid my home. They indict me, unlawfully arrest me, and even force me to take a mugshot. They’re attempting to strip me of my livelihood and take away my incredible business. They want to harass my family and take away my home, Trump Tower. And now, they’re trying to GAG me for the rest of the election to prevent me from even criticizing Crooked Joe._**
---
**... _All of this to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE!_ **

---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what is happening to the America they left us – _once the freest country in the world_.
---
But these Deep State thugs truly are monsters...
---
They would trade our Republic for a tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat if it meant an everlasting grip on power.
---
And mark my words, if they succeed at INTERFERING in this election, in the FINAL BATTLE for our country, America will never be the same.
---
**But I promise you this: The one thing these crooks, thugs, and fools can**** _NEVER_****contend with is a movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots peacefully declaring that they will****NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER****our country to Third World Marxist tyranny!**
---
_If you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, believe me, I completely understand. In that case, please don’t even think about donating. I mean it!_
---
_But if you can contribute even just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to show that you too will NEVER SURRENDER, then God knows our country needs YOU now more than ever. _

DeSantis Campaign Updates

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3125d8a8248a46978e6dd62f05de6658&_e=WddKd8Mm_dIaK6IDwih-ba54Td-FWzp2Y83VJsNWLf0KXRvFfV__Eq01LWknwKA00ZGub6TG3kZKmvN7ZguDOZdaE-Dz6Pg5M4oFAH5LGg8nVAU688sWTR_UWSvuxYCdi9aGfkxfkSQ_4KtwTZnp-tdXoSOMlGZSbK3MFbmK8kso2iUONJi_ZcIbmtPkO7OjutlJvbGqOgii0J1JOgNUNA6r45gXY5SsQleYOHtKG074Q4RuYwral0_tqNG_2-c7zKhw5bNOQNcFFiJBzXfxnx3raPFLNCpZ_EH2VPi2se-MUAihpTlWdWUl5i1GcomHObwUD-2gLl2hAvHfVEopyei81fRvF6P-RzWaAj7zJX8s8zzQrSMPUSUnL8H1WTKG11Rm3BWcM37AlwikQHLMqg%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3125d8a8248a46978e6dd62f05de6658&_e=WddKd8Mm_dIaK6IDwih-ba54Td-FWzp2Y83VJsNWLf0KXRvFfV__Eq01LWknwKA00ZGub6TG3kZKmvN7ZguDOZdaE-Dz6Pg5M4oFAH5LGg8nVAU688sWTR_UWSvuxYCdi9aGfkxfkSQ_4KtwTZnp-tdXoSOMlGZSbK3MFbmK8kso2iUONJi_ZcIbmtPkO7OjutlJvbGqOgii0J1JOgNUNA6r45gXY5SsQleYOHtKG074Q4RuYwral0_tqNG_2-c7B7Ol_wusd50ypRjJQMbciLhjJUOPMTwGYbyC79wWpVk8M2OJrfuYw1QBDkIPBRmHzAp9BTraV4rbTHnRGFNz4v16q-SqhQD2cMCqVSPLM_j8VmiHi1sZVU93kSQocllwynclFxhT6zuqx2E8oq3bJw%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

subject: Yes, I’m still running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
Before I comment on Governor Newsom’s pick to serve out Senator Feinstein’s remaining term, I want to make something crystal clear. I am 100% RUNNING FOR THE FULL-TIME SEAT.
Senator-designate Butler is an incredible choice to serve out Senator Feinstein's remaining term. I am thrilled that California's next Senator has spent her entire career fighting for women and girls and has been a fierce advocate for working people. Ultimately, the choice in this election is whether Californians want a Senator that offers the politics as usual playbook or leaders with a track record of making things work at scale, an understanding of technology, and a track record of building pathways to good-family sustaining jobs.
Senator-Designate Butler is not running for the full-time seat, but I am and need as much support as possible. Will you please consider making a donation and joining our movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
Lexi Reese for Senate
PO Box 620780
Woodside, CA 94062
United States

Laura has what it takes to fight for a just and equitable clean energy future across the country. Receiving the support of one of the largest environmental advocacy organizations in the world confirms that Laura is the only choice for CA-30 for a cleaner, greener future.

After all, Laura has passed legislation to reduce climate pollution from commercial and residential buildings in the state by 40% by 2030; modernize water management; ban toxic chemicals in commercial products; phase out single-use plastic by 2032; and prioritize wildlife connectivity infrastructure such as wildlife crossings.

And at a time when extreme weather caused by climate change is ravishing forests, food and water supplies, and communities nationwide, we need that environmental champion in Congress.

[**We are excited to see this dream alliance coming together to send a California environmental champion to Washington, but we need your help to build on this momentum. Would you donate $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71012769/430993181/-1415976427?refcode=em-10.05.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjg3Zjg2MzAtYjA2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wAXlA8le6waGNiOSW7UtWKQDFujbLi2uceOcxf5qY3M=)

clean_body: | = Friend, We are very excited for this update: Laura’s campaign has been endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund! = = | **= Laura has what it takes to fight for a just and equitable clean energy future across the country. Receiving the support of one of the largest environmental advocacy organizations in the world confirms that Laura is the only choice for CA-30 for a cleaner, greener future. After all, Laura has passed legislation to reduce climate pollution from commercial and residential buildings in the state by 40% by 2030; modernize water management; ban toxic chemicals in commercial products; phase out single-use plastic by 2032; and prioritize wildlife connectivity infrastructure such as wildlife crossings. And at a time when extreme weather caused by climate change is ravishing forests, food and water supplies, and communities nationwide, we need that environmental champion in Congress. = Thanks for your continued support, Team Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: United Rural Democrats
subject: My Story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105722/images/logo%20gradient.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown]

Folks, before I ask you to chip in $25 today, I want to make sure you know exactly who and what you're supporting.

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. My parents taught me to work hard, be kind, and serve my community. So I've spent my life trying to do just that.

That means fighting in the Senate to raise the minimum wage, protect Social Security and Medicare, and hold big banks and corporations accountable for the damage they've done to workers and our economy. It means standing up for voting rights, reproductive rights, marriage equality, and more.

I want what most Americans want: to ensure our nation delivers on its promises. But right now, I need your help. Experts say that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and the only way I can defend my seat and keep up our progress is with your critical support. So please, will you chip in $25 or more right away?

I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, friend.

Politico reports that Ohio could decide Senate control, and Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top GOP target in 2024. That's why this race is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive in the country.

But unlike my GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this campaign – so I'm fully relying on $X and $2X donations from folks like you to power our movement to victory.

Please, will you chip in $25 or more now to help me win in Ohio, keep the Senate blue, and continue delivering for families across the country?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:

Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown?express_lane=true&amount=25]

Contribute $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown?express_lane=true&amount=35]

Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown?express_lane=true&amount=50]

Contribute $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdbrown?express_lane=true&amount=100]

Thanks for being on our team, friend. I'm humbled to have your support.

With gratitude,

[https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/fsp6gaZps8wTgjcd0vP0doojla43PZIGYFO7BXrxfafvu4x_0RNeJvROMptM56rXwsY6su5Ow4QiUhyT-0OL3ftcjza4IfByXa1DObGiKeW_6fPA5oG8IZtOHfogBYpMFSIXDoDRJni5tam5eFedvao]
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail&recurring=true]

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

In the past few years through our efforts in the State Legislature and in local offices, Democrats have taken Virginia from being one of the hardest states to vote into being the easiest. We became the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty and to legalize cannabis. And in the former heart of the confederacy, we have taken down the statues memorializing a racist, lost cause, and elected a formerly incarcerated, defense attorney and veteran as the first Black elected official to be leader of a major party in the House Delegates, Don Scott, and the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress (and former VAYD President), Jennifer McClellan. We have also had our setbacks these past couple years and we are in the midst of one of, if not the most important, elections in our lifetime. This year we are in an off year election where we don’t have any statewide offices or federal offices on the ballot, while all 140 seats in our General Assembly are up for grabs. This election will determine what happens to Virginia when it comes to being the last safe haven for abortion, gun safety, and voting rights in the South. It will determine whether or not that vest wearin’, no jump shot havin’, Larry Bird wannabe, Glenn Youngkin becomes a front runner for the GOP nomination in 2024. And it will be a bellwether for President Biden’s re-election chances. We will be featuring speakers from all over Virginia to talk about organizing for state races, organizing in rural areas, turning out voters in diverse and differing areas of the state, and running for office as a Young Dem. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Did you catch my piece in The Nation yesterday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you
catch my op-ed in The Nation yesterday?

I wanted to share a few key excerpts with you today:

As the organization that has led the work of getting progressives into
Congress through primary challenges, we know that one of the most important
progressive fights of this campaign cycle is protecting the incumbents we all
worked so hard to elect.

The right is banking on our underestimating their deep pockets and power. We
cannot blink. We must be unflinching about what we are facing and put serious
and substantial resources behind protecting the progress we have built.

Expanding our ranks to 20 or 30 members of unwavering progressives in Congress
is possible if we protect the infrastructure we have already built.

When, at the end of this cycle, our most crucial progressive voters,
supporters, and the press ask us “What happened?,” we should be able to tell
them we worked together to protect each other and what we’ve built together
over the last five years.

The alternative is a new class of right-wing-funded corporate Democrats
representing the bluest corners of our country. And we already have enough of
those.

Over the last 6 years, Justice Democrats has been leading the fight of
recruiting and electing progressive primary challengers to oust
out-of-touch, entrenched incumbents who only serve the establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138733?refcode=em20231005-31181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31181%2E1203867%2EfpILCs ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help ensure we have
the resources to help us re-elect the entire Justice Democrats Bloc in
2024? AIPAC is going to spend millions against us, so we have to be
prepared.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138733?refcode=em20231005-31181&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31181%2E1203867%2EfpILCs ]Contribute $3

Together we will continue to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=31181%2E1203867%2EfpILCs

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: How we can save Texas public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
On Monday, Governor Abbott will call legislators back to the Texas Capitol to pass a school voucher bill that would defund public schools to subsidize private education for the wealthy.
This is an existential threat to public education, and we have to be prepared to fight back.
**[Please join me on Instagram Live tonight at 7PM CT for a conversation with State Rep. James Talarico about why Abbott is pushing this voucher scheme, what’s at stake for our public schools in this moment, and how we can fight back over the next few weeks.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58632?t=1&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-)**
[****](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58632?t=2&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-)
**[JOIN US ON IG LIVE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58632?t=3&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-)**
In a state that ranks 43rd in the nation for education spending, and where underpaid teachers are leaving the profession in droves, Abbott’s voucher scheme will take even more money out of our kids’ classrooms to essentially give a tax break to wealthy parents.
A bipartisan coalition of state legislators blocked Abbott’s voucher plan during the regular legislative session that ended in May—but will they have the courage to stop him again during the upcoming special session?
**[Rep. Talarico—who sits on the Public Education Committee and is leading Democrats’ fight against vouchers in the Texas House—will help us understand the answer to this question. So please join us tonight at 7PM CT!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58632?t=4&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-)**
— Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231005-232920-footer&t=5&refcode2=232920_444211_7KEYr-&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=232920%2E444211%2E7KEYr-).

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A Republican Majority means chaos and dysfunction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
These egomaniacs are out of control.
Team,

This week, Republicans voted to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, marking the first time in history a sitting Speaker has been ousted. And while I won't shed a tear for McCarthy, this chaos comes at a cost for NY-17 constituents.

**From the moment Republicans retook power in the House, their leadership has been nothing short of dysfunctional.**

Rather than work to solve real issues our communities face, Republicans have focused on opening a baseless impeachment inquiry against President Joe Biden.

Just last week, Republicans nearly shut down our federal government, and amid that chaos, 90% of House Republicans (including Mike Lawler) voted for 30% cuts to law enforcement, Meals on Wheels, Head Start, and more.

And now, Republicans removed their own leader—leaving the House incapable of doing its work on behalf of the country.

The American people are paying the price. Instead of lower drug costs, housing that is affordable, or protections for fundamental rights like abortion, we get internecine squabbling from egomaniacs. Instead of passing a budget, we get a Speaker fight that’s messier than a toddler eating spaghetti.

**And let's be clear—Mike Lawler has enabled this chaos and MAGA extremism at every turn.** His election gave Republicans their majority. It’s time to put a stop to this madness. I’m running for Congress to defeat Mike Lawler and restore serious leadership in the House of Representatives. Are you with me?

[**Please chip in to help me flip NY-17 blue so we can retake the Democratic House majority and put an end to this disastrous Republican And now, Republicans removed their own leader—leaving the House incapable of doing its work on behalf of the country. The American people are paying the price. Instead of lower drug costs, housing that is affordable, or protections for fundamental rights like abortion, we get internecine squabbling from egomaniacs. Instead of passing a budget, we get a Speaker fight that’s messier than a toddler eating spaghetti. And let's be clear—Mike Lawler has enabled this chaos and MAGA extremism at every turn. His election gave Republicans their majority. It’s time to put a stop to this madness. I’m running for Congress to defeat Mike Lawler and restore serious leadership in the House of Representatives. Are you with me? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

body:
An amendment was introduced to create barriers to the ballot box.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71021755/431001146/234027159?refcode=EM_F_231005attack_N_PT_90DO_6_NG_TestA_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwYjM2MDk1LWI1NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ybu3uwY2VijlkAy1qrBtWJM4E1TO2JXbQlntyQx0Qak=)
| We have an urgent update, fellow activist.

This week, Senate Bill 224, a bill to set the Pennsylvania 2024 presidential Primary date, passed out of the PA House State Government Committee, allowing it to be brought up for a full House Floor vote.

**Here is the issue:** Republican Rep. Mehaffie introduced an amendment **requiring voters to show proof of identification every time they cast a ballot in person.**

The reason this bill was introduced was to accommodate voters who observe the Jewish holiday of Passover, which next year conflicts with the current primary date. It is disappointing that the House hijacked this bill to create barriers to the ballot box.

In response, NPP’s CEO Kadida Kenner, was quoted in _Spotlight PA_ stating, “New Pennsylvania Project is always going to be concerned about anything that puts an additional barrier in front of Pennsylvania voters. What we are concerned about as an organization is this is the beginning of how voting rights get chipped away.”

[**This amendment may be brought up for a vote THIS WEEK, and we need your help to fight back. We are working with our partners to mobilize public action against this bill and make it clear that we won’t stand for these attacks on our democracy. Help us stop this bill from passing the House by rushing $25 or more now subject: ICYMI: Josh Hawley isn’t “pro-worker”

body:
His actions speak louder than his words.
#
You’re gonna want to see this, Peter.
After Hawley desperately tried to convince Missourians that he’s “pro-worker” by showing up to a UAW picket line last month, the _St. Louis Post-Dispatch_ is holding him accountable — and they’re not mincing words:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37625?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37625?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_)**
**They’re not the only ones either.** _Business Insider_ just published a story about Hawley’s opposition to the PRO Act. And _The Intercept_ exposed Hawley for accepting campaign contributions from Ford and General Motors — the same massive corporations that UAW members are currently striking against.
Hawley’s actions speak for themselves. **He’s not “pro-worker” — he’s just a fraud who’s willing to say whatever it takes to keep power all to himself.**
Missourians deserve a real warrior for working people standing up for them in the U.S. Senate, not some politician who does one thing and says another just when it’s convenient for their re-election campaign.
**That’s why we need your help to elect Lucas Kunce.** Lucas is endorsed by the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, and dozens more statewide and union locals across our state — and he’s building his campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs or any corrupt executive responsible for exploiting workers and stripping our communities for parts.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever works best for you today so we can defeat Josh Hawley next year? Our campaign is entirely powered by real people like you, so any amount you can afford to give really makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37625?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37626?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37625?refcode=em20231005-3920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3920%2E614464%2EjZR74_)

Thank you so much,
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Olivia
subject: 🚨NEW MAP ALERT: The District Court just ordered the adoption of a new map in Alabama!🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

* * *
**🚨Breaking News: The District Court just ordered the adoption of a new map in Alabama!🚨**
* * *
A federal three-judge panel in Alabama has delivered a resounding win for fair representation by adopting a map that provides two opportunities for the black community to elect the candidate of their choosing. This monumental victory in Alabama sets a powerful precedent for fair maps across the nation. It is a testament to the resilience and tenacity of those who stood up for voters’ rights.
[**Help us keep up the fight for fair representation nationwide. ➡️**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71029505/431005757/-612435496?refcode=20231005_AOTL_F_ALMapsWin_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNWFiOWM2LWI5NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JyvcW3WInTRkE_QUWC9BzK4vwDTvJo4rsbjB5oJlvyM=)
_**Key triumphs of the new map:**_
1. **Empowering Black Alabamians:** The court's decision rectifies the prior map’s racial vote dilution, allowing Black Alabamians to elect their chosen representatives in two districts for the first time in history.
2. **Inclusive and Unified Districts:** The new map ensures fair representation with two districts having a Black voting age population above or near 50%.
3. **Geographic Unity:** The opportunity district unifies all 18 Black Belt counties, from Montgomery to Mobile.

* * *
_ [**"One year from now, those same Black voters in Alabama...will finally have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice across two congressional districts. That is progress."**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71029506/431005758/-612435496?refcode=20231005_AOTL_F_ALMapsWin_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNWFiOWM2LWI5NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JyvcW3WInTRkE_QUWC9BzK4vwDTvJo4rsbjB5oJlvyM=)_
Marina Jenkins, Executive Director
* * *
This victory is a testament to the power of grassroots advocacy, and your support has been instrumental in achieving this landmark outcome.
[**Taking Action Together:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71029507/431005759/-612435496?refcode=20231005_AOTL_F_ALMapsWin_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNWFiOWM2LWI5NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JyvcW3WInTRkE_QUWC9BzK4vwDTvJo4rsbjB5oJlvyM=) To continue vital fair maps advocacy and ensure fair representation for all people, we need your support.
* **Immediate Impact with a One-Time Donation:** Your immediate support empowers us to continue this crucial fight against gerrymandering. Your support is a vote for fairness and justice.

| [DONATE $25 NOW!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71029509/431005760/-612435496?amount=25&refcode=20231005_AOTL_F_ALMapsWin_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNWFiOWM2LWI5NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JyvcW3WInTRkE_QUWC9BzK4vwDTvJo4rsbjB5oJlvyM=)
