[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d91dbe4129b74229b7a3c6104b98c6aa&_e=e8l1ReXD_GUt1E6by8CnS_QQ3QKegle_mm_h8DSGqEgWwz3hJb2uCWdTRQhQlfzCOBQw1TUy1Yb6wKAZ4iVnu4EY_hRotIwtwAoiS5kH9zwhwoKgLCkxRuAp9Lzhb1Ynk01Rd6yY9dx5vNvx9UmoJHut5L78KabeJ4JyMti7FwVpfqMoshfsSKlO4rvFWoeK8JetP_57rA_22Eo2JD8F-haV8ulCrm8Q-xbz0dj7dbzqY1ptf4Ee5TUOywIwFq2GvAfDITOaG_R8BTESYCr26sdJ7iGPW8gB_IqP24ka55Xyzp5yuV0oZkgXkZdc7cKirhCrlFxFCUoVAd7GXeHiCkcDUpYVAJdXjvERPxENIihrMf16mQHTqcf3QkDsPmaPsEBtUS1MUN9oW0ogU5KiGw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars.

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d91dbe4129b74229b7a3c6104b98c6aa&_e=e8l1ReXD_GUt1E6by8CnS_QQ3QKegle_mm_h8DSGqEgWwz3hJb2uCWdTRQhQlfzCOBQw1TUy1Yb6wKAZ4iVnu4EY_hRotIwtwAoiS5kH9zwhwoKgLCkxRuAp9Lzhb1Ynk01Rd6yY9dx5vNvx9UmoJHut5L78KabeJ4JyMti7FwVpfqMoshfsSKlO4rvFWoeK8JetP_57rA_22Eo2JD8F-haV8ulCrm8Q-xbz0dj7dbzF2TMtD0_hxbzCi-X5ZRQ2m3Q6XL_4fJPfW87njGqNgaJKV8CxlD019luXsW9ra42Odxtmr18I4R4ijZW7C6QL-LGJRq3RVdg2ezsAVY4SUdW_TlD7U0Hy1uwPbMNhA2oi2pY3Fp8i9EA2-qDEDCTPprGuHvl_4ARpNZvzrw8qOg%3D%3D)**.

**[I’m coming to you today to let you know that we’re aiming to raise $886 today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d91dbe4129b74229b7a3c6104b98c6aa&_e=e8l1ReXD_GUt1E6by8CnS_QQ3QKegle_mm_h8DSGqEgWwz3hJb2uCWdTRQhQlfzCOBQw1TUy1Yb6wKAZ4iVnu4EY_hRotIwtwAoiS5kH9zwhwoKgLCkxRuAp9Lzhb1Ynk01Rd6yY9dx5vNvx9UmoJHut5L78KabeJ4JyMti7FwVpfqMoshfsSKlO4rvFWoeK8JetP_57rA_22Eo2JD8F-haV8ulCrm8Q-xbz0dj7dbwyGb9irLFBbOxMIDWkrMzLqX8DCGkN4XBtSzfZJKabWgducp5KzCd9fldg2ugOSBEtXO2LlHoib3vJxhYbqOoXbGjqjO_PXsgjJYtukSZ1yMp1zvBfhe_ETH2XSxSxJ2vzt9imEHuZc-iukt-nbzvuRlhfqkhwI_qkH_ctVZidLA%3D%3D)**.

**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d91dbe4129b74229b7a3c6104b98c6aa&_e=e8l1ReXD_GUt1E6by8CnS_QQ3QKegle_mm_h8DSGqEgWwz3hJb2uCWdTRQhQlfzCOBQw1TUy1Yb6wKAZ4iVnu4EY_hRotIwtwAoiS5kH9zwhwoKgLCkxRuAp9Lzhb1Ynk01Rd6yY9dx5vNvx9UmoJHut5L78KabeJ4JyMti7FwVpfqMoshfsSKlO4rvFWoeK8JetP_57rA_22Eo2JD8F-haV8ulCrm8Q-xbz0dj7dbxx8wxuDtPIb7PPO3xcvIrlDstY43g_M_yHA95vZgK17o8NhKpJerIkanSPlipGv0_dJEtyfeMMcsnzqogZ5UzbFbjq5TiJ8NFyzMlIyi_x3E3_3vBQLBWZ3QS6LNOkQvIT-QlNhMK8VhSdNk0wHQCYIl0iLLtpcgcFzNmFR3-Vmg%3D%3D)

With respect,

Tim Sheehy

| | _**NEW DATE & LOCATION: 2024 Campaign Fundraiser!**_
Friends,

Unfortunately, due to changes to the U.S. House vote schedule, I will now need to be in D.C. on October 11th.

**Our 2024 Campaign Fundraiser will now take place on Monday, October 16th at 5:30pm.**

I look forward to seeing each of you at **the Dye Clubhouse at Barefoot Resort & Golf **(2600 Pete Dye Drive, North Myrtle Beach, SC 29582).

You can support this event by becoming a Platinum, Gold, or Silver sponsor. Click below to RSVP!

| _The Federal Election Commission (FEC) allows an individual to contribute up to $3300 per election; a qualified political action committee may contribute up $6600 per election. The primary, general, special, and runoff elections are considered separate elections for the purposes of these limits. Contributions that exceed $3300 from an individual and $6600 from a qualified political action committee will be automatically attributed to the next applicable election, unless specified otherwise. Federal Law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. Contributions from Federal government contractors are prohibited. No corporate checks or corporate credit cards may be accepted. Partnership and LLC contributions may be accepted under certain guidelines. Please call 301.654.3220 for further information regarding eligibility. Contributions are not considered charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes._

body:

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Ban the liars from political interviews
body:
There's a perverse profit incentive to allow the spread of misinformation.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)
**The GOP's effort to impeach President Biden is based on nothing, Peter.**
That much was confirmed during last week’s first impeachment hearing where GOP witnesses couldn’t produce a single shred of evidence to support their claims of “high crimes” against the President.
Despite having no basis in reality, blatant lies and misinformation about the President, his son, and the impeachment effort keep spreading at an alarming rate. **And, according to a recent Morning Consult poll, those claims are having an impact – _nearly half of all Americans_ support the impeachment probe.**
So how is this happening? We’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, **[if you want to help Courier and our network of nine newsrooms across the country push back against misinformation, will you pitch in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231005?refcode=em20231005&amount=&refcode2=1676_120351_yN9dAK&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)**
No one is surprised when far-right propaganda outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, OANN, etc. allow unchecked lying. But the problem isn’t confined to those networks. **Even mainstream outlets allow politicians to lie regularly without much pushback.
**
**Recently, in a Meet the Press interview on NBC, Donald Trump claimed four times that Democrats want to kill babies “after birth.”**
Moderator Kristen Welker challenged Trump on the claim the first two times, but let it go after that.
While promoting the interview NBC also used the irresponsible headline: “Trump wants to bring the country together on abortion: ‘Both sides are going to like me.’"
The very notion that an authoritarian like Trump wants to bring the country together is ridiculous, Peter.
So what if news organizations took a different approach? What if interviewers made it clear that they would end the interview live, on-air, and ban the participant from any future interviews if they lied — **and then actually followed through?**
While it’s a nice hypothetical, the reality is the profit incentives for big corporate news organizations aren’t going away any time soon. And that means the unchecked lying probably won’t stop, either.
**But here at Courier, we’re doing journalism differently.** None of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees — instead, we rely on contributions from donors like you to help us report the truth and call out misinformation and those who disseminate it.
**[If you're tired of corporate media allowing shameless politicians to lie on their airwaves in an attempt to keep profits up, please consider chipping in anything you can to Courier Newsroom today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231005?refcode=em20231005&amount=&refcode2=1676_120351_yN9dAK&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)**
**[Donate now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20231005?refcode=em20231005&amount=5&refcode2=1676_120351_yN9dAK&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)**
Thank you, Peter!
— Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1676&t=2&refcode2=1676_120351_yN9dAK&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1676%2E120351%2EyN9dAK)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

Thank you for your consideration and continued support. I look forward to seeing you on October 24th! | = Rep. Gloria Johnson | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they 're plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.
| | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8a43d2aee3495c87d12a550308fc86&_e=u-yVvPUaOC_HrvutML2pHUMBsxqf80Zvml1jzLKsbqKq-jjWYfJH-FwCHI91URz-5zC4mviRucKFmyMKJbfhYplAb8dKXApB5AvZ94Mq7ajhnNS9SdNqRWKR66UUCv7c89FmDaiKKlsuFqR_gddwJ8eEbXNaoYX4dOdBh3fOWchEQmcPlFLtJJk1f5IU28i7Uex2FXYNffSpwKJVo_FCultCWd3aiYTgeNVRUmcu9LgpM-M_JBMvrI_ZzwaVxOdmqFEptE3u7zAmFUhD0MVTJUAk6dEKlj-gtF9PlBFXnH8-u83m4a7w1wjFjPUmW4OTWJM-h_LJvM4k1oH1wcSI16scsoJT40ileh-DUv5rYck%3D)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8a43d2aee3495c87d12a550308fc86&_e=u-yVvPUaOC_HrvutML2pHUMBsxqf80Zvml1jzLKsbqKq-jjWYfJH-FwCHI91URz-5zC4mviRucKFmyMKJbfhYplAb8dKXApB5AvZ94Mq7ajhnNS9SdNqRWKR66UUCv7c89FmDaiKKlsuFqR_gddwJ8eEbXNaoYX4dOdBh3fOWchEQmcPlFLtJJk1f5IU28i7Uex2FXYNffSpwKJVo_FCugKuSXAIDguIFv1TgSjkCvNB7jBZH9MGMuJV2ayT_J4FlpOzGY2ZjXnLo5e0k2rxcI1pN6TXv8b4XEtZXFhew9LEtB3NjBKgKMUeQKlD4-BMvuiZF7p5Qge5icQoA34Kbw0rNcT4jvBZgszFaT2bJqE%3D)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We're not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It's going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn't give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they 're plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8a43d2aee3495c87d12a550308fc86&_e=u-yVvPUaOC_HrvutML2pHUMBsxqf80Zvml1jzLKsbqKq-jjWYfJH-FwCHI91URz-5zC4mviRucKFmyMKJbfhYplAb8dKXApB5AvZ94Mq7ajhnNS9SdNqRWKR66UUCv7c89FmDaiKKlsuFqR_gddwJ8eEbXNaoYX4dOdBh3fOWchEQmcPlFLtJJk1f5IU28i7Uex2FXYNffSpwKJVo_FCuopaBWYgVd-8U4mUj_oUC52PdZRhaVEsnm4ZTduvMsATDrE7hvS_EM4uep5a4i8jNdjdFPKSUk04mVnIUo7nb1Foo_wcYRTwe6OBUODaiGIexXbPxnSgQvzduvdUgd8eTzLosyhbj03u-7foHQRI9dQ%3D)
---
**[We 're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8a43d2aee3495c87d12a550308fc86&_e=u-yVvPUaOC_HrvutML2pHUMBsxqf80Zvml1jzLKsbqKq-jjWYfJH-FwCHI91URz-5zC4mviRucKFmyMKJbfhYplAb8dKXApB5AvZ94Mq7ajhnNS9SdNqRWKR66UUCv7c89FmDaiKKlsuFqR_gddwJ8eEbXNaoYX4dOdBh3fOWchEQmcPlFLtJJk1f5IU28i7Uex2FXYNffSpwKJVo_FCus0_f0ykX8poG4Fs8VG10KlkFbNC1fjEwoSem2SyKbiiIe8Mb4FotDjjKLQ1GIqSeDcfP6uV8WgOIPFMCKXzkgXc2wDwJU_LY8ITTJGBcbA5Da_6560qFRN9oht5xZo8IF3MwV0XENsmntIVpT2IBkU%3D)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won't happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I've been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I'll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8a43d2aee3495c87d12a550308fc86&_e=u-yVvPUaOC_HrvutML2pHUMBsxqf80Zvml1jzLKsbqKq-jjWYfJH-FwCHI91URz-5zC4mviRucKFmyMKJbfhYplAb8dKXApB5AvZ94Mq7ajhnNS9SdNqRWKR66UUCv7c89FmDaiKKlsuFqR_gddwJ8eEbXNaoYX4dOdBh3fOWchEQmcPlFLtJJk1f5IU28i7Uex2FXYNffSpwKJVo_FCulquxn0JCFpxhIUiblY7FqcOH1pDVXaw4Bc2JF2DUUT9nzIzZ4eY-oJMb7jdPl2bftva8-LhoWf0tQpMYYv6lGvHf-ATdzCNXwwqwwgu1SOGp9GZzEQTWWBw9wriQ_qot553oH5hXxX6Q2SSW7nC8v4%3D)

| Did you see the news we shared yesterday?
**One of our opponents attended a Kansans For Life Political Action Committee event and confirmed any doubts about which way they’d vote on abortion legislation if elected— _they made it clear that they’re_** _**firmly** **in the anti-choice camp.**_

clean_body: | Did you see the news we shared yesterday? One of our opponents attended a Kansans For Life Political Action Committee event and confirmed any doubts about which way they’d vote on abortion legislation if elected— they made it clear that they’re firmly in the anti-choice camp. It’s imperative that we defeat our anti-choice opponents next year. KS-03 deserves a leader that aligns with their values and defends their freedoms. In other words, we need to keep battle-tested, pro-choice leaders like Sharice in Congress to fight back against the many calls National Republicans have made for a nationwide abortion ban. That’s why I’m writing to you today. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = We said as soon as our opponents got in that any candidate who can’t definitely say they voted against Kansas’s anti-choice ballot measure was in favor of it—making them dangerously out of step with working Kansans and the majority of Kansas’ Third. Now one of them has firmly confirmed it to be the case. Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to strip us of our freedoms, which is why we can't back down for even a second. = Thank you, Mohona Campaign Manager * | = Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. That’s why we’re asking for your monthly support today.= = = We’ve been waiting for this moment — now let’s show Kari what it’s like to lose twice. Arizona Democratic Party | P.S. If now isn’t the best time to begin a recurring contribution, we understand and appreciate your support at whatever level you’re able to give.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

_**Did you see this?**_

Experts say our country’s disaster prevention, response, and recovery programs are _**“uncoordinated, unequitable, and unsustainable”**_ when faced with the severe impacts of climate change.

The climate crisis is shining a harsh light on the gaps in our disaster response programs that are meant to aid our communities that are faced with life-threatening wildfires, floods, and drought.

That’s why it’s so important to elect climate champions who will fight for improvements and investments into our broken system at every level of government and hold corporate polluters accountable for their role in the climate crisis.

[_**Will you contribute $5 today to help us elect even more climate champions in the upcoming election and pave the path for a better future?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71037708/431010542/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231005-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYjFlNGE1LWJlNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fvnX689eU3OKxuzEAZIIQNFzgsCVa5sch9cE4nbIoEQ=)

subject: 🚨Call for Questions: Truth in Taxation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Please submit your questions for our panel speakers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12654862?e=25844e23a8)

---
| | Peter,
---
| _“Collecting more taxes than is absolutely necessary is legalized robbery.”_ -Calvin Coolidge

The increasing property tax hikes and notices of increasing tax levies across many Nebraska counties are on a lot of our minds these days. With good reason!

With the focus of our next NEGOP Roundtable Discussion revolving around continued tax reform, [**we want to invite you to submit questions for our panel hosts.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9e5435fe6c&e=25844e23a8)

name: John Fetterman
subject: The UAW picket line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I will always stand with workers in Pennsylvania and across the country.
#
The Union Way of Life is sacred, Derek.
I just got back from visiting the United Auto Workers picket line in Langhorne, PA, where they are part of a national strike at the Big Three automakers. **I showed up to make it clear I've got their backs.** 💪
Unions built this nation + built the middle class, and we have to expand and protect the Union Way of Life. All these UAW workers want is better pay and better benefits. Their concessions during the 2008 recessions helped the auto industry survive. Now, after record profits, they're just demanding what they deserve.
I will always stand with workers in Pennsylvania and across the country, and I will always fight for workers in Washington. 💯
**[To help me continue that fight so every single worker is treated with dignity and paid what they deserve, chip in to power our 100% pro-worker campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231005-1?refcode=em20231005-1-8608&refcode2=8608_434096_GaWmNU&akid=8608%2E434096%2EGaWmNU)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231005-1?refcode=em20231005-8608&refcode2=8608_434096_GaWmNU&akid=8608%2E434096%2EGaWmNU)**
Solidarity forever.
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231005-8608-footer&t=1&refcode2=8608_434096_GaWmNU&akid=8608%2E434096%2EGaWmNU)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: Why we need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Can you chip in before this weekend to help us keep our momentum going? | | |
---
Peter, **** Our team is so grateful to supporters like you for helping us reach our fundraising goal before the FEC deadline in September. **** ****Every dollar we raise helps us make sure that we can keep Joe and Kamala in the White House and keep making progress for all Americans. And we’d love nothing more than to tell you that our work is done and that we don’t need to ask you for a donation for the rest of the month. But the truth is: **we can’t.**
****Right now, extreme MAGA Republicans running for president and in Congress are threatening to undo all of the progress we’ve been making. We’ve stopped them before, and we can do it again, but it’s going to take a lot of work from folks all across the country. [**When you pitch in to our campaign, you help us ensure that our Republican opponents don’t reverse the progress we’ve made. clean_body: Can you chip in before this weekend to help us keep our momentum going? | | | Peter, ** Our team is so grateful to supporters like you for helping us reach our fundraising goal before the FEC deadline in September. Every dollar we raise helps us make sure that we can keep Joe and Kamala in the White House and keep making progress for all Americans. And we’d love nothing more than to tell you that our work is done and that we don’t need to ask you for a donation for the rest of the month. But the truth is: we can’t. Right now, extreme MAGA Republicans running for president and in Congress are threatening to undo all of the progress we’ve been making. We’ve stopped them before, and we can do it again, but it’s going to take a lot of work from folks all across the country. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with us. \-- Biden-Harris Dems

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: What this fundraising deadline taught us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
was that our grassroots team can accomplish anything

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71039711/431011494/-1743337223?refcode=em_msg_2023.10.05_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2M3NjdmMi1iZjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SPbZ3AtMbiqElvlp_0cdyrQXeEhahwEzw_THvj9TjCY=) Peter, it’s Emilia here.

I wanted to reach out because, thanks to your generosity and the grassroots support of folks across the country we were able to exceed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and end September in a strong position.

**This fundraising deadline taught us that our grassroots team can accomplish anything,_as long as we continue to work together._**

And this is so much greater than fundraising deadlines, Peter. **Next year, we must stand united in our fight for Northeast Ohio to ensure that the radical right never gets its claws into our communities.**

And I know it’s a fight we will win because there’s _no challenge_ too great for our people-powered campaign.

So once again, thank you for your support!

_Emilia_ | **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: 700,000 union members endorse Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:

body:
This weekend, I joined MSNBC to discuss the House’s historic bipartisan effort to avoid a government shutdown.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71040222/431011778/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231005-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDFlNmUwYi1jMDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CtHoJ7IP8V0jrbNXeA3mEChfKpl8p7SeL8PwRIgPIFw=)

| Peter,

This weekend, I joined MSNBC to discuss the House’s historic bipartisan effort to avoid a government shutdown.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71040225/431011783/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231005-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDFlNmUwYi1jMDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CtHoJ7IP8V0jrbNXeA3mEChfKpl8p7SeL8PwRIgPIFw=)
I voted with House Democrats and Republicans on a short-term solution to avoid a government shutdown because I know how hard a government shutdown would affect working families in Lehigh Valley and across the country.

As I said on air, and I’ve been saying for weeks, the only way to get this done is along bipartisan lines, and thankfully, McCarthy realized that.

Over 200 House Democrats voted to keep the government open, while over 90 Republicans voted against it.

**This government shutdown was averted thanks to Democrats.** This is yet another reminder of House Republicans’ inaction, infighting, and political charades.

[_**That’s why it’s absolutely vital that we take back the House in 2024, and that starts with protecting vulnerable seats like mine. Will you chip in to help us keep PA-07 blue and flip the House next year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71040234/431011784/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231005-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDFlNmUwYi1jMDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CtHoJ7IP8V0jrbNXeA3mEChfKpl8p7SeL8PwRIgPIFw=)

name: Team Peterson
subject: Our opponent’s working overtime for extremism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
She put the agenda of MAGA Republicans over the well-being of Oregonians.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71040804/431011866/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTdlMTg5ZS1jMDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfbBZ83ZY2Pes9u368A34uUne7yjElWgZjJCJl_oxyo=&emci=ed680ddc-bc63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8a7e189e-c063-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter — **House Democrats secured a continuing resolution last week to keep our government open for 45 days and protect critical services. But the fact things were pushed to the brink speaks volumes of the Republican majority that Lori Chavez-DeRemer is part of.** Rather than working from the start to avoid political games, Lori Chavez-DeRemer instead did what her feckless party leaders told her — voting for an extreme budget bill that was designed to appease extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and force Democrats to pick between shutting down the government and cutting aid for working people. Here's what Chavez-DeRemer voted for (and what thankfully never came to pass):
* Huge cuts to Social Security that could require the field offices our seniors rely on to close
* Kicking 275,000 children out of Head Start education programs
* The loss of nearly 150,000 teachers and educational staff
* Dramatic cuts to the Small Business Association's Entrepreneurial Development projects that would impact 400,000 small businesses
* Slashing resources for wildfire suppression by 57% — amounting to $2.4 billion in funds that would otherwise be used to protect communities and precious natural resources

clean_body: She put the agenda of MAGA Republicans over the well-being of Oregonians. | | | | Peter — House Democrats secured a continuing resolution last week to keep our government open for 45 days and protect critical services. But the fact things were pushed to the brink speaks volumes of the Republican majority that Lori Chavez-DeRemer is part of. Rather than working from the start to avoid political games, Lori Chavez-DeRemer instead did what her feckless party leaders told her — voting for an extreme budget bill that was designed to appease extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and force Democrats to pick between shutting down the government and cutting aid for working people. Here's what Chavez-DeRemer voted for (and what thankfully never came to pass): Huge cuts to Social Security that could require the field offices our seniors rely on to close Kicking 275,000 children out of Head Start education programs The loss of nearly 150,000 teachers and educational staff Dramatic cuts to the Small Business Association's Entrepreneurial Development projects that would impact 400,000 small businesses Slashing resources for wildfire suppression by 57% — amounting to $2.4 billion in funds that would otherwise be used to protect communities and precious natural resources Despite what she tells her constituents, Chavez-DeRemer isn't in this for Oregonians. She's working overtime for MAGA extremists – and as the GOP infighting intensifies this week in the wake of Kevin McCarthy's ouster, we can only expect more of the same from her. None of this will get fixed until we end the GOP's House majority – and doing that runs right through OR-05. We have to fight back and reclaim that seat for working families in Oregon — and Lynn is the candidate who can do it. = = More soon, Team Peterson | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

We try to be upfront with you and make sure you’re read into our plan from the beginning. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71042149/431012234/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExODJlMjk1LWMxNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aGsVy6NxJZCXLoEPs5fatwu23gGDk2qw_mk8ZbQlBs=) | Peter – We’re guessing your inbox was flooded last week with a whole bunch of fundraising emails talking about the “end of the fiscal quarter” — even more intense than the usual “end of month” emails campaigns and groups send out. We get these emails, too. And while they can be annoying, there is truth to them. At the end of every quarter, our fundraising numbers ARE made public, so we want to make sure we have a good showing. In order to do that, we MUST meet our fundraising goals each month. **But we try to be upfront with you, Peter.** So instead of hiding the ball and sending a whole bunch of urgent messages at the end of the month with no context, we’re telling you our October goal at the beginning of the month. That’s right. **This month, we have a goal of raising $15,000 by October 31st.** [**Make a contribution toward our October goal →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71042150/431012235/-313727143?&refcode=E4418-20231005-OctGoal-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExODJlMjk1LWMxNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aGsVy6NxJZCXLoEPs5fatwu23gGDk2qw_mk8ZbQlBs=) That’s $15,000 that will go toward electing representatives who are grounded in their communities and who will always put their constituents ahead of partisan politics. And we’re telling you about our goal now so that — if you share our goal of giving our communities a voice in Congress — you can make a contribution when it makes sense for you during the month. clean_body: We try to be upfront with you and make sure you’re read into our plan from the beginning. | = | Peter – We’re guessing your inbox was flooded last week with a whole bunch of fundraising emails talking about the “end of the fiscal quarter” — even more intense than the usual “end of month” emails campaigns and groups send out. We get these emails, too. And while they can be annoying, there is truth to them. At the end of every quarter, our fundraising numbers ARE made public, so we want to make sure we have a good showing. In order to do that, we MUST meet our fundraising goals each month. But we try to be upfront with you, Peter. So instead of hiding the ball and sending a whole bunch of urgent messages at the end of the month with no context, we’re telling you our October goal at the beginning of the month. That’s right. This month, we have a goal of raising $15,000 by October 31st. = That’s $15,000 that will go toward electing representatives who are grounded in their communities and who will always put their constituents ahead of partisan politics. And we’re telling you about our goal now so that — if you share our goal of giving our communities a voice in Congress — you can make a contribution when it makes sense for you during the month. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- If you want to donate, but you’d rather wait until payday or until a bill clears, we totally understand. Come back to this email (or donate through one of our other emails) whenever it works for you. Thanks for working with us to restore our constituents’ voices in Congress and to replace extremists in DC with real folks who just get it. – Blue Dog PAC Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. We’re pro-America, pro-democracy, and working to pass fiscally responsible policies that benefit everyday, hard-working Americans. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . BLUE DOG POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE PO BOX 83142 GAITHERSBURG, MD 20883 United States

Fellow Patriot,

I realize you are flooded with emails, so I'll cut straight to the point:

I need your support. Could you chip in $5?

That used to buy you a footlong at the local Subway, but thanks to tax-and-spend policies that fueled the fires of inflation in the Biden administration, the cost of living is sky high, and the classic $5 footlong is long gone.

Fellow patriot, your support for me in the past has been tremendously appreciated.

I’m the conservative Republican running for U.S. Senate in California – and, [**with your help**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0d7369d72de24e1a8eae3f5c231a5c27&_e=5Kjx-gqRPhy8UMfHpmlzQBvXVto4zXdLbesbudnv20pLVftDA5S064rRjB4b8d-wUpWnEZIVJtZKQI3pdi354RCapAIKVQyntnY2mhK_UbxUYufHjeYER-jF6Ev3NsK3HP_95AO8mAW5eio8rUoMxgajf_mso31ikAK48YJvGn-gzIsdQkzQEPVNxPdXMFsdMH3yEnUg2xL4oddnf9QZQZz5yPK_J-tpaHB_FNZeWvViOvqqsLk22eDsDaE3X7lUTnMFg5gw_UKM8hDZbflCCKUT7EkBl59870VKyBrNH-aL2XT8p2bUXXQyVdCPWf1cRay5UkhmfD0NFJVHudIYeqbVujuwjaefUahGL1KKlw8npQRchSQkHo_2jDmIZN71pBl-1EpORU362fr0pGdoHw%3D%3D), **I am going to beat Adam Schiff in this race.**

Together, Adam Schiff and Joe Biden have set the new standard for corrupt abuse of government power as they’ve teamed up to weaponize Congressional hearings, the Department of Justice, and the whole justice system to frame and convict their chief political opponent and his conservative allies.

All the while, they’ve left our border unsecured, ripped our economy to shreds, and trampled on our freedoms and values.

**We cannot trust the same career politicians who put us in this mess to get us out of it. It’s time for new leadership and new ideas.**

The future of our country depends on this Senate race in California. If Adam Schiff wins, he will have even more control over you and our country.

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell MSNBC to host a wealth tax debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The richest people in America are $500 billion richer today [https://www.forbes.com/sites/chasewithorn/2023/10/03/the-2023-forbes-400-list-of-richest-americans-facts-and-figures/?sh=72a59409c4ce] than they were a year ago. Meanwhile, everyday folks continue to face stagnant wages and rising costs, mounting bills, and crushing debt.

We need a wealth tax to combat growing income inequality. A tax on the ultra-rich will provide critical funds for healthcare, child care, housing, education, and infrastructure. It will help working Americans prosper. Yet corporate lobbyists are using their influence to prevent billionaires from paying their fair share. These lobbyists are looking toward the Supreme Court to back them up in the upcoming Moore v. United States [https://taxfoundation.org/research/all/federal/moore-v-united-states-tax-unrealized-income/] case, which will determine Congress’ ability to tax the unrealized gains of wealthy individuals.

TAKE ACTION: Tell MSNBC to host a wealth tax debate. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/msnbc-wealth-tax-debate-petition?contactdata=S6w3kxJw7/0Ba5pnXOIrUs4JziF/+YHmnaT8HPG+qVB5yaUfcWimb2YUqJNXBiMODt29SeG3lQe/M6LOkltKP3C6OV8iixvxMASjdAnbPxER1kfPSjcV7JtJvzp+Mrbc2/vqYK2X1o1KdhUsCwuYTA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/msnbc-wealth-tax-debate-petition?contactdata=S6w3kxJw7/0Ba5pnXOIrUs4JziF/+YHmnaT8HPG+qVB5yaUfcWimb2YUqJNXBiMODt29SeG3lQe/M6LOkltKP3C6OV8iixvxMASjdAnbPxER1kfPSjcV7JtJvzp+Mrbc2/vqYK2X1o1KdhUsCwuYTA==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1705199742441972162 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1705199742441972162]

Neal Katyal, the acting solicitor general during the Obama administration, has filed an amicus brief on behalf of the lobbyists opposed to the wealth tax. I know Neal as someone who cares deeply about the threats to our democracy; I believe he should recognize how massive wealth inequality tears apart our nation.

That’s why I’m calling on MSNBC to host a debate on the wealth tax between Neal and me on The Mehdi Hasan Show, where Neal is a regular contributor. I’m ready to speak up for working Americans, because the American people deserve to know what’s at risk if SCOTUS decides to protect the billionaire class.

Sign the petition: MSNBC must host a wealth tax debate. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/msnbc-wealth-tax-debate-petition?contactdata=S6w3kxJw7/0Ba5pnXOIrUs4JziF/+YHmnaT8HPG+qVB5yaUfcWimb2YUqJNXBiMODt29SeG3lQe/M6LOkltKP3C6OV8iixvxMASjdAnbPxER1kfPSjcV7JtJvzp+Mrbc2/vqYK2X1o1KdhUsCwuYTA==]

Our best hope of changing this dynamic is to raise public awareness and, in turn, public support for the wealthiest among us to pay their fair share.

In solidarity,
Ro

clean_body: Here’s what it really means: = Peter, I want to give you the latest. Extreme MAGA Republicans have barreled the People’s House into chaos, crisis and confusion. Who knows how long it will take for them to get their act together. On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are united and ready to get to work. = Peter, I’m humbled by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me today. Now, we have a chance to make a powerful statement. I need your help to prove that Democrats are united and ready to deliver For The People. If just 2 more donors from your city split a gift between me and Future Forum PAC before midnight, we can build a foundation for victory to reclaim the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Keep the faith, Hakeem Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

You see, Florida conservatives have been so successful because of the generosity and dedication of grassroots patriots like you.** If we lose our grassroots base, the Democrats will be able to SWOOP in and take back Florida. Peter, there’s been a theme this year: Time and time again, Democrats have stepped up to get the job done when the Republican _majority_ couldn’t.

✔️ **We stepped up and cast the critical votes to keep the government open.

✔️ We stepped up and prevented a catastrophic default.

✔️ We stepped up and accomplished what the Republican majority couldn’t.**

Despite being in the minority, we were the ones who _actually_ governed. **_Think about how much we could accomplish if we took back the House, Peter._**

**[I’m hopeful for 2024 — but I need you to be, too. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1O6zAQhZ9msmtkH9tNvfDiXkpASBVColW3bjxpLJw2SlIgPD1qKGzn5zufjm-7FOvJUfGfgCaGgQBS_wi4jGrnt9tNPy32G7l4MDscr0vcETBOHf9d3iA5tz6m67RYZ8FpeFlXGTu5tEujpTEia5yAXWkZGJCqWllmrkOBOhysZfbCZ9FBQEkhDKSCLPKVtcbLGvoQoKQ2pMUclNc989jE0xv3wcc05dW5zZJrxrEbZrGSUJ7DIT9dqsSX4eerOreE8qZMKN8JZbN_Lcbh89RNpMq5BLV-2cjHp-f7r6x3ofuIKcVhWZAWx1_KdwAAAP__NHdfWA) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtO6zAQhp9msmtkj-24WXhxDiUgpAqxaMXW18bCuSh2hMLTo5bC9p-Zbz79ephTDJsC-R8Q--gyIAL7B4hrYWd9Oh2Xbfd-pLsnccbLdYgPgFi22f9t3iG1H3RM11QeKqc4ahps5RVt2kZwKgSpeiXbhpiAznuCFIllIZDGNXJvWs2tlVVUSJBRQgRShlTW-7YVmgbkxiGjXAAnt0d1WLwvfRw__OJ0TFttp6FKqi9lzjexDrCbnKnH1Sa_5p8rOw2A3V0ZsMuryXaJc4nTmAG7dbwnxgPrbo2ww9uRPr-8Pn5Vi3LzZ0wp5kYCJ5df5HcAAAD__zvTZLY)

| | [ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G72KZA_hn4cW9jdJVlom6QwQONqox1jFO5T59lajpdr7RzGfiMgW_96z5zwDG4FYGwMQ_BrBlcTWXy5n2w8eZH97VFYYHhDcGkPcF_5q_IyVGE6ZH2hwL10sw3NsCe153tZJcqaoY-44rEL5y_ga31jnVtCiVsZ3h3Mm6FUXooQLBq0oBF8Cbsu06ZbgHeXMguFRMVs-j0hNiHsP8ieRMmPbSplhM_Zjzsj7FTgxOg8H87RPZNA-E61oS3u-lTS-kXZp1ihpJO_SHOGha9cuAidOWo85IkYmjz44zqAntRhTmgYljpg0L6t3yFaYprHXDZDU85WyKPwEAAP__SUBraw)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G72KZA_hn4cW9jdJVlom6QwQONqox1jFO5T59lajpdr7RzGfiMgW_96z5zwDG4FYGwMQ_BrBlcTWXy5n2w8eZH97VFYYHhDcGkPcF_5q_IyVGE6ZH2hwL10sw3NsCe153tZJcqaoY-44rEL5y_ga31jnVtCiVsZ3h3Mm6FUXooQLBq0oBF8Cbsu06ZbgHeXMguFRMVs-j0hNiHsP8ieRMmPbSplhM_Zjzsj7FTgxOg8H87RPZNA-E61oS3u-lTS-kXZp1ihpJO_SHOGha9cuAidOWo85IkYmjz44zqAntRhTmgYljpg0L6t3yFaYprHXDZDU85WyKPwEAAP__SUBraw)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We’re not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It’s going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn’t give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G72KZA_hn4cW9jdJVlom6QwQONqox1jFO5T59lajpdr7RzGfiMgW_96z5zwDG4FYGwMQ_BrBlcTWXy5n2w8eZH97VFYYHhDcGkPcF_5q_IyVGE6ZH2hwL10sw3NsCe153tZJcqaoY-44rEL5y_ga31jnVtCiVsZ3h3Mm6FUXooQLBq0oBF8Cbsu06ZbgHeXMguFRMVs-j0hNiHsP8ieRMmPbSplhM_Zjzsj7FTgxOg8H87RPZNA-E61oS3u-lTS-kXZp1ihpJO_SHOGha9cuAidOWo85IkYmjz44zqAntRhTmgYljpg0L6t3yFaYprHXDZDU85WyKPwEAAP__SUBraw)
---
**[We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G72KZA_hn4cW9jdJVlom6QwQONqox1jFO5T59lajpdr7RzGfiMgW_96z5zwDG4FYGwMQ_BrBlcTWXy5n2w8eZH97VFYYHhDcGkPcF_5q_IyVGE6ZH2hwL10sw3NsCe153tZJcqaoY-44rEL5y_ga31jnVtCiVsZ3h3Mm6FUXooQLBq0oBF8Cbsu06ZbgHeXMguFRMVs-j0hNiHsP8ieRMmPbSplhM_Zjzsj7FTgxOg8H87RPZNA-E61oS3u-lTS-kXZp1ihpJO_SHOGha9cuAidOWo85IkYmjz44zqAntRhTmgYljpg0L6t3yFaYprHXDZDU85WyKPwEAAP__SUBraw)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won’t happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I’ll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G72KZA_hn4cW9jdJVlom6QwQONqox1jFO5T59lajpdr7RzGfiMgW_96z5zwDG4FYGwMQ_BrBlcTWXy5n2w8eZH97VFYYHhDcGkPcF_5q_IyVGE6ZH2hwL10sw3NsCe153tZJcqaoY-44rEL5y_ga31jnVtCiVsZ3h3Mm6FUXooQLBq0oBF8Cbsu06ZbgHeXMguFRMVs-j0hNiHsP8ieRMmPbSplhM_Zjzsj7FTgxOg8H87RPZNA-E61oS3u-lTS-kXZp1ihpJO_SHOGha9cuAidOWo85IkYmjz44zqAntRhTmgYljpg0L6t3yFaYprHXDZDU85WyKPwEAAP__SUBraw)

Hi friend,

We know you heard a lot from us last week, so we’ll get right to the point: Thanks to the support of folks like you across the country, we exceeded our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. **We’re so grateful, and it really does make all the difference.**

Every challenge our team faces together, we overcome. **It’s proof that our strength lies in being a people-powered team.**

There’s still challenges ahead, and as we get closer to Election Day 2024, we’re going to be relying on your support. But if we continue to work together, there’s nothing that can stand in our way.

We appreciate you!

_Team Landsman_

We’re so grateful, and it really does make all the difference. Every challenge our team faces together, we overcome. It’s proof that our strength lies in being a people-powered team. There’s still challenges ahead, and as we get closer to Election Day 2024, we’re going to be relying on your support. But if we continue to work together, there’s nothing that can stand in our way. name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s have these workers' backs, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
It would mean a lot to have your name as a show of support for these workers who are demanding a fair deal.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)
Dear Peter,
During the Great Recession, UAW workers voluntarily reduced their benefits to help the Big Three automakers survive. Taxpayers bailed out the companies when the industry collapsed, and since then, business has boomed. Profits are at all-time highs, and the CEOs of these companies are reaping the rewards of double-digit raises.
**Now, when it's time for the working people who make our cars and trucks to earn their fair share, the CEOs of these companies are saying the well is all dried up.**
**[Peter, will you add your name to stand with me in support of UAW members and their right to organize?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20231005-stand-with-uaw?source=em20231005&t=2&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)**
**[Sign your name »](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20231005-stand-with-uaw?source=em20231005&t=3&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)**
I recently stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the brave men and women of the UAW on their picket line in Langhorne, PA. These workers are fighting for fair wages, better working conditions, and the respect that they so rightfully deserve.
[](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20231005-stand-with-uaw?source=em20231005&t=4&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)
These aren't abstract issues; they affect real people right here in Pennsylvania. Members of UAW Local 2177, who specialize in distributing parts to dealerships, are fighting for living wages, an end to lower pay scales for new workers, and better hours. This is how we build a strong and thriving middle class.
**[I'm asking you to add your name next to mine in support of striking workers. If you have a moment to add your signature, that would mean a lot.](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20231005-stand-with-uaw?source=em20231005&t=5&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)**
**[Sign your name »](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20231005-stand-with-uaw?source=em20231005&t=6&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)**
Now is the time for action. I hope you'll join me in showing these workers that they're not alone -- that we stand with them, rain or shine, in the fight for a more equitable America.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=838%2E552475%2Esrz9BK)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Donald Trump
subject: We need a Majority to pass the America First agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow American – Donald Trump here.

[**I’m reaching out because our country is in grave trouble.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9bee9365f1854bd58c44a7c4264a1670&_e=e1VNwWk_1lCUbsMhr-OjLqBNuzQtEKa5pM0EsyZAGhClOtXOx-g4qNT7PmeV2b_GlN3QHBKRog_eqqc898AdJDEHI0ujiBA1-YE8VnazYp0UTOPYOIHScxwRVXpNC-4Mt0K74xtT868fXhRXCibZYUnoXKT2a-lBf54Rv6PXdQWtmzR6NHUyZszu_qSYWlFhg7Hgldi2AbmtVN_Umps0J2C7ZB8XS965CNW3_7r7t2rKMTGeEuHpCcnDNsbxv-KAVK44hX-woavVOKIMjzIDyVZlFZiy0kNAZnC-xJonHM5Hv8WqZis7Np4v8zpvppoRFutDs2nI0QLOX6Dul2DVx41RuoqlE_8x3kK6ea3PCDfeMVRykJx2OF6kwqOuTUk_LcQIgOMwzs6xqNqao77lFrQajJoejyeH9BrTRkkVU4M%3D)

Joe Biden and the Democrats have destroyed America in a few short years.

With four more years, Biden will successfully transform America into a third-world country.

When I win in 2024, [**I’m going to need a Republican Senate**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9bee9365f1854bd58c44a7c4264a1670&_e=e1VNwWk_1lCUbsMhr-OjLqBNuzQtEKa5pM0EsyZAGhClOtXOx-g4qNT7PmeV2b_GlN3QHBKRog_eqqc898AdJDEHI0ujiBA1-YE8VnazYp0UTOPYOIHScxwRVXpNC-4Mt0K74xtT868fXhRXCibZYUnoXKT2a-lBf54Rv6PXdQWtmzR6NHUyZszu_qSYWlFhg7Hgldi2AbmtVN_Umps0J2C7ZB8XS965CNW3_7r7t2rKMTGeEuHpCcnDNsbxv-KAVK44hX-woavVOKIMjzIDycKLaKrkeCfJ2mN8WHYXQ4XVAjzfbnAOy6fmtqJjDStP3OwIlwG5Y-peKZpQEtOBqJaGUupkSZB6W-eq3tvGVmhAGvxT0xuShfU0FZ1u73Mok1vIbaN8XhHiqE9sNDH1m2vZLvjLkSs_UMazcY4hOKU%3D) to help fix the mess Joe Biden has created.

_We need a Majority to pass the America First agenda._ I’m counting on you to help Republicans take back the Senate with a donation of just $35.

[**Can I count on you? Chip in here >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9bee9365f1854bd58c44a7c4264a1670&_e=e1VNwWk_1lCUbsMhr-OjLqBNuzQtEKa5pM0EsyZAGhClOtXOx-g4qNT7PmeV2b_GlN3QHBKRog_eqqc898AdJDEHI0ujiBA1-YE8VnazYp0UTOPYOIHScxwRVXpNC-4Mt0K74xtT868fXhRXCibZYUnoXKT2a-lBf54Rv6PXdQWtmzR6NHUyZszu_qSYWlFhg7Hgldi2AbmtVN_Umps0J2C7ZB8XS965CNW3_7r7t2rKMTGeEuHpCcnDNsbxv-KAVK44hX-woavVOKIMjzIDyYrfeFGPcKSgYMgfvoMlJCfrae9Vaxb-s0M7tDVRIrsukDVaoNpNhlpW1HYzLfEmTT4Sd-SMWY4g12cJ9L08WtKDNcfVP4UgkZMJZj6-_Pn_snXSSp9_9VFVIesdhU2hf_wolPRHResMOiJPt4Qf2R8%3D)

body:

We want to hear _your_ thoughts on the performance of President Biden and Democrats in Congress, the issues you want to see addressed, the candidates you’re most excited about heading into 2024, and more. **Can you spare a few minutes to complete our official October 2023 WFP Member Survey? clean_body: This is an important moment for us to hear what's on your mind. | | | Peter — It's been a while since we checked in — and with Election Day one month away and 2024 just around the corner, now is an important moment for us to know what's on your mind. We want to hear your thoughts on the performance of President Biden and Democrats in Congress, the issues you want to see addressed, the candidates you’re most excited about heading into 2024, and more. Can you spare a few minutes to complete our official October 2023 WFP Member Survey? You can start by answering the first question right here: 1\. On a scale of 1 (strongly disapprove) to 5 (strongly approve), how would you rate the performance of President Joe Biden? The Working Families Party is your party. That’s why it’s so important to us that we hear from as many members as possible about the current political moment. Peter, your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities for the electoral cycle and guiding our organizing work. What do you think of the performance of President Biden and Congressional leaders? Are there any candidates in your area who you think WFP should endorse in 2024? What issues do you want to hear candidates and campaigns addressing? And how are you thinking of getting involved as we head into Election Day this November and 2024 primaries starting early next year? When you fill out this survey, we’ll read every one of your answers — yes, every single one. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Take my August Priorities Survey
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71054366/431023244/-1997846888?code=jtk1210-su-nd&refcode=jtk1210-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM1MGQzZC1jYjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBgo9B4r07dtnlZmejriJ7VUOKfwyAGJcpudgoMiIGM=)

Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**
**[So please, will you be one of the 5,000 people I need to take my October Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71054368/431023245/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1210-su-nd&refcode=jtk1210-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM1MGQzZC1jYjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBgo9B4r07dtnlZmejriJ7VUOKfwyAGJcpudgoMiIGM=&emci=e59d848b-8b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ad350d3d-cb63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Peter, thanks to the valuable insight I've received from supporters like you, I've been able to prioritize the most urgent fights that have come up this year. I listened to people's top concerns and devoted myself to going toe-to-toe with anti-abortion extremists, taking on the gun lobby, and fighting against a record number of LGBTQ+ hate and discrimination efforts.
**But as the political climate continues to shift and GOP extremists continue to sharpen their attacks, I need your input ASAP to know where to devote my time next.**
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71054373/431023247/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1210-su-nd&refcode=jtk1210-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM1MGQzZC1jYjYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBgo9B4r07dtnlZmejriJ7VUOKfwyAGJcpudgoMiIGM=&emci=e59d848b-8b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ad350d3d-cb63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Fellow American,

I am a free speech absolutist but what I witnessed today is not the way...

I was attending a campaign event earlier today and was met by a small group of protesters. I respectfully answered their questions and thanked them for expressing their views even if I disagreed with them.

**What happened next was a step too far. One of the protesters got into their car and appeared to crash into my car at the event, gave them the middle finger, and drove off.**

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e54bfe5c3cad454bad96211832ab61e0&_e=qEXIVBAb9_eZ52DDI47YfjVELq1tIzq8oDGzKpGoZNNP_WUALaA5fwTp1SOdIdf_Uc6R_LoieOBdEQm6N08Iw3g5kdNiyfamQbtWktqss_qwHXlsHgBAeJszwdS1Z8giWzuw3K3kqon2W87mH33LQlrPHNKKOO6gje7mAZ2mNIKEf5wiZ-C-uPvXV-s1-uPa-wFmrNpdtfHqIr23iAZWawjwIV_0W2eBRXZPQhyzVuiKn0wr0bRxGoL5g-DWinqN38nxBxJ5rBcxRGe272OinYDFdC4yDmHoRuJJqkwYr-sZCltdwJ8Rgrw_HxR7No-g9rq8918Btl5rxp5GH7nZF6UoMoxSXCDUpSeL8P1U0tTKUOimzOhubzHoTQPtSolHoLuqFDfPvyOPOnb6C3ORtA%3D%3D)
[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e54bfe5c3cad454bad96211832ab61e0&_e=qEXIVBAb9_eZ52DDI47YfjVELq1tIzq8oDGzKpGoZNNP_WUALaA5fwTp1SOdIdf_Uc6R_LoieOBdEQm6N08Iw3g5kdNiyfamQbtWktqss_qwHXlsHgBAeJszwdS1Z8giWzuw3K3kqon2W87mH33LQlrPHNKKOO6gje7mAZ2mNIKEf5wiZ-C-uPvXV-s1-uPa-wFmrNpdtfHqIr23iAZWawjwIV_0W2eBRXZPQhyzVuiKn0wr0bRxGoL5g-DWinqN3QhL83hipRB3PGthpaNqyo7wOH0hGJPchxScxJhJVMUhs1BzcPwW6ajcidpz412Q5r47vWCCV4X18o-MhAsXYdV5UnLu43oyKmk_wlgVa_SQTiOiVvV_QJ6kEr8I9LSu3alE5w-jnZ90xfgx1wF_xg%3D%3D)
**Thankfully, no one was hurt.** This is not the way. The fervent Left is not the party of love and tolerance. Free speech means respect for ALL Americans' free speech and ensuring that ALL voices are heard – not just those on the left they agree with.

I've listened to people who have tried to protest me and had a conversation with them instead. My political rivals launched a barrage of attacks and insults toward me and I debated them instead.

I won't claim to know what was in this protester's mind when they appeared to crash their car but what I can say is this, I will keep doing my part to ensure you're right to say what you need to say - peacefully.

I will always stand for free speech and the right to peaceful protest, but when protestors cross the line and escalate to physical (intentional or otherwise) that is unAmerican and unacceptable.

We cannot lose the ability to peacefully debate and have a conversation about our differences. Those days cannot be too far gone.

For everyone,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e54bfe5c3cad454bad96211832ab61e0&_e=qEXIVBAb9_eZ52DDI47YfjVELq1tIzq8oDGzKpGoZNNP_WUALaA5fwTp1SOdIdf_Uc6R_LoieOBdEQm6N08Iw3g5kdNiyfamQbtWktqss_qwHXlsHgBAeJszwdS1Z8giWzuw3K3kqon2W87mH33LQlrPHNKKOO6gje7mAZ2mNIKEf5wiZ-C-uPvXV-s1-uPa-wFmrNpdtfHqIr23iAZWawjwIV_0W2eBRXZPQhyzVuiKn0wr0bRxGoL5g-DWinqNQOidk31O8fZedFCcBvroGwtKBPfZISMGGH-BAT_YT_KbVaNU08yfhgm_PHkaF2biScsDmQIwGkzyI15Jo8AYaD34KtQrTfTKUw_a2eNPxlMfOTJPTTn87ejgTQRJU10efbeagwn9B-vGXzpRoumCHA%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

While Republican governors, like Ron DeSantis in Florida and Greg Abbott in Texas, focus their cultural extremist war on banning books, their states are seeing mass shootings and gun violence.

**Instead of passing gun safety reform to protect children in school, their only focus is banning books.**

In Florida, librarians could even face felony charges if they don’t comply with the new book bans.

Kevin McCarthy enabled and upheld some of the most extreme, racist, violent, law-breaking people in his party — who ultimately took him down — while going back on every deal he made with Democrats.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Kevin McCarthy’s time is up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Not even his own party would save him.
#
Peter, Republicans are in complete ruin.
Their caucus of chaos has tried to impose their cruelty on working families across the country, _and now — for the first time in U.S. history — they are without a leader._
**Pramila was unequivocal in her vote against Kevin McCarthy.** He broke his promises to President Biden, supports draconian abortion bans, and would never get her vote for Speaker.
Time and again, Kevin McCarthy has shown himself to be unfit to lead. He has upheld some of the most extreme, violent, and unconstitutional leaders in his party, and not even they could save him. **And now his time is up.**
**Now, Republicans are putting forward their nominees for the next speaker, and they are just as bad****, Peter.** The list includes proud MAGA supporters Jim Jordan and Steve Scalise, just to name a few.
**Trump's goons have created a dangerous dynamic in our democracy.** That means we need to do everything in our power to continue protecting the values, vision, and progress our movement has fought for for so long.
**No matter what the GOP is planning to throw our way, we need to make sure our progressive movement is strong and united against their chaos.[If you stand with Pramila and our fearless progressive base, please chip in $3 today to power our movement as we fight for our democracy.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46099?refcode=em20231005-3006&t=1&akid=3006%2E420207%2Elr3OXa)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46099?refcode=em20231005-3006&t=20&akid=3006%2E420207%2Elr3OXa)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231005-3006-footer&t=21&refcode2=3006_420207_lr3OXa&akid=3006%2E420207%2Elr3OXa)**

The Most Winnable Seat In California!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0cOi1hYz2/c?w=cLwvjH3nOLl8cMWWqpjxedsri8yPSJuF8qu69l0tjwU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzBjT2kxaFl6Mj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)_**

| | One of the most natural things I've ever done in my life is to decide to run for State Assembly District 30! Since speaking at Schoolboards, Supervisor Meetings, City Council Meetings and even in Sacramento did not move the needle not one little bit, deciding to run for a seat that would make a difference locally was a no brainer. I am happy to tell you that I have already been endorsed by the previous Republican candidate that ran for this seat: Vicki Nohrden. And, I have been recently endorsed by the Monterey County Central Committee as well! We are off to a grand start Patriots, Mama Bears, and America First We The People because we are united and all working together. There is only ONE enemy, and those are the Progressives In Charge who refuse to listen to their constituents. You and I are here to remind them: THEY WORK FOR US! More exciting news! I have been nominated for President Trump's "Drain The Swamp" SuperPAC! Click the link and scroll down to find me, I am the FIRST ONE LISTED: [DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0cOi1hYz2/c?w=xKR4Q59HEwjOpJwcBetIauZrHu-M1TFGNBdxViaNcQo.) I have also already been endorsed by one of the best Supervisors ever: Debbie Arnold of Atascadero! Can things get any better? I'll tell you a secret, there are 3 more PACs looking at me- and many more endorsements lining up. Stay tuned! But meanwhile, get to know my Platform: Parental Rights, Election Integrity, Make Small Businesses Great Again, Water Rights For Our AG & Hospitality, Back The Blue and Support Our Military. Read all about it here: [MY PLATFORM](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0cOi1hYz2/c?w=CwQczjjqoooU7yB5ARf8hv2Mu19Kyc2zlpcBckks3Bw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFsaWxhZm9yYXNzZW1ibHkuY29tL3BsYXRmb3JtIiwiciI6IjQyNTJmZTRhLTQxMzQtNDUyYy1mOGEzLTk4NGE2YjMxYTZjMCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9) On top of it all, my district numbers shows this is the most winnable seat in California:1) Vicki got 40% of the vote on her first run against my opponent (who helps pass all these vile bills taking parent's rights away). My opponent is in her first term which makes her the most vulnerable.2) The registered voters that vote conservative are Republicans, No Party Preference, American Independent, and Libertarian which equals 52% of registered voters, while registered Democrats are only 45%. THAT'S HUGE! And that's why I say: THIS IS THE MOST WINNABLE SEAT IN CALIFORNIA 2024! My opponent not only helps to pass every single disgusting bill putting our children in danger from state sanctioned kidnapping and hormone treatment/surgery, but she actually Co-Authored ACA 1 which will gut Proposition 13. Prop 13 is the only thing keeping home owners viable in this state! To see how high your taxes would be without Prop 13, click the Howard Jarvis link [HERE.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0cOi1hYz2/c?w=Pg9xIQKaBRrZHvsjns8cf7qC4Svrvbg0c6b3B7cmCtw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGp0YS5vcmcvcmVzb3VyY2VzL3RheHBheWVyLXRvb2xzL2d1ZXNzaW5nLWdhbWUtdGF4LWNhbGN1bGF0b3IvIiwiciI6IjQyNTJmZTRhLTQxMzQtNDUyYy1mOGEzLTk4NGE2YjMxYTZjMCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9) As you can see, you and I would not be able to afford our homes. And if my opponent succeeds in gutting it with ACA 1 alongside Robert Rivas's ACA 13 to further gut Prop 13, our children and grandchildren will never be able to buy a home, and once we retire, we will have to sell our own homes and move out of Cali. Shame on them! We can do this American First Patriots! We must do this and this is the hill we stand strong on.Support my efforts, support my campaign, but best of all, support our children with Parental Rights! Love to all the Patriots!God bless!!Dalila(Paid for by Dalila Epperson For Assembly FPPC #1463042)

Peter,

This week, Republican Kevin McCarthy was removed as speaker, and now we’re witnessing uncharted chaos and dysfunction in the House of Representatives.

Since being in the majority, House Republicans have never prioritized governing for the hard-working American people. I’ve seen enough of the Republican party making the American people pay the price for their incompetence.

That’s why it’s so important for us to regain the Democratic House majority. _**I’m running in the second most flippable district in the country, which means the path to taking back the House runs through Long Island.**_

[_**But we cannot do this alone. name: Anderson Clayton
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-ncdp?refcode=231005-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-ncdp?refcode=231005-email]Hey Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you because, quite frankly, I’m fed up. I’m fed up with politicians in Washington playing games every year with our healthcare, our social security, and our federal worker's income all because they want to score a few political points.
It’s not right, and it’s not what those folks were sent there to do.
But the GOP has shown us who they are. And when someone shows you who they are, you need to believe them. They’re not serious about governing this country, and they’re not interested in coming up with real solutions to the problems facing millions of North Carolina families and Americans every single day.
So here’s my plan for us here in North Carolina: we’re going to protect the Senate, protect the White House, and flip the House blue – starting right here in NC-13 with my friend Wiley Nickel. Will you split a donation between the North Carolina Democratic Party and Wiley Nickel’s campaign to protect his seat and flip the House next year? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-ncdp?refcode=231005-email]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-ncdp?refcode=230730-email] DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-ncdp?refcode=231005-email]If we’re gonna do this, we’ve got to do a hell of a lot of organizing across the entire state. And I can promise you that’s going to require a hell of a lot of money and resources.
But I know we can build a statewide campaign that will put adults back in the majority because I know one thing about North Carolina Democrats is y’all show up.
This is the land where the weak grow strong, and the strong grow great. And we’re growing stronger every day.
So please, Peter, rush a split of $10, $20, or whatever makes sense for you between the North Carolina Dems and Wiley Nickel’s campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-ncdp?refcode=231005-email]
Very Best,
Anderson

clean_body: [ Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you because, quite frankly, I’m fed up. I’m fed up with politicians in Washington playing games every year with our healthcare, our social security, and our federal worker's income all because they want to score a few political points. It’s not right, and it’s not what those folks were sent there to do. But the GOP has shown us who they are. And when someone shows you who they are, you need to believe them. They’re not serious about governing this country, and they’re not interested in coming up with real solutions to the problems facing millions of North Carolina families and Americans every single day. So here’s my plan for us here in North Carolina: we’re going to protect the Senate, protect the White House, and flip the House blue – starting right here in NC-13 with my friend Wiley Nickel. Will you split a donation between the North Carolina Democratic Party and Wiley Nickel’s campaign to protect his seat and flip the House next year? [] [] DONATE [ we’re gonna do this, we’ve got to do a hell of a lot of organizing across the entire state. And I can promise you that’s going to require a hell of a lot of money and resources. But I know we can build a statewide campaign that will put adults back in the majority because I know one thing about North Carolina Democrats is y’all show up. This is the land where the weak grow strong, and the strong grow great. And we’re growing stronger every day. So please, Peter, rush a split of $10, $20, or whatever makes sense for you between the North Carolina Dems and Wiley Nickel’s campaign today. We officially have just five months to get Nick across the finish line on Primary Election Day, Peter, and we cannot leave anything up to chance. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Contributions of just $5 go a long way, your support will enable us to: Reach more voters : With your support, we can increase our outreach efforts, engage with more constituents, and share our vision for a stronger and more prosperous community.
