name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.

[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLty6jAURb_muMMjH8kSFCq4MLoFMymTSalnEJFiWzIY_j4DIWnPY-01W-cxxXCTIP4B4jG6CohAt4A4vS-5nE_58H91LdvVxF9yf1_iDhDn2-j_Lp-Q1mcd030q9o2TNDjCGi87vuE9E0j65iiN4w6NCGtjuGbeB8qIY5YxNILazbqJEgnSjpAeKek73lqtNeeaB4ump8EBI4-cVmdfotVdnRddyjDk1g65SfI4z2N9iClAtZSh_Trb5M_1580OGVA9lQHVBVC9nuxV0f1nnYCqRwl0r8tld-DTW1OkG5eYUqxcACMfv5TvAAAA__-1NGFN) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6yAQhZ9mvIsFA8bxgkVuIu4iUrdVl_y5oYLggF03b18ldbs9M_PNp6PTFMN4l9D_A8RLcBUQgR0A8fa2prJ8pPP_3Vc57G7iJXWPIR4Bcb5P_m9zg7Q-6RAfaX9qnGSjI7zxkopBdLxH0jUXyclgBzMMfq8t92YkbuB7Kyile8NE3zdBIkFGCemQkY6K1mqthdBitGg6Njrg5Pmn1cmXYDWt86pLyTm1Nqcmyss8T_UppgDVWnJ7XWz0S_05szkBqk0ZUNXFVFvCNId8rYBquW6J8cDUsxF20uXzeBa316ZIN60hxlBFD5y8_yK_AwAA__-h-2a-)

| | [ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFv4yAUhH8NvsWCh8HrA4fsRtlDpd57Qq-AHSoTnAeOm_76KlHT63yjmQ_TMsfxZlj_lwGcoi8MgMk9A7i8bYnWj_Tyf_dJ-91FvyZ1h_CPAdTbEn6bPyNtSBjne9ofGm_k6HnXBCP0oFXXA1fNyfRK_hkc9p5zLgR6DFI5HETn3TD0ODTRAAcpOFcguRK6dYioNerRwbuSo2cdf_y0mAJFh6LUDYlyTq3LqZnNqdalPMSODI4Thvo1ZnL5PFEopaVwvbYuP5H1-WxzsoGsD-MuTZaKfSoweVxrsjVQYvKwkWCgKbiVKJ4nJg-V1tCQ8csW5zkW3bOOTw85l9N3AAAA__92PGzc)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFv4yAUhH8NvsWCh8HrA4fsRtlDpd57Qq-AHSoTnAeOm_76KlHT63yjmQ_TMsfxZlj_lwGcoi8MgMk9A7i8bYnWj_Tyf_dJ-91FvyZ1h_CPAdTbEn6bPyNtSBjne9ofGm_k6HnXBCP0oFXXA1fNyfRK_hkc9p5zLgR6DFI5HETn3TD0ODTRAAcpOFcguRK6dYioNerRwbuSo2cdf_y0mAJFh6LUDYlyTq3LqZnNqdalPMSODI4Thvo1ZnL5PFEopaVwvbYuP5H1-WxzsoGsD-MuTZaKfSoweVxrsjVQYvKwkWCgKbiVKJ4nJg-V1tCQ8csW5zkW3bOOTw85l9N3AAAA__92PGzc)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We’re not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It’s going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn’t give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they’re plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFv4yAUhH8NvsWCh8HrA4fsRtlDpd57Qq-AHSoTnAeOm_76KlHT63yjmQ_TMsfxZlj_lwGcoi8MgMk9A7i8bYnWj_Tyf_dJ-91FvyZ1h_CPAdTbEn6bPyNtSBjne9ofGm_k6HnXBCP0oFXXA1fNyfRK_hkc9p5zLgR6DFI5HETn3TD0ODTRAAcpOFcguRK6dYioNerRwbuSo2cdf_y0mAJFh6LUDYlyTq3LqZnNqdalPMSODI4Thvo1ZnL5PFEopaVwvbYuP5H1-WxzsoGsD-MuTZaKfSoweVxrsjVQYvKwkWCgKbiVKJ4nJg-V1tCQ8csW5zkW3bOOTw85l9N3AAAA__92PGzc)
---
**[We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFv4yAUhH8NvsWCh8HrA4fsRtlDpd57Qq-AHSoTnAeOm_76KlHT63yjmQ_TMsfxZlj_lwGcoi8MgMk9A7i8bYnWj_Tyf_dJ-91FvyZ1h_CPAdTbEn6bPyNtSBjne9ofGm_k6HnXBCP0oFXXA1fNyfRK_hkc9p5zLgR6DFI5HETn3TD0ODTRAAcpOFcguRK6dYioNerRwbuSo2cdf_y0mAJFh6LUDYlyTq3LqZnNqdalPMSODI4Thvo1ZnL5PFEopaVwvbYuP5H1-WxzsoGsD-MuTZaKfSoweVxrsjVQYvKwkWCgKbiVKJ4nJg-V1tCQ8csW5zkW3bOOTw85l9N3AAAA__92PGzc)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won’t happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I’ll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFv4yAUhH8NvsWCh8HrA4fsRtlDpd57Qq-AHSoTnAeOm_76KlHT63yjmQ_TMsfxZlj_lwGcoi8MgMk9A7i8bYnWj_Tyf_dJ-91FvyZ1h_CPAdTbEn6bPyNtSBjne9ofGm_k6HnXBCP0oFXXA1fNyfRK_hkc9p5zLgR6DFI5HETn3TD0ODTRAAcpOFcguRK6dYioNerRwbuSo2cdf_y0mAJFh6LUDYlyTq3LqZnNqdalPMSODI4Thvo1ZnL5PFEopaVwvbYuP5H1-WxzsoGsD-MuTZaKfSoweVxrsjVQYvKwkWCgKbiVKJ4nJg-V1tCQ8csW5zkW3bOOTw85l9N3AAAA__92PGzc)

Peter Willis —

Last week, CA Gov. Gavin Newsom slapped progressives in the face.

Instead of appointing US Rep. Barbara Lee — the most qualified, the most experienced, and the most effective progressive — to serve in the US Senate, he picked a former corporate executive and lobbyist who’s never held elected office.

That’s right. Newsom ignored calls by leaders of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Congressional Black Caucus, Our Revolution, Working Families Party, Gen Z for Change, and the grassroots to pick Barbara Lee — instead, he chose a corporate Democratic insider with Airbnb and Uber as past clients.

We don’t need another corporate Democrat in the Senate — we need Barbara Lee, a proven progressive champion who speaks truth to power. We’re going to fight like hell to make sure Barbara Lee is elected to serve with Bernie in the Senate. Can you chip in NOW to split a donation between Our Revolution and Barbara’s campaign? Barbara Lee — the most qualified, the most experienced, and the most effective progressive — to serve in the US Senate, he picked a former corporate executive and lobbyist who’s never held elected office. That’s right. Newsom ignored calls by leaders of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Congressional Black Caucus, Our Revolution, Working Families Party, Gen Z for Change, and the grassroots to pick Barbara Lee — instead, he chose a corporate Democratic insider with Airbnb and Uber as past clients. We don’t need another corporate Democrat in the Senate — we need Barbara Lee, a proven progressive champion who speaks truth to power. We’re going to fight like hell to make sure Barbara Lee is elected to serve with Bernie in the Senate. Can you chip in NOW to split a donation between Our Revolution and Barbara’s campaign? () If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Barbara Lee and Our Revolution and processed immediately. CHIP IN $10 NOW » () CHIP IN $27 NOW » () CHIP IN $50 NOW » () CHIP IN $100 NOW » () CHIP IN $250 NOW » () CHIP IN OTHER » () The Bottom Line: Newsom’s pick proves that the political establishment and the donor class are scared of Barbara Lee — just like they are scared of Bernie. They do not want these two fierce progressives teaming up in the Senate. And that’s exactly why we need to elect Barbara. The nominating convention is next month and the team at Our Revolution is hard at work making sure that voters know exactly what’s at stake. Click here to SPLIT a donation today between Barbara Lee’s campaign and Our Revolution. () We can’t let the establishment pick our leaders for us. body:
We’ve got just five months left to keep building Katie’s campaign and ensure she makes it to the general election.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30969%2E3422442%2E303FVK)
**Today we’re officially five months out from the California primary, Derek!**
That means we’ve got just five months left to keep building our campaign and ensure we make it to the general election. And we have good news on that front: new polling shows Katie _**tied for first place!**_
With your help we can keep the momentum going and make sure Katie wins the primary _and_ the general election. But it’s going to take a lot of resources to make it happen.
[**With just five months to go, can you pitch in $5 right now to help us elect Katie as California’s next US Senator?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231005-1?refcode=EMAM05_1_PRI_20231005_V1_F&amount=5&refcode2=30969_3422442_303FVK&akid=30969%2E3422442%2E303FVK)
Here are just a few reasons your support is so important:
* **Katie doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists** , making grassroots fundraising a central part of our campaign strategy.
* **California is one of the most expensive states in which to run a statewide campaign** , with tens of millions of voters to reach.
* **As primary day draws closer, voters will begin to make up their minds**. More than a third of Californians are undecided, so we need to have the resources to get Katie’s message out and mobilize millions of voters!

[**So with just five months left until the primary, if you’re ready to send Katie to the U.S. Senate to fight for us, then please pitch in $5 or more to help us keep up the momentum:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231005-1?refcode=EMAM05_1_PRI_20231005_V1_F&amount=5&refcode2=30969_3422442_303FVK&akid=30969%2E3422442%2E303FVK)

Thank you!
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. While some may feel more discouraged by our government than ever, and Republicans continue to pass the blame onto Democrats, I feel more compelled to serve than ever.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065030/431032240/-1194398884?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231005-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRmZTA2NC1kNzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URv6BNpBTeCoaTSVbpPtNFnsVhDoBjZ3eS0rcy67RTU=)

| Dear partner in democracy,

After the dysfunction that took place under the leadership of House Republicans earlier this week, we shouldn’t be celebrating; we should be organizing. The failings in the House this Congress directly result from last November’s election and the extremists that the National Republican Campaign Committee helped elect into office. We can’t let that happen again.

While some may feel more discouraged by our government than ever, and Republicans continue to pass the blame onto Democrats, I feel more compelled to serve than ever. It’s never been more apparent that we need strong and principled leaders who can bring new ideas and commit to making the People’s House work for them.

That’s why I’m starting a leadership PAC, A Pleasant Peninsula PAC, to help me continue my work and show my fellow Democrats that I’m committed to leading in Congress as we take back the majority.

We’re padding our coffers ahead of 2024 to help protect some of the most vulnerable Democrats nationwide and show that West Michigan has their backs. [_**If you support helping empower a strong line of Democratic leaders committed to fighting off extremism, working across the aisle, and building a brighter future for the next generation, please consider a founding contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065031/431032241/-1194398884?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231005-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRmZTA2NC1kNzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URv6BNpBTeCoaTSVbpPtNFnsVhDoBjZ3eS0rcy67RTU=)

body:
Month after month, your support makes a difference. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065114/431032583/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2I0ZTcwZC1kODYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIJRbPQPt1GEyPa5_a1Otagd6ulT23xpzdU6bZzQE0c=&emci=6422c207-d863-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ccb4e70d-d863-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
To be frank, folks, we fell short of our fundraising targets at the end of the quarter. I get it — slow fundraising periods happen. Fewer people have been reading our emails lately, and our average donation has dipped a bit as a result. _The fact that you’re here reading this email means a lot to my campaign team._ I’m not going to sound the alarm or pretend the sky is falling. That’s not how this campaign works. I know we can pick up our momentum for the months ahead if this team comes together. **And one important way of doing that is by bringing in more monthly recurring donations.** **[The more recurring donations folks like you give](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065115/431032584/1329421977?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2I0ZTcwZC1kODYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIJRbPQPt1GEyPa5_a1Otagd6ulT23xpzdU6bZzQE0c=)** , the less we have to worry about how many donations we’re raising on a day-to-day basis. Monthly recurring donations help us budget ahead for important work, like supporting strong local candidates and spreading the word about the progress our Democratic Senate Majority is making. **[So, will you commit to a monthly recurring donation of any amount today? Your support on the 5th of each month ensures we have the resources to hire staff, support volunteers, and respond to Republicans’ attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065117/431032586/1329421977?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2I0ZTcwZC1kODYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIJRbPQPt1GEyPa5_a1Otagd6ulT23xpzdU6bZzQE0c=)** | [CHIP IN MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71065119/431032588/1329421977?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2I0ZTcwZC1kODYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIJRbPQPt1GEyPa5_a1Otagd6ulT23xpzdU6bZzQE0c=)
---
Your grassroots support represents the future we're building together for New Mexico and our country — a future where our public lands and waters are fully protected, our children and grandchildren breathe clean air, and good-paying jobs are available to hard workers all over the country.
Thank you,

clean_body: Month after month, your support makes a difference. To be frank, folks, we fell short of our fundraising targets at the end of the quarter. I get it — slow fundraising periods happen. Fewer people have been reading our emails lately, and our average donation has dipped a bit as a result. The fact that you’re here reading this email means a lot to my campaign team. I’m not going to sound the alarm or pretend the sky is falling. That’s not how this campaign works. I know we can pick up our momentum for the months ahead if this team comes together. And one important way of doing that is by bringing in more monthly recurring donations. = , the less we have to worry about how many donations we’re raising on a day-to-day basis. Monthly recurring donations help us budget ahead for important work, like supporting strong local candidates and spreading the word about the progress our Democratic Senate Majority is making. = | = Your grassroots support represents the future we're building together for New Mexico and our country — a future where our public lands and waters are fully protected, our children and grandchildren breathe clean air, and good-paying jobs are available to hard workers all over the country. Thank you, Martin P.S. Can’t commit to a monthly donation today? body:
Our country is in grave trouble | Fellow American – Donald Trump here.

[**I’m reaching out because our country is in grave trouble.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ea12846b87d945039c282428c2ea8273&_e=HtmWV18KPckucEQb9FKi22BeO4rb5u36Q9oZHisTbbpIdbqDv0eDmp8RIdHvED19sPGw6JYUVopDGmKIOVqd9W1ittnUf4p_K79xpyRom9TVB4967SDeYxHTn-6jbK4DPosi7pqvWbAd3Rjf7ZCkYn4QpFpHJakTAhlYX6dtZm8Y5xLJNU05BxzBtSStmjGnM24A-FBW8qK1nHE5CRtaQJW-B9klIIgMVbthfUaP8nxQfqAR3pLPx9yKtGB_SJ2tTBU5jOSfMXq3otjqo-pcykgR0Ys1GJVvKop5FQQHJsaqOoG6FPxKVbZsXsf-_RocIBkTNGtAIBx9sYsSQLuL49RAF8KoLDmUhmpClbV66B5u5bW-8wvV7B_wv-CZfAtvy5qKi9Mclaxto9N5IEBYOjifgWCxnBNLSsdAyfqtEobCajxnId40iV-JI35No9yo)

Joe Biden and the Democrats have destroyed America in a few short years.

With four more years, Biden will successfully transform America into a third-world country.

When I win in 2024, [**I’m going to need a Republican Senate**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ea12846b87d945039c282428c2ea8273&_e=HtmWV18KPckucEQb9FKi22BeO4rb5u36Q9oZHisTbbpIdbqDv0eDmp8RIdHvED19sPGw6JYUVopDGmKIOVqd9W1ittnUf4p_K79xpyRom9TVB4967SDeYxHTn-6jbK4DPosi7pqvWbAd3Rjf7ZCkYn4QpFpHJakTAhlYX6dtZm8Y5xLJNU05BxzBtSStmjGnM24A-FBW8qK1nHE5CRtaQJW-B9klIIgMVbthfUaP8nxQfqAR3pLPx9yKtGB_SJ2tTBU5jOSfMXq3otjqo-pcykgR0Ys1GJVvKop5FQQHJsYe7vATQO4cG7gF_7Qtl-60pnC4aL1Fk4SMHYulCIgYKZZUHsCSN11QoQ8FDLFdJMMUf1JRR036dSPo3eRpf3cGLyEGTL6-hrSJOf8SCc0w4WF59ezo915OdPnKIid-TuxI8VgB4s_Hvy_fbYCAwSxT) to help fix the mess Joe Biden has created.

_We need a Majority to pass the America First agenda._ I’m counting on you to help Republicans take back the Senate with a donation of just $35.

[**Can I count on you?
